[{"Name":"Melinda King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFto_CKDQWqmeRcZAW3jxjRS5G8gwEvyPAzjHevje8a0a4VID4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time here. Food was good and came out relatively quickly. The platters were huge and we went home with leftovers. The falafel was so good! Not dry.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8BUPsK_CGqkFT9nkfppBi&fid=0x0:0xb9285fd2c53b48b4"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Vijay Unniparambath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOV_pTz4P-MZvbu4bqOmdHk8h3O9toFYjJL9wytJ8y9EPgBAiU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Second time here and absolutely loved the experience both times. The food was incredibly delicious—every bite was bursting with flavor. We tried the Chapli, Lamp, Combo and Chicken sandwiches  this time and they were all excellent choices. The portion sizes are huge, so you definitely get your money's worth. The service was friendly and efficient, making the whole experience even better. If you're craving tasty, satisfying Mediterranean food, this is the place to go. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw1MaMVg&fid=0x0:0xb9285fd2c53b48b4"],"When":"2025-3-23"},{"Name":"Tiny Mentor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXih5scAE64GJw-Dlb9B1-nPSD8B2aG0a6GRzSwujJfx8CmWZfBkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re anywhere near Frisco and craving halal food, you HAVE to try Gyro Shop. I just had their lamb over rice and I’m still thinking about it.
The lamb was perfectly seasoned — tender, juicy, and packed with flavor in every bite. The rice was fluffy and aromatic, not just filler like most places. And the white sauce… absolute perfection. Creamy, tangy, and balanced everything out so well. The portion size was generous too — easily one of those meals that leaves you full and happy.
What really stood out was the freshness. You can tell everything is made with care, not just thrown together. Service was quick, staff was friendly, and the place was clean.
Hands down one of the best lamb over rice platters in the Frisco area. If you haven’t tried it yet, you’re missing out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSAhTmHDmvLAJxprnEySHaw1blGW5lybISGl8oQPScg1o-3D8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by to charge my Tesla across the street and got hungry—spotted The Gyro Shop (or whatever the exact name is locally) and decided to give it a try. Ordered the combo pita, and wow, what a pleasant surprise! It was absolutely stuffed with juicy meat, fresh toppings, and tasted incredibly delicious. Seriously so good I was tempted to grab a second one while my car charged.
The place is clean and welcoming with plenty of tables inside. Huge bonus: it’s right next to the charger, making it the perfect quick, tasty stop during a session. Highly recommend if you’re in the area and craving a loaded gyro!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacob Kilman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6YYvW9326fa67ZyPUBzfp5X_2qCpJISKFrQJx2QqRUXveH8YIdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered the chicken and lamb combo platter with rice and the juiced beat Apple ginger orange was great!  Kind of like Halal guys but many more options and tasty. I’ll be back.!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8DVx7bYfHu9miZsSkl4pW&fid=0x0:0xb9285fd2c53b48b4"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Gage Sharp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbE0_FxZzODf8d365-Gt8IOKB2wjXkoMVtShS8xq0RzE507g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got Gyro, a platter, and 2 juices that were spectacular! The gyro was filled to the brim with all the fixings. The plate offers soo much food. And the fresh pressed juice was the cherry on top. The food was amazing with great flavor, and I would recommend not passing up on the juices (lots of options). There's no doubt i will be visiting this place again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dr. Sophia Thomas (Hayia Sophia)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXY6wwDTdAHz81cANWR-2zva9mYTeSFdV74pHZXs0XBwOKhfc8Lfg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried this Gyro Shop last night, and we were pleasantly surprised! I had the chicken gyro platter, and my partner went with the chicken gyro on pita. First off—portion sizes are on point. The platter easily stretched into two meals, and the sandwich was the perfect size—filling without being overwhelming.

We both loved the spicy sauce—don’t be fooled by the name, though. It’s more flavorful than fire. The chicken was well-seasoned, everything tasted fresh, and the staff was friendly and quick.

Definitely worth a visit if you’re in the area and craving something satisfying.

We’ll be back!

#HayiaSophia #SupportLocalEats","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw7ebKsgE&fid=0x0:0xb9285fd2c53b48b4"],"When":"2025-3-27"},{"Name":"Daniel Koontz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmigEBH35FVi71vwGz9vi58IzAWTMPNl8XKC1Q01FzB89RhbI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been here many many times over the past year. Fantastic each time. Delicious. Have brought my wife, Mom, and coworkers here as well as brought others take out from here as well. Lots of food in each item such that a single meal lasts 2.
10/10 will eat here again :D","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Frank N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPJQKG7oFcsMWMhJBMVyr-MMMI3g1WaLgN_BSiNQ_cCy01IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5/10/25: This was our first visit. I went with my neighbor and his son for lunch. The restaurant wasn't very busy. It was super clean. You place your order at the counter, and they bring the food to you. Customer service is top notch. The food was prepared fresh, and was really good.  Prices were very reasonable, and I would definitely stop by again. There was plenty of parking outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAODlojyoox_1iX5MrQBsll&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Nathan Hoxie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMdrIBqkr4yV2zCsxAinCypy5ULuIXp6Lyqkj4eXTNTRGrq2E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Get the Döner Kebab! This is the real deal, the German street food I've been looking for in the area for almost 20 years. Sure, other places have tried and come close, but something has never been quite right. Soulard does it right! Sammie is originally from Germany and his family is still over there. He's brought his restaurant down to Texas after establishing and expanding in St. Louis since 2009.

The scharf sauce is on point and you can tell the meat is marinated with the correct Turkish spices. They know exactly how a Döner should taste and they absolutely nail it!

I'm going to become a regular here, for sure. Loved getting to dredge up my German and speak with Sammie briefly while he was making my food. I wish this business the best and hope they will become a local favorite, I know I'm hooked!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBshoFSqEFnMhHdDF0A4OrU&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Paulie Cho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvW9mcXH6BGKieB0U5DovGruXQNfy88tH1Vwzx3ElAOqmqbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I discovered this place this week and already went twice! The doner kebab is amazing! I recently came back from a trip to Germany where I got to try some amazing doner kebabs and was really craving them since I’ve come back to the states.
This place has been just as good and dare I say even better in some aspects than places I’ve tried abroad. One part that stands out is the bread. Love how fresh and delicious it is!
I would definitely recommend trying it out and getting the greek fries along with it.

The owner is awesome and kind! Just ate it again last night and am looking forward to next time already.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCeHIDb4qwmWIgT_sMCmlg&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"S Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDnjwuGCmGHcmGHrynJVzJ5rm--b2t4Nkifn9oNKQRVwt8VGY7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My parents picked up doner kebab and kebab bowls from here and it is absolutely the best Greek/ Mediterranean food in the Dallas area! I'm sad I don't live closer because I would go there very often. Many Mediterranean places use too much salt but here, you really treasure the flavor and they have a unique style of bread for their gyros, so if you're looking for something new I would highly recommend eating here! According to my parents the owner also works there and is a very warm and welcoming person.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATLMizVk2FUn9GMiQ9Fnbi&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Nicole Vogt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmdsmrduBVxVsZsJpwsIVxva2JotzLaMM3hZu7mBJC9btClLZ1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you've been craving a German döner kebab, look no further. Come visit Soulard Gyro! The owner is from Germany, so this is a authentic as it gets. I enjoyed every bite! The greek fries and chocolate baklava were so good too. My friend had the Gyro and said it was delicious as well. Can you really go wrong with meat cooked on a spit? Not in my book. The service was amazing. Pay at the counter and they make it fresh & bring it to the table. Highly recommend. I'll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWGJWgtYFQrgBRjk9Haa2X&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Katie Hart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUTtSPvkyZv7Mu7zGbKUJMVOBmiPDqyKBaxPf4CXPzdPXHTsYS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is fantastic, we will be back very soon. Classic gyro was excellent, my true and new favorite in the Plano North Dallas area. Owner took incredible care of us and we loved the chocolate baklava. Absolutely worth a try, cannot miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVHdX2Y9_RYJmSzZ6hL5aR&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Caitlyn Neff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUSV7SSYCwTbVNAzGLZMHuDkr4iPch_xAdpt2rbENMvyvURA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just finished eating here and I had to leave a review for how amazing it was. Food is so spot on and flavorful and fresh-you can tell the quality and care that goes into everything. The owner was so nice and gracious and we chatted about Greek food for a bit which was lovely. If I could give more stars I would. We had the veggie gyro, the falafel wrap and split the Greek fries-all were absolutely delicious! We’ll be back soon because I’ll be dreaming about that veggie gyro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"T Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOwxCEHbqPIYuTmKcAvcBpQtdE5h7VyMDH6aTQU0gXn9kLCe4m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time dining here because I suddenly was craving a German doner kebab. The moment I stepped in, the owner took my order and said that he’s from Germany, I knew i came to the right place.

My doner kebab tasted exactly the same like the one I had in eastern europe. The pita is crunch and there’s load of gyro!! I’m so happy I found this hidden gem, will be back!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuJhNaDAbovKmT07RC2OSo&fid=0x0:0x744d7b91f89b192f"],"When":"2025-10-9"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"N C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBDDxgG4QO4WRi8WWCBrovVzqzdY0I4zpH3CIrk0WY2Mk7I4Lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the combo platter. Lamb and chicken tasted good. Very flavorful and not too salty or greasy. Portion size was great. They did not skimp on meat or rice. Also got the lamb gyro fries.  Flavorful and fries were crispy. Definitely more than enough food for 2 people.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcxaUKcSpSmZ94lwZ9L3VG&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Zeeshan Malik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPlHFlllYxIM8-ocLCkxcdEACIXkQq_pz9_eJoMcMbtbCO8l-r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The restaurant is a bit quiet, shout out to the female server who is usually the one working non stop filling out to-go orders - the chapli kabob platter is Amazing! I drive nearly a half hour to get it at least once a week! AMAAAAZING!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjZB7APfmW3VM7jJaHj_cp&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Omsai Aindala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDR0P23GukYEv1-lDVgMa2_Z-UnC5_lbjFGrg1Wzcf7HvJUK0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited this gyro spot and was genuinely impressed especially with their lamb gyro rice bowl. The portion size was more than generous definitely great value for the price. The bowl came packed with perfectly cooked rice and a hearty serving of meat that was juicy, flavorful and seasoned just right. Every bite had a satisfying balance of spices and you could really taste the quality and care that went into the preparation.

What stood out most was how tender and succulent the meat was not dry or overcooked like you sometimes find at similar places. The rice was good and complemented the meat beautifully. They also included just the right amount of sauce to enhance the flavor without overpowering it.

The service was quick and friendly and the food was hot and fresh. This place clearly takes pride in what they serve. It’s not just fast food but a comfort food done right.

If you’re craving something filling, flavorful, and satisfying the lamb rice bowl here is a must try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMZuZ3ioNET-eC79cEGWCx&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"Ahmed Siddiqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDLfuB95quDvizJrsk4O9gXKYhc1KVosaySC7aTfZTbyJeNxQS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Gyro Shop is legit one of the best spots around if you want quality food without breaking the bank. They always give you a generous portion—never skimpy—and the quality is consistently solid. Their gyros, especially the gyro with rice, are straight-up delicious and packed with flavor. Perfect balance of tender meat, fresh veggies, and that tasty sauce.

What really makes this place stand out is the vibe. The owner and staff are super friendly and welcoming, making every visit feel personal. The spot itself is clean and comfortable, a great place to grab a quick, satisfying meal.

Prices are fair for what you get, which makes it easy to come back again and again. If you’re looking for a reliable place with good food, great portions, and genuinely nice people running the show, the Gyro Shop is a must-try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA79diaTNY6nuwu-cS6dvnE&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"RS P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdMOq9YEfK-LiU-EVLDlCiCaonOA-y7jI5orVy1M0-WUxMtaIOww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As be plant based girl the falafel plater is amazing! Just no white sauce and Bon Appétit! Crinkle fries are my favorite as well! With hot sauce 🤤","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBoBQB-hEB9sIBvdOilsC4D&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Nawaaf Taswaar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYco9NvIxogo8BTO8ANYxQ-_5v1sx-RZsioiIauOuCCHRepQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love this place. The food is always fresh, flavorful, and well-portioned. The gyro meat is perfectly seasoned, and the sauces take it to another level. The staff is friendly and welcoming, and the atmosphere is clean and comfortable. You can really tell they care about quality and customer service. Easily one of the best gyro spots in Plano. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMeGHpnp29QO6Rzns-yvpxM-LCaMmB-5hO-27AbX_HroZsVGfllA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My kids love this place! So do I. This is a casual restaurant that does reasonable priced gyro platters and sandwiches. The food is delicious and seems healthier than traditional fast food. We like this better than halal guys. Did I mention how reasonably priced this place is? I also love supporting local businesses. Try this place!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeffrey C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXal87YDMrWymG8kdbvbX7j2yXYMu0pk35XrkTbG6N7yxAfC_Cu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Little hole in the wall. Quick service as I was grabbing a quick lunch.

Food taste fresh - sometimes kabob platters can be dry. Think it’s just perfect for me as the vegetables tasted fresh. Sauce were pretty balance and not overwhelming. Would recommend if you need a quick bite.

Portions definitely enough for 1.5 person. One order will have left overs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4Wa9n-XpL8GWnL5nYFgWH&fid=0x0:0x88920c6aa2f79402"],"When":"2025-8-12"}]

[{"Name":"Guy Charles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcngPex9F6q3h95OTm120Z_9bD6KecIhcsuZIveUGHUItzrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So happy to discover this new gem!  There’s always something that does the heart well when you get to eat amazing food that can match the incredible friendly personality of a passionate owner!! Ali is the freaking man!  We enjoyed the chicken Shawarma plate (truly incredible) and the super moist chicken kebab plate and had some of their amazing baklava. We will definitely be back soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5RnRBFe7cSI6PIJ4V-Ksb&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Rick Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOHgEsDCLBAMckctyqXvkEHUTd-VUqXogt7Zsw7c_u3RxLwVCW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried Shami’s Mediterranean Grill in Plano for the first time, and it was excellent. I had the mixed grill plate with two lamb kofta kebabs, a grilled jalapeño, and charred tomato and onion, plus a fresh cucumber salad and delicious garlic-hummus sauce.

Sitting outside on a mild November night made the meal even better. The owner was extremely friendly and helpful, and the kitchen staff was great too.

I’m already looking forward to going back. Highly recommend Shami’s for super-fresh, healthy Mediterranean flavors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhACj8YMK-ff5XjsVptNPyel&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Rami Basatneh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWTHRtmbc-cqJmo_TjLFRKQbcku4fvovNkmKa33GD97hIByVK2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for truly authentic Syrian food in DFW, look no further. This spot has hands-down some of the best broasted chicken I’ve had in the U.S., crispy on the outside, perfectly juicy on the inside, and seasoned exactly the way it’s supposed to be.

But the star of the show? The garlic sauce. It’s the closest I’ve tasted to what you’d get in Syria, smooth, fluffy, and packed with that bold garlic flavor we grew up with. You can tell it’s made the right way, not the shortcut versions most places use.

Portions are generous, service is warm, and the whole place has that familiar, home-style feel. Plano is lucky to have a restaurant like this. If you miss real Syrian broasted chicken, this is the place. Absolutely phenomenal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqwZj7sLVHIb0sCBK7MzRp&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Abram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4HC1HyxWvqtas6U3c3xDaBYxPL2vlviNLVM7TTkOwPJpqdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Five stars! The food was absolutely fantastic, every dish was packed with flavor. To top it off, the service was perfect. The staff was attentive, friendly, and made us feel right at home. We will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBPd3mOBzWtWa14o376_QOP&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Nadine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJLQerSclFOFaYdwOVkMO0J11Uz7Hj8kR9BTFNPJBe3bSGJIKVwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic Damascan food for a reasonable price. The hummus is homemade and all of the food is fresh. The owner is very friendly and welcoming. The dining area is very open and clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD29rLGgxncD9S9sqRWovUl&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"JJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8xZuZTjPBXCQABFT8BQsXFqycAFQKXhSKp8S_R9ffDNrYLUrd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a nice and chill spot. The restaurant is clean, organized, and well kept. I had the chicken shawarma with salad, humus, and yogurt drink! The food was fresh and well seasoned. The portions are generous for the price. The owner prepared and cooked the food. It was a welcoming and friendly experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6TEps-_2JRJr2PA6agORW&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Clayton Flippen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhF19hftZ8WpFla2xogiqei3UMVnvOyp5HZBSVXxKP9c3lxg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is awesome!!!  I had never eaten at a place like this before, and the owner personally helped me get my order. Perfect! I was looking for a high protein low-calorie meal, and he made the perfect recommendation. I left filling full and 100% satisfied.  I highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTzckMlJNP5-YBlgo9HCgB&fid=0x0:0xc521750cc07f32e4"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Kamran Siddiqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3J6PP8SEd9mrOoSU3dltgESQjuoTPzABY0S6rVBa9w9gCvGbU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Saw a review on Dallas Halal Buzz Facebook Group, decided to stop by. [{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbeRxm1wsCgIYaSJXB-GNZQ-dt7mYDvd6x4yipbjmVcHVSoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you're craving this type of food, then it's a pretty decent spot. The workers are nice and the portions are pretty big. Feel like the meat quality went down just a tad lately but nothing better in the vicinity. The restaurant is pretty bare, though, so don't expect anything other then the food ordered.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxSypMIL3hjafLsJHVuuEQ&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Eli_Quinn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrgNPID63Rsz6vaiV55egs4rMYT0djJjvXubWnhj3j1ngSDyo-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best shawarma in town! Me and my family have been coming for years, the staff are so nice, and the food is fantastic!! I go every week, sometimes multiple times!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmzGewblwwerMGQsE1LClC&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Ryan G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOUy2WMDN24XSvjtvsTtUtYGZrlgb1mCN_UDNL-uG6LRtgwmM-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went in for dinner because a gyro sounded good. Got a gyro combo with fries and a drink, plus some dolmas/grape leaves and baklava to take home. The gyro wasn't bad but it was the smallest and saddest I have ever been served. There was literally more pita than there was meat. See the pic below. The fries actually came out a few minutes after the gyro, which I thought was odd but whatever. They were ok, and at least there was a good amount of them. There is no fountain drink machine so you'll have to make do with a can of soda from the cooler.

I brought the dolmas home for later but I was still hungry so I decided to try them. I was hoping they'd be good, but they were terrible, they were hard and I got the impression they'd been sitting around for a while. One bite was enough to know I was not going to eat them. The baklava was decent, but like the gyro, was small.

It was 25 bucks for all that and it was definitely not worth the money. I would avoid this place. Not a soul came in while I was there, so it seems like the word is already out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcm3YtGCC4v8Mrz1dKCXAz&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Ommeid Hosseinalikhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-f1cRbhKAYcNKi11fAqk5CB-KuBAf3d36lEkvPo5Ami6Z9qUp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Warning to hungry customers: this place has quietly changed its menu.

I've visited a total of five times, purely out of convenience since it's within walking distance from home — though I'm aware of at least three similar spots nearby with equally good or better food.

The first three visits were mediocre at best. No complaints worth writing about; it served its purpose and the prices were fair.

The last two visits, however, told a different story. The same order now costs 30–40% more, framed as a "combo" — but in reality it feels like the kitchen cutting corners. Platters no longer come with rice by default. You have to specifically request it, and even then I received meat, fries, and a pita. Rice is a staple for this type of cuisine — it shouldn't be an afterthought.

When my order came back without rice at the same price I paid two or three months ago, that was enough.

They've lost my families' business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexis Azzoune","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQyYZE418QaCmUJQQop2tsyWq25Jw8Cuf8Qvem6LnKq6mhVXur=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I eat at pita town pretty regularly, and the food quality is consistently great. It’s fresh, portion sizes are big, and the new owners are extremely kind and welcoming! One of the best shawarma places in DFW, and they have the BEST fries I’ve ever had. 😋 highly recommend Pita Town!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRyMENJ0Fn2M4IucJXXwWS&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Wolfgang Willems","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvEsO-VC6h-x_oKV2U1vb2b91fKQ42-mhqmYUJTH30FV5A6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Since I'm from Germany, I know a thing or two about good pita. This is the best place for miles around. The food is delicious and the staff extremely friendly. When I come with my whole family, they sometimes even give me a little something for free. Where else can you find something like that?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDJrFuCC4qUXGY1uPJE9Kf&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Priya Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrRhAUokAEvc3rdU7fGSr9wykn7ygN11xjaIbkazS0Yu3rgj0E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We used to visit this place regularly every month. Previously, the quality and quantity were superb. However, after the change in ownership, everything has changed. The quality and quantity have both gone down drastically — it’s just not worth it anymore.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlpKm9dpu_cIJ0v2GaiUVn&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Yousuf Nema","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBpF22B5ZDmnSFViHCme2OIgj_db-P-8ZSqwY3Oc16qzDTHW-2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing service and tasty food! had the whole chicken and shawarma, both were great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5nqG5U4zVu-0wcIyhaXCl&fid=0x0:0x61fa5ab50016cfb5"],"When":"2026-1-5"}]

[{"Name":"Andre Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN_rwezUfhKpM8zJBPcjTDoQ0FrMqa9e_GuD8Ep63HUfi15A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great spot with amazing food!!! We stopped in for dinner and were warmly greeted and placed our order. We grabbed a box of dominoes they had and played a couple hands until our food arrived. It took less than 10 minutes and when it arrived it was a feast for our eyes!! And just as
Anticipated, it tasted even better! So much flavor and the veggies were fresh! The flavors were amazing. Sooo good! I had a gyro, wife and daughter n law ordered bowls. Everyone loved every bite. I will surely return! Highly recommended!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbg--0zcgiH1IdATOlXIo-&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"CP Nayak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoO7wQ5lCn0NoYM3TgAev2EpHYXtyrHvXDT5mrSumSo3WrI6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited Spitz Mediterranean and ordered the Street Cart Wrap Combo with chicken. The wrap was packed with flavor, and the chicken was juicy, tender, and well-seasoned. Every bite felt fresh and satisfying.
I chose the fried pita strips with hummus as my side, and they were perfectly crispy and paired really well with the creamy hummus.
Overall, I really enjoyed the food and the quality. Great spot for flavorful Mediterranean street-style food, and I’d definitely come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAz30Mmk0jDlJEFHCMSDit_&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Ethan Neves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPN-JqKSt5pNx7th1uM1BtcO_cfp1d2nRXY1S8BmmIj3LuEIn9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the mixed wrap combo with a side of sweet potato waffle fries. Wrap was very tasty and the fries had a good crunch to them. They had bottles of garlic aoli available as well. The sauce that came with the fries was a nice touch. Large portions and very filling.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtxinnGi_BLVsDM67Eghm6&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Laura isabel Valderrama ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfJjS497DRAnbICb7PSJLI-dqiN3CpFndgX4LAAzVNbWQN7kiN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve eaten here several times and the food is always delicious—especially the gyros. They also have good vegetarian options. The fries are tasty, but the sweet potato fries are definitely the best!

The place is casual and welcoming, and it’s a spot we keep coming back to when we want something quick and satisfying. Definitely recommend giving it a try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvbpYAE9shr9egut49xWQX&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Brian Gan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-pC9hWBYPd6LFvssfI1c3KZG6VkhWektog94KN7r8kKWs-E86=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a promo offer to try out some restaurants in Plano and my wife and I decided to try out the Spitz. We came for a very late lunch and we came away very impressed with the quality of the wraps, the French fries and especially the fried pita side. The staff was very patient as it was our first time here and we really enjoyed the food and the restaurant atmosphere. We will definitely be back to try out more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuvtl-kyMNc3EMh2mh0OKt&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"SharBebe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnqo5WhGbvjZQisem488fy6UHpngOARM--8md6WOCEiz7_ITEH9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love coming here the wraps are delicious with just the right amount of meat to bread and the regular fries and waffle fries are amazing with just the right amount of crunch. This time around we tried the gyro wrap and it was so yummy & full of flavor. We like the laid back vibes & colorful ambience and they also have the cutest cozy patio. This is the location in Plano. Service was good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5VwYjts1v1IH647alhya_&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Shayan Bokhari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF-JiBQlbHEJkyONO5J8uvRGrXIKTT6ps7Io1rksbCj27CS1h0-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My wife fell ill immediately after eating here, and several other reviews report the same issue. Food safety seems poorly managed, so proceed with caution.

The doner itself is very dry, all the vegetables taste very stale and hard, the sauces are very bland.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmMxV5R40NZ4M_cJJEicqP&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Jessica Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVopCXDiCbgLISbUlMBSyoK-ATGqiXbQrx7uvuzs9dKxRhmYBle=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The fries and the wrap were amazing. I would go here everyday if I lived closer. The staff was really nice and the food came out quickly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAzo8Gax21gF8JCrbd1Xxn&fid=0x0:0xb1be23c51e932db6"],"When":"2026-2-2"}]

[{"Name":"Jahidul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmh4_b4iQZO7yA7dN7xFAueQRyRmUdOS0_Lp7FGqlrj_PiuX4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience at Chop House Gyro! The Manhattan Style Gyro was absolutely delicious – it reminded me of the authentic gyros I’ve had in New York. Fresh ingredients, flavorful sauces, and generous portions made it a real treat.

It’s also worth noting that the ownership recently changed just a few weeks ago. The new owner is putting in his best effort to make this a better place for customers, and it really shows. The restaurant is clean, modern, and welcoming, with a cozy atmosphere that makes you want to stay a little longer.

Most of all, the owner was extremely kind and welcoming, which made our visit even more special. We’ll definitely be coming back and highly recommend it to others!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJFpa4oAmosBU3pLPLf53z&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Deanna Chiappone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDBQ0SzPDyPpwN0f13cMGbYtYf54d4uc2PSZ5XOTN2wE4TSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was craving some Gyro and found myself here for lunch. The staff were wonderful and helped me pick out a Medium spice level gyro bowl. It was delicious. Just enough spice to get the blood pumping and clear the sinus while enjoying a mouthful of flavor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBthO5Lxjbd8cPI7vTiOdd9&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Fahim Mahmud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLjamjhgDzfiTa8n-9ud7TXdKwNG1Ux0-fplnEVYXbSXRw_dVs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely fantastic experience at this halal gyro shop! The gyro is out of this world—perfectly seasoned and so flavorful. And I have to say, their burger is just as amazing—juicy, fresh, and full of flavor. The staff is super friendly, and the place has a great vibe. Highly recommend it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKygxQcsrRaz3ZPuVz4YIl0FsQBfidHu8-5lxnfkvk8mlCDyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has the best wings I’ve ever tried. It’s not their main cuisine, obviously, but they are a must-try. They’re just cooked perfectly - breading nice and crisp with a bit of heat, and the chicken is still juicy.

This place is excellent. We’ve ordered several times through delivery apps & gone in person. It’s fantastic every time. The quality, portions, menu options, pricing, everything is perfect. I typically order the Manhattan style rice bowl (which has both gyro and chicken), and it’s one of my favorite meals at this point. The portion size is enough for two meals (for me at least) and being in aluminum packaging makes it super easy to reheat in the oven.

I genuinely have no complaints or suggestions for improvement. If you’re in Plano, Chop House Gyro is delicious & will not disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv9cjziAE&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2024-12-22"},{"Name":"Mahmoud Albouidani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsB36THq5BMClrHVwqsO5p427Zf5vqFPloIgL-4C_H6m3c2AM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Food and Great Portions!
I had a great experience eating here. The food was fresh, flavorful, and served in generous portions. The yellow rice was perfectly cooked, the meat was juicy and well-seasoned, and the salad was crisp and refreshing. The service was fast and the place was clean and simple — exactly what you need for a quick and tasty meal. Highly recommended for anyone craving delicious Middle Eastern or Mediterranean flavors!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIrX8_jDqbiVhAE&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2025-5-25"},{"Name":"Dinis Celonenco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUd5THdXBHGQ5bjmA6uUhE14ITqIjvCRKrdqbRwilBEsi9gey0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing experience at Chop House Gyro! We tried the shawarma, fries, and tenders, and everything was delicious. The shawarma was packed with flavor, perfectly spiced, and super tender. The fries were crispy and golden, just the way we like them, and the tenders were juicy with a perfect crunch. Beyond the fantastic food, the service was top-notch. Because our  food was little late we got an amazing rice bowl!
staff was friendly, attentive, and made us feel right at home. Definitely a spot we’ll be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXpsaRZQ&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2024-10-26"},{"Name":"Bianca di Angelo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw5l3Bv3iwPaH10dT4cVCUQoYYS1xYPCDHCHldO1byr5Jtk5daNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here on a whim and it’s honestly going to become my new go to place!! It’s so good!! Good price for the portions, the wrap was phenomenal and fries were nice and crispy and to top it off the young lady at the register was super sweet. I 100% recommend this place!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joys Dallas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLlUoC1z7DI5FQCfOh3En2MjuntrPJ6hud2N3TUHpwPXY1ipo3pw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was driving by and have been wanting to try this Gyro place for a while. All of my food was fresh and hot. The pita bread taste fresh off the grill and the hummus had the right amount of spice to it. I’m so disappointed in myself because I ate all of my food before I realized I did not take a picture. The gentleman recommended the chicken masala, and boy you did not disappoint. Oh my God it tasted divine, flavorful, and I loved the salad on the side the rice was piping hot, and the chickpeas were cooked to perfection. I will definitely be back here again for lunch. This was a stand out meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJkvyDugE&fid=0x0:0x71ea7985aa3d6414"],"When":"2023-7-13"}]

[{"Name":"RAUF ASLAM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDgkIuuzBKkdqys1KihbK7yMy0BP8Ms1wL45Zg1uzXrdB3pFUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After a cold night of watching Christmas lights, we found this hidden gem. Our server was great and welcoming. Started out with some hot lentel soup which really hit the spot and calmed out shivering bodies down. Everyone's main course was amazing with rice and meats & veggies. Hummus and baba ganoush was very good too. After the meal we were served with complimentary hot Turkish drink and we ordered some Baklava to sweeten things up. All and all, it was a wonderful experience. Restaurant was nice and clean and well lit and beautifully decorated. I highly recommend you visit this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBh_D2BZUxwXzsGt2MPfV90&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Pallavi Karnam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQItMk6-jVZQQfqUBoj32L-iP2YvhvYwH8NWnbTnTea13ua1lP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and good atmosphere.. lovely decor with Turkish lights. We were given complimentary pink hummus and pita to try and then tea also towards the end.
Definitely get the baklava! We were too full from food but these were small treats and glad we got them.
They do have a variety of coffees and teas and also open late. Could be a nice place to hang out or study or even work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnmy4nwcD3M_EDvq7WaEtK&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Cazel Mirabile","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLqlPx7dORZbF5rxFrynqQ3XSGYhV34-hXiXR2F7zNWn3tuI9-zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pita Shawarma is a Hidden Gem Worth Talking About

My husband and I stopped by Pita Shawarma today, and we were blown away from the moment we walked in.

The food was fantastic, hot, fresh, full of flavor, and clearly made with care. Every dish tasted like real Mediterranean home-cooking, the kind you can not fake. But what made the experience unforgettable was the service. Oz, the manager, was outstanding. She personally took our order, brought our food to the table, checked on us throughout the meal, and made us feel genuinely welcome. The entire restaurant was spotless and well-run, and the hospitality felt effortless and sincere.

And the best part? They surprised us with complimentary Turkish tea, which was the perfect cozy, thoughtful touch to end our meal. My husband and I will definitely be back, and we will be telling friends and family to try it too. Pita Shawarma is a gem.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAG5JsG2P1m6-Kfx6x2VEEf&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"Josh McPhail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvDY4MVVyFK1aZG64CYPPvxYR15vy59WSCTa0jop9I5DqQKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met the owner Mahmoud by chance at the restaurant he is opening in Dallas “Maestro” Well, it is not open yet. He told me about this place in Plano so I had to check it out.  Just finished the chicken Shawarma combo and it was amazing, but I am stuffed. Wael, The gentleman working was very attentive and making sure everything was perfect and I have zero complaints. I can’t believe that at 1 o’clock this place was empty so I highly recommend checking it out because not only do you get great service and great food but it is nice to see local small business thrive and this place, definitely deserves to","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPpAGaOzY-tKcQ_8-3AA3J&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Hil T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzFesIaLEjwl2LYc17WucohAiLSHPlTZydj_kCb94eXPzyi-wU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very impressed with my first visit to Pita Shawarma in Plano. The ambience in the restaurant is beautiful, very clean and well-lit. Good place to comfortable dining after long day at work. I ordered the Chicken Shawarma Wrap, Greek Fires and Baba Ganoush which was simply delicious. There are lots of parking options right outside the restaurant making my visit hassle free. I will definitely stop by in the future to try the hummus next.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfkEFEFfOO_pcvvKZteeWj&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"amar uppu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5J6tiSY3yfBus3jaCNcUJASYQSuI7scJUagqbSFh0YIp1ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience dining here. The food was good, but what really stood out was the service. One of the restaurant team indian lady was very friendly, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect throughout the meal.
They checked on us at the right times and made us feel welcome and comfortable.
Great customer service like this makes the experience even better. I will definitely come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Akari Ohno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUl3WWXEfFAutgfjE1SdfxS6trI17mageaAd13MIQdAfZnaOZtzeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing, my 5 yr old kid loved Falafel and rice on the Plate of mixed shawarma. Lamps are cute, and relaxed atmosphere. Price is reasonable. Would love to come back soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3cwe8vVVyUmdvkbOxv8zk&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Rick Abraham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHM4AVHq9zPKPQVMWu89qTs0y-RIx2UzbsKe1LRT94sOMl33qU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to this place because of the 4.8 rating. This place needs to be 5.0. It's clean, the food was fantastic, but Oz, she made the meal perfect. She was very friendly and we even had our fortunes read from the coffee. We will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyXfJNqeXMjiUOVITtbj7F&fid=0x0:0x20f6e2cb083f3f61"],"When":"2025-11-15"}]

[{"Name":"Jr. Carlos Nava","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInYiRd1TqfXFHxDobplCqSyz-IAjexUBfUETcA1TUmUdKFQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I came to the area to pick up some watches we were having serviced. OMG! What a play Darna is. The food was fresh and delicious. The fresh piping hot pita, wow!

Josh, our server was very helpful and nice as all get out. You guys would be doing yourself a favor coming to eat Herr. Did I mention the cocktails and cappuccino were top notch? They are.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoqtoyk277JkXeWplIe65E&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"Sana Hye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsDVreH4jjVzPnfU44EgC9MNuvlhMonRBsG13WnGun_NLm-ZZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant has a beautiful atmosphere—well decorated, clean, and clearly well maintained. The service was excellent from start to finish. The Mediterranean food was good and the portions were decent, but for the price point, it wasn’t the best I’ve had. Ordered Moroccan tea which also came cold. The quality didn’t quite feel reflective of the cost. That said, the location is lovely, and I appreciated seeing halal certification clearly displayed, which is a big plus. Overall, I really enjoyed the experience and would return, but it is definitely on the pricey side for what you get.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANc8OlbXgfa4A0bPdi38RZ&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"G Lock","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeoOLnx4ZQLwo60V6gIhi6F6X80DvvPEMFx0KIUGhoyEwzAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Daya was great helping us with the menu and checking up on us. She made Darna a great experience, being our first time. The food was amazing and can't wait to come back and try something different!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChn2XZG0Qbr02LTXMVRFjM&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Jakii","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUX6_6VINLYUt64ZbiRQh0wHyIgyHoR17u_1YgSTgAB_g71WZY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere is amazing. The staff were attentive and well knowledgeable and recommended great options for my coworkers and I to try. I'm a very picky eater but this food was 10 out of 10!!! I had the chicken kabobs and OMG very tender, juicy paired perfectly with basmati rice and arugula salad,❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
We will be back for our business lunch!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAq2SFnDv2AjVUBqgtm9rte&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Mr V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcupjnwuCuoxbyJSoK20XnrogrQZSO5sBJiSQvu4RY4oW8gsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The place offers a warm and welcoming ambiance with a true fine dining experience, though there’s still room for improvement.

The hummus platter stands out with its variety — especially the Muhammara, which absolutely hits the bull’s eye. It’s unique in flavor and clearly a chef’s specialty, perfectly paired with the fresh bread.

The chicken kabob with saffron rice, however, was just average. While the chicken was cooked well, it lacked depth of flavor and didn’t leave much of an impression.

The pistachio dessert was overly sweet, to the point of being difficult to enjoy.

Overall, it was an okay experience. I’ll definitely return for the Muhammara, but nothing else particularly draws me back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoKFvUGykD_U-V5WwyNzaW&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"multitraveller20","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJBk10wNlQa1H3B2F8YslY_EOyIr3tXJB0b2OzE-RXyOGY7X_J9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely fantastic restaurant, the food was fresh and delicious. I ate so much, I couldn't stop eating. The goats cheese cigars OMGOSH! The cauliflower 😍 Oh and you have to get some Moroccan tea ☕ Thank you Camilla for A* service, we enjoyed ourselves and plan to be back very soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuiIp7t_QhFYzLeKr2qDjd&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Jessie Cintron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgHvNcacFqCFkE9_kKrODva6RTBIKUruMbuOg-PBalzMhraUg3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Darna Mediterranean Eatery at Legacy West is a true gem! We started with their appetizers – the hummus, falafel, and salad were all fresh, flavorful, and absolutely delicious. For lunch, I had the Lamb Kofta, and it was outstanding – perfectly seasoned, tender, and grilled over wood, giving it that amazing charred flavor you just can’t beat.

To round it all out, I finished with a latte and their pistachio baklava… the perfect sweet ending to an incredible meal. The atmosphere, the food, and the overall experience were top notch. Can’t wait to come back here again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhIjSJGNn848PhCAVgm4cz&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Riya Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNlE0uwkAvt2GjyS-N6KboI800hrjtY9at9ksvUihOybWrZS0L=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We’ve been to Darna multiple times, but this time the food experience was just okay. They’ve changed the menu, and the vegetarian options felt quite limited.
However, our server Rubina was incredibly sweet and interactive—she truly made us feel comfortable and well taken care of. ✨🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnOHOTqf0b7f0-XBmOsPv-&fid=0x0:0xc808a76462bca461"],"When":"2025-12-16"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carter Helmcamp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFko9Cj2rch3dUMeYrvO7HCoSNXr6tqbseZIoQ3m0mYf4Ziw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A true MUST have. The energy feels like you’re going to a family home for some real authentic Greek food. I typically get the original Greek platter and share between 2 people. The Portokalopita dessert is life changing. I can’t recommend this place enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4Tra2d93c280UORd2jxla&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Benjamin Schadrac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJn7nldnftlrCHShUZuccVMaDGeReGKZmluGv0w_Vaa_hM16Df9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a pleasant experience here. At first, I was going to one of the two other restaurants nearby. However, as a trucker, I need to eat healthy PLUS I LOVE MEDITERRANEAN FOOD!
The owner, a beautiful blonde hair lady, with the kindest eyes, helped me with the menu. I got some meatballs (don’t remember the name but she said it so beautifully) and added some green beans. Delicious meal! Not too heavy and perfect amount.
Now here’s the best part! As I was waiting for my meal, I saw the desserts. Now I LOVE me some rice pudding y’all! So when I opened up my bag and saw that she had gifted me that, I was like 🥹😭! I’ve def added that restaurant as my fav, for the next time I role through town.
Thank you so much for the warm welcome, your generosity and amazing customer service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwjPLEyQE&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"Amethyst Skwarek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR5UTp9mhHVCmQgbeEJPsV23-0tI5Ipnq1hTdi6p1d0ip2hgHvLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DELISH AND GLUTEN FREE YAY
owners and waitress were the sweetest. will be coming here regularly!! lovely lamb!! gluten free pita!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGo8XvkQuhRGmilI5sQgXj&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"David Ho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYKTG0uAaz-N_owSv_3umQAGfBME78BTuCcIZe3NWm8KYSIg8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was good but service was slow. Wish there was more gluten free pita for the hummus serving size. Came for lunch and waited a good bit for food to come out and to pay so we could leave. Ended up just going to the register to pay after letting them know i was ready to pay at the table and waiting. we were there for an hour and 10 mins when it should have just been a 30-35 min lunch.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Philip Soonhun Kwon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINuHQiEZwa_riYQCkkAH2jNCWW1Xj9kAX5ek23HvsUhmGIe9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend decided he wanted to try Greek food so we found this place and came for dinner. I want to say that our server was great and patient with us. The place is cute and cozy. We felt very welcomed. I will say, however, that the food was a bit disappointing. Our Greek salad and Greek village salad were very good and probably our favorite course. Simple yet very well done. We also very much enjoyed the Spread Trio, for which we picked the Tzatziki, Tirokafteri, and Melintzanosalata, which were each very distinctive and delicious. Each went well with the pita breat, which were as good as all the other reviews say. We also enjoyed an order of Saganaki. It was good, but the cheese hardened very quickly and was a bit difficult to separate once it did.

Regarding the entrees, that was probably our least faborite parts. The original gyro, which one of my friends ordered, was actually very good and probably among the best I had anywhete. However, I got the grecian chicken and just felt disappointed. The flavor seemed bland and nothing struck me as special or unique about the dish. My other friend ordered the lamb shank, which I almost ordered. I have had great lamb shank elsewhere and know what I like, but my friend told me it tasted bland as well and covered in a boring tomato sauce. Felt like a shame for something with so much potential.

If I were to ever return, I think I would stick with the more widely known dishes like salads and gyro platters. I also saw great things on reviews about their desserts, which we unfortunately were not able to try, so I would love to. Some of the specials on their menu, we just didn't enjoy so much.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPvrL14gE&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"Gina Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjyYEnUOkhIQPl_w6VlTl6U3NZnp2Dvw7xEED1vg271qG2iyGrDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Possibly my favorite restaurant in DFW. The service is always amazing, the food is perfect (Greek kissed by Texas - they offer Chicken Gyros) and quiet in off hours but popping with locals (enjoying the BYOB policy) on the weekends. It is the perfect local joint with really great, mom's Greek kitchen appeal. Go - often and never forget to grab a slice of Baklava Cheesecake for  the road.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBce3bB4u7u7r1mvPXYs9Oo&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"james spencer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBRmUSxf3nZJ7GZlTAEGFTm6YfDyQeKh-Jy0Pvd4HbeIXX5dOi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I found this place while exploring as part of our adventures in dinning. Awesome is the best way to describe it. It is now my favorite place to eat.

I rarely say you must try it however you simply must add this place to your list.

I had the prime rib and my wife had lamb chops. The prime rib was delicious and so we're the lamb chops. However I loved the lamb chops slightly more and can easily say that they were the best I have tasted so far.

The desert was the best. In fact I now have a favorite dessert. You cannot get them anywhere else as the owners wife makes them in house. I wish I could remember the name. I had the strawberry one and my wife the chocolate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTp8L20QE&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2024-5-28"},{"Name":"Chad A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVX5B3iK_GB7UXymb7Mc0b5LmufDcw1XQgY8UEMfN-PvGuoasMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of our favorite Mediterranean restaurants. From appetizers to entrees it's always delicious. This trip I opted for a vegetarian plate which includes spanakopita, hummus and peeta, falafel, domas, green beans stewed with tomatoes and a Greek salad. We also got the dip sampler. The grill plates are always popular with my family as well gyro and kabobs. There are moussaka is also amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvgk2hyyniD90LpLsk2o_U&fid=0x0:0x2f07e282b2a26d1a"],"When":"2025-12-30"}]

[{"Name":"Kim Billings","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7_8kL1knqd0pxfLBoRXX2sZ5-pm3hPTgIbnDk2jhcYKGNVxyi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Luna Grill in Plano was delicious! We ordered the kabobs with rice, hummus, and salad—We had the chicken kabob and shrimp kabob—and everything was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. The chicken was tender and well-seasoned, the shrimp were nicely grilled, and the rice was light and fluffy.

The hummus was creamy and flavorful, paired perfectly with warm pita, and the salad was crisp and refreshing. Portions were generous and the presentation was great.

What really stood out was the service. One employee brought our food directly to the table, and another stopped by to check on us and make sure everything was great and if we needed anything else. Clean, welcoming atmosphere and excellent hospitality.

This is a fantastic spot for a healthy, satisfying Mediterranean meal. We’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdPYQOsZ4vuAYf6b0zmjAw&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Laura Gamboa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuCF5WG_HpHTFqBDXC4SDspcRwPffJfwESxYRn9hoGbANygg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was our first time at Luna Grill Mediterranean Kitchen and we loved it! The service was great, the atmosphere was very pleasant, and the food was delicious. We tried the Pita Crunch and the Medi Macro Bowl and both were amazing! We definitely want to come back soon. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOgq-KlJCzoqrjtRbVm38a&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Local Guide Level 10","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2Xs7iayhAVgAEBEOr-rkLL7xygzHCjvjuf7NtxyqKP35W_X8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately this place needs work! I was so much wanting to love this food but unfortunately they did not deliver! Food was meh! also,  I order some fries and they arrived cold, maybe they were old fries? I asked if they could bring some hot fries out, well it took them over 20 minutes. Like wth you doing to my fries? and just so you know... Fries is 3 minutes in the oil at 350°. Maybe they were giving me the special seasoning because the 2nd batch wasn't much better and after taking so long I didn't trust the fries so just tossed them in the trash! Maybe the owner should watch their cameras throughout the day to see if all their employees are properly performing their job duties. Left disappointed and $50 down the trash! Smh! Do better please!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMMDOzEIypcwczdGoRnrxy&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Fawn Cheng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnioXcXR02UbGHCN7OG5Qlf3KdaE4JJpPHZWsZrpmsg5VRrPmK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just opened. I had the Santorini bowl and pitta and spicy hummus and my bf had the classic chicken pita and the bistro beef kabob. It was delicious!  Service was friendly and super helpful from everyone, including Jamarcus. Nice outdoor patio with umbrellas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC6VYoVhj1s0nviHRuj2pT&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Aaron Hunter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8fUWONnnFb8txxBeaVaMCFsmiSLZCOibB23JNjOKRrF9Zjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"You’re going to spend $55+ to get two poorly portioned plates. Here’s the “bistro filet steak” ($25)
Actual joke of a portion. Separated the meat out for perspective","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWr525FKqA_pYaK3FeKXNo&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Sepiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyQJPt-iG8AiLlRa1mIWf3pQskQxJx4fuv8bPyPKecjeOwl98=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here and wow. The ath
Atmosphere is nice and cozy. The customer service great and also the food. We got the crunch pita and the medi macro bowl and taste great. We will be back here for sure","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-vJ0iNT6DBvDCbJ-yEZF3&fid=0x0:0x6cec8e4e2d7fabbe"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Jean Kennerly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQpgwNinrrV5hdDnDAcQr0yBxAPhM16cjUtywH28ShhcFWSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bryce and Maria are the best hosts!
Definitely will be returning. You have customers for life. My wife and I dine out a lot and we are always so thankful for restaurants that seem to really care.
The food was the best. Tasty , quick and Bryce is quick with a joke .   Keep up the good work and keep an eye out for us again this weekend.

My best
Karl & Jean","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandi Christal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNwXIV-bMwMOr0Mpigp8HCNAfYFbzquGgB75BlqrGq3AF79_Oa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was very delicious with generous portions, plus I got baklava for my birthday! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"A Shaik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiHIBrOGlZgTKg8_dIaVt5WeNpbNM7Tklkkw_j6yrLuNx7nYM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We absolutely love the food at Harissa Mediterranean Restaurant! I ordered the shrimp and kebabs, and my husband got the beef kebabs. Everything was cooked exceptionally well and the flavor was immaculate — you can really tell care goes into every dish.

The bread they bring to the table is delicious and tastes freshly made, which made the whole experience even better. The seating is really nice and comfortable, giving the restaurant an upscale feel without being stuffy.

The prices are very reasonable for food of this quality. It’s so nice to have an upscale Halal meat option in town. We would definitely recommend and will absolutely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0cvNEbnXrvPQa-rV6FqFF&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Bahar Baydere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtaZTBLRPu3iQ33ufYVx-qIaOzSnnvM34xNvS-iZ4At3H8sNs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Harissa with a group of friends to celebrate a birthday, and it was an absolutely wonderful experience. The atmosphere strikes the perfect balance between elegant and comfortable—cozy enough to relax, yet refined enough for a special occasion.

I started with the calamari fritti, which was exceptional. It was perfectly crispy, not soggy or rubbery at all. For my main dish, I had the Adriatic pasta, and it tasted incredibly fresh with a bright, lemony flavor that made every bite amazing.

The service was great throughout our visit. I even had the chance to meet the owner, who was warm, welcoming, and genuinely passionate about her restaurant. The outdoor seating area is also a huge plus—spacious, inviting, and perfect whether you're dining as a couple or with a large group.

Overall, Harissa exceeded my expectations, and I can’t wait to bring my family here. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJBjkQzA7p01ASIHYueLAe&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Sanji Shamim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuJYUO_4JIW9yUXM1WQOpss_tWgKFPu0nSP2nW1OCV6WI2P5dzyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is not just another Mediterranean place in North Texas — indeed the flavors were bright and fresh, and the staff was super welcoming! We ordered many items including the Harissa Rigatoni, Adana Kebab, and best of all the Lemon Oregano chicken. Please don’t skip on the pide, we ordered a simple cheese pide and were blown away by how freshly airy the bread was paired with the garlicky cheese. The owner took care to walk around and greet all patrons and everyone felt welcome in this restaurant that is both upscale and cozy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSxk2vB_QlhZnlzhsJlnXv&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Ally Mincher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLw0ad5icLjBoo8ivMNE9q7vIdOqr0PuAf547WXG8Sfc59pCNk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish I had room for more! Such a fun spot for date night or GNO! A wide variety of Mediterranean food offered: Greek, Italian, etc. Everything was so fresh and packed full of flavor. Got the hummus (came with home made pita bread!), chicken kabob, a baklava for dessert with a Turkish coffee espresso martini. Truly SO delicious. Staff was friendly and knowledgeable about the menu with great recommendations. The atmosphere was so pretty and chic. Truly a gem and not another place like it in DFW. Will be back and hungry for more :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyqPKoNDISLxZBwcIR6Gaf&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Kimberly Lloyd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgSsLqORCQ8UaHQqRAxg8CYV7FMsbn2mPwapuWP6-74wHDbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"✨ Harissa Mediterranean – Plano, TX ✨
If you’re looking for incredible Mediterranean food in a warm, inviting setting, Harissa is a must-visit! The food is absolutely fantastic — full of flavor, beautifully presented, and made with fresh, quality ingredients. Every bite feels authentic and satisfying, from the perfectly seasoned meats to the vibrant salads and creamy hummus.

The ambience is just as impressive — cozy, elegant, and welcoming, making it the perfect spot for a casual lunch, date night, or dinner with friends. The staff are friendly and attentive, and you can tell they take real pride in what they do.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Highly recommend checking out Harissa in Plano — you’ll leave full, happy, and already planning your next visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8iJYlxfe7S3HzbitaBwM6&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Warren Paul Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlHUx1hPDx-Z1ZcgaRfm9xMEHaaFMldEx-vDF_ibtL_MmHlpQiYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Some of the food was pretty decent, but some was terrible. Lentil soup should not be watery. It should be substantial. Meat should not be overcooked and hard. These were the primary complaints of our companions.  The falafel had a good consistency, but appears to be a frozen bulk item rather than handmade on premises. Prices are reasonable and the service was good.
Given the number of Mediterranean restaurants in tge Dallas area with excellent food, this one may not survive with the quality we experienced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCa6Jq714Hfc8FWZqqRTq3G&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Linh N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGGjLBCl_UDMwfNVkSmaIsBhb-8JFdDCeWoG3KL1ZOJCqATO0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had calamari frutti, adana kebab, and beef shish kabob. They were all so tasty and delicious. The food was served up quickly and absolutely delightful ambiance. Since they recently open, we were lucky enough to get a dessert on the house as well. Definitely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2WApbSMKRhL2NGvGU4FIn&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Cirilo Jaimes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1UfH8gDBui0X0zXKdct8LEX0q-fLC4FEjuy7AZK5IhSwPhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went with some of me friends on Friday night we got seated right away. This was my first time trying Mediterranean food and it was such a great experience. I had a strawberry mojito and calamari as an appetizer. Both came out really quick. Will be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcceCx-h4gz2h-upuyGsZp&fid=0x0:0xdc762508bf5bfa4a"],"When":"2025-10-19"}]
