[{"Name":"Burak Bas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe_UA73jpBib4uYMY3ovAjOv4JpIxjqfsG8Y9hxkDoiIJn04o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best Turkish restaurants in the US. The food tastes very original and full of flavor. You can tell they make authentic Turkish and Mediterranean dishes. The döner is delicious and the staff is very friendly. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZSJs5onXgfpvsBEukqZJ1&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Ihsan Bozaslan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVX26H2YivBEO4g95X-cj1mDQzWB4owUTTkfCPWa799SwpHcfMm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Prime Doner. The food tasted very authentic and the döner meat was juicy and well-seasoned. Everything was fresh and the portions were good. The staff were friendly and the service was quick. The Kazandibi dessert was also amazing and the perfect way to finish the meal. Definitely one of the best spots for Turkish food in the area. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEeOk41ozZa6Hi1a6qtFqQ&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2026-3-9"},{"Name":"Joshua Ding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZPE1MNTiSYW266d26gwdTqL4M0B5bgmlpc2q-RY2uO7CjIFtW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"December 2025

I have a lot to learn to appreciate mediterranean region cuisine. Since my family loved this region healthy choices food preparation, I decided to visit this restaurant. The owner spend a lot of time and energy on this establishment. Even though, the lunch special is kind of pricy but many sides were included. The steam hot tea at the end of our  meal is the highlight.
I ordered the grilled chicken wings which were freshly prepared. Personally, since most of our selections were grilled in dry heat, we were used to some kind of sauce to complement the char grilled items. However, we are new to Turkish cooking.

My rating 5 as very satisfied

Taste 4/5
Temperature 4/5
Speed of service 5/5
Attentiveness 5/5
Cleanliness 5/5

The service was very hospitable and delightful. They did a great job talking care of us.

Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzqyxeTpdbhjoqJYgie5rN&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Muro Eso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJT2ukdx_CBlkB0nmfyOahu45njjxs3kcrQcplD-UnwPDgig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing dinner experience at Prime Restaurant. The Çağ kebab was incredibly delicious — the meat was very tender, perfectly cooked, and full of flavor. The chicken wings were also excellent: crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside, and well-seasoned.

For dessert, we had the syrupy kadayif and kazandibi, and both were outstanding. The kadayif was perfectly sweet without being overwhelming, and the kazandibi was light, creamy, and absolutely delicious.

The service was fast and friendly, and the atmosphere was very comfortable and pleasant. I highly recommend this place to anyone who loves Turkish cuisine. We will definitely be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXe_f8P8CuXDdMRL8oX9PZ&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Sami Alpak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRtvEmhGksm3BCIfAymYGJAhzF4d5HhAIpxWATpuDp9_iFn687=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Döner, İskender, cağ, and kazandibi were all absolutely delicious. The döner and kazandibi, in particular, were truly top-notch — especially impressive for us as visitors coming from London.
We enjoyed it so much that we returned the very next day. Our waiter, Kerem, was wonderful: attentive, genuinely interested, incredibly welcoming, and a true gentleman. He made us feel completely at home.
Thank you for everything. We will definitely be back on our next visit, even if it’s from miles away! ⭐️🌟✨💫","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCM-eErnozf7Fs4edrCeTa9&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Feyzullah Sevinc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjiHIgIFjTuthwM1UDAXnwyRlUxDZY8prZwOrdDkix_Z-Xji_x=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Prime Doner truly offers a one of a kind experience in the USA. The doner kebab is outstanding perfectly cooked, incredibly flavorful, and made with high-quality meat that tastes just like authentic Turkish doner. The cag kebab and Adana kebab were equally impressive, with the perfect balance of spices and tenderness. To finish, the kazandibi and rice pudding were absolutely delicious, light, and perfectly textured. Clean place, fast service, and very friendly staff. It’s extremely rare to find this level of Turkish food in America. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCPnLnwpJde7DQXiVdd-_P&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"S J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU8ha8bDJpMyij8Kw-YA_7a9yX4E_UQFGsA3qjsbcFlN0EQS8G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Prime Restaurant definitely deserves five stars! The staff are always smiling and incredibly welcoming. The food is gorgeous, full of delicious flavors and amazing taste in every bite. On top of that, they offer free unlimited Turkish tea, which makes the experience even better. It’s the perfect place to visit with your friends and family — you should absolutely give it a try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKUJvt788XLBERX1CmF5Wn&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Leslie Verghese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0ywFQTV9kAW2pSUzO30aLjCszVqmVwQ18RNNNcRRChWYm1_K9nA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to this place for brunch today with friends. The ambience is great and service is excellent. Price is reasonable. What’s noteworthy about their food is the bread they serve first. It’s out of this world. The other items are pretty good especially the falafel and the kibbeh","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCofCVSPAo6H7-vrnHWaTDw&fid=0x0:0x99ed3b578cca9f26"],"When":"2025-11-3"}]

[{"Name":"Schow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKX37Wf6qfeh5ZThf1OeoY-8XTYeTyHFTJnUNPUWUsCMIvC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is exceptional! We ordered their house fries, falafel and hummus. Everything was so good. You can feel the love in their recipes. Even the sauces were delicious. Definitely and must try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1FLjxqy1XuTdiZ1hFTTD0&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Ameen Shawwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfB0eWrgwh1WaKp-ecuXrzCPMWnrSLjLYM4KFi36A_K7QxCVi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To be honest I’ve tried a lot of shawarma places around Dallas but this one was the only one that had actual good shawarma everything was fresh the sauce and the fries were good not to mention the beef in the beef shawarma was seasoned nicely so if you go to legacy food hall you might wanna choice shawarma bar first","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIFCIALCm9lclAVz003dhG&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Rayyan Sokkarie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO_OnPZH-WI_2rpwX9nSPYDABrf6ZtNEkamBmC1NK3FSGn_cwa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place deserves way more LOVE. I am blown away by the flavor and authenticity of this restaurant. I ordered the shawarma stack (100% recommend) that came with fries loaded up with beef, lamb, chicken, feta, tons of sauce and sides of pickles, olives, tomatoes and onions. Everything tasted incredibly fresh and delicious. I cannot recommend this place enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_6UClccKiAkRd5iHxMZBW&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2025-8-11"},{"Name":"J B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_bwN4oKL8WHwmmnM4bUDQwtV0ZkA8rX9MItEeoJA-NKh6PcLy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top rate shawarma joint in Legacy Hall!  The hummus was also very good too!  Check them out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLUbb3kuR1O8T89e-OydrO&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Traci Bernard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaTarhyYElfczQF_-zi2PS5hIQ87QToKeRpHS_5xtx6gaTBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I can’t even give a 1 star to the service I received today, but in order to leave a review, I had to. I was at the register ready to place my order and the cook, with his gloves on, was scrolling through his phone. He never even acknowledged me. After about 2 minutes, another guy walked up and started to put his apron on and then took my order, as I watched the cook put his phone down and prepare my food. He didn’t even change gloves or wash his hands!! I also asked for no onions or cucumbers but please add tomatoes and black olives. I told him I’d pay extra: He then handed me the gyro without olives and told me I couldn’t have them because there wasn’t a button for it. I stood in shock and then said I wanted to cancel my order. He then said he’d charge me for a side of rice. $3 extra for a tiny scoop of olives. Are you kidding me? Do better! I get people having bad days.. but the scrolling on the phone and preparing my food at the same time is not acceptable. I won’t be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shenouda Armanious","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcbcfCbAgDS-RfE75fCkgLA4vu_9vFfL69a1J6h9m7OSOTPlk-3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We visited Shawarma Bar at Legacy Hall after spotting this Mediterranean restaurant and decided to give it a try. We ordered the falafel wraps, hoping for a flavorful experience. Unfortunately, they fell short of our expectations.

The wraps were average overall, and I’d rate them a 6 out of 10. The main issue was the spice level — it was far too spicy, and they didn’t ask how we preferred it. My wife couldn’t eat hers because of how overwhelming the heat was.

It would be much better if they offered the sauce on the side or at least asked customers about their preferred spice level before serving. This small adjustment would make a big difference for a wider range of diners.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_i7GMCg&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2025-1-19"},{"Name":"Ms.B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsHtTiwHsTtkNKKVf_ja3elSjAXDP3JcZIaZK0wzo43WM4fmrv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Legacy Hall is an experience all on its own. It has 3 to 4 levels with tons of eatery options from sushi to barbecue!

Me and a couple of girlfriends were there for a 90s throwback event. We wanted to grab something to eat and Mediterranean sounded good.

The servers at Shawarma Bar were extremely pleasant and made sure you knew what each item was before adding it to your plate. I got the lamb and chicken combo bowl . The flavors were nice without being overpowering. My only complaint was that by the time we sat at our table, my meal was already cold.  No fault of the restaurant.

Worth checking out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn07eOoQE&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2024-9-29"},{"Name":"Tehzeek Chandok","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKn3hWLGF6kDGNZVg7Odfc2leqJL8WahKPBjxI3OfM9clReug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing! No reason they should have the 3 star rating they have.
I have a lamb bowl.
It was expensive yes however most Mediterranean places are and this is in Plano inside legacy hall to I understand it.
The food was great, the gentlemen’s who made my food was nice and it was a big bowl! I’m a fat ass and it filled me up!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn96TZrgE&fid=0x0:0xe23da069c1716524"],"When":"2024-10-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Phat_Tail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5OW4xECh3TBtekKP0P1X467PDEoibW3HJGTJ9Zei1NyzS3FU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best samsas I’ve had. Perfectly flaky on the outside and super juicy on the inside and packed with meats and sweet onions.

The skewers were tender and fresh tasting with a nice char. The lamb dish was also delicious.

The yogurt drink was super refreshing and pairs well with the meaty dishes.

The only thing was that the naan was overdone but it seem to be a one-off.

Service was great and very spacious location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC139PRrF7InCokiHw2IpnM&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Tim Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYQBIMZrZBt-qHNJPApJhBPkkG5neQed_2cl5tRp9TokrrKS576w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Babahan Uyghur Cafe was such a surprise.  My family and I love Uyghur cuisine and so we were excited to learn that this place opened recently.  They have a limited menu, but from what I can tell they have mastered all the dishes they offer.  They were nice enough to allow us to size down on the Big Plate Chicken so we could try other dishes.  We really liked the Uyghur Polo (only available on the weekends!) and the Gan Bian Soman.  I’m still dreaming about those two dishes.  If you love Uyghur cuisine or are just looking to try something different give this place a shot!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARVPuFOxwTc7jF3NqMn4yw&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Abdulhakeem Samad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQ5I4I6tzQYLUT-KU1FHdB4hMl4zdOYXJm2hYqhuEDMRTcPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great addition to the Halal Chinese Cuisine in DFW.
We were very impressed with the great service by the owner. She took time to explain the popular dishes. All their noodles are handcrafted fresh at the store.
The food was very flavor full and the Tea she suggested was great as well. Loved the serving dish for tea.
The location right at 75 and Legacy is a great plus!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwPezNdDJWytGSRbw13rSl&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Pavan Aripakula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkNerKvThj17I49_BW-sWb8UcVmOyC9DISuYpHgf1uAriHCIs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently stopped by this wonderful little Uyghur restaurant for a quick bite on a cold evening, and it was the perfect decision.

I initially ordered three lamb skewers (kebab) along with some naan, and a side of samsa. The lamb was sensational - incredibly juicy, tender, and intensely flavorful with just the right amount of spice! The food was so good that I immediately decided to order three more skewers to take home!

The samsa was equally impressive; the pastry was crispy and flaky, surrounding a rich, savory filling.

Beyond the delicious food, the restaurant itself is very cozy and welcoming, and the hosts are wonderful. I would 1000% go back for those skewers alone, but there are clearly so many more incredible dishes to try as well! Highly recommended for authentic Uyghur cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnRHpaj5MHSpDkFaGwdtbV&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Polina Annakova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJw2ci59PNYoWeC5vEYFf7ADqF1Y5ze6C6QP3_z3VC2ZxEBznJnA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is amazing and clearly fresh! I've been here twice  and both experiences were great. The food is delicious and doesn't leave a sluggish feeling after eating a lot. The samsa, plov, and laghman are all incredibly flavorful. Service is wonderful and very hospitable, both people we have interacted with made it their goal to socialize and make us feel comfortable. Best Uyghur restaurant in the DFW area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBG5MAr1FZc-Vvkt9jsJHby&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Bety Aquino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX41MSUptNTiikOeYmKZiWlEgdzqjSABKd3WhWvLQe_hgmP6--K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was great! Food was amazing! The Samsa and the skewer OMG 😋 the flavor was all there. Samsa was probably  the favorite of the night. Soft but flaky, meatball inside was nice and juicy sooo good. We also got the spicy Guyro Laghman which is handpulled noodles which wasnt spicy but still delicious. We also got these thicker noodle ones with meat and that was savory. That one was called Gan Bian Soman. Recommend that one too. Overall, it was great food and the workers were really nice and helpful recommending items on the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABAZYnvMasfbdoBKBTXlgX&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Sara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIedHHClNa6Ste1evANTWji3kirXmo_BGe5Oyb7wA3_7yiJSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DFW 最好吃的大盘鸡！  I am always on the search for 大盘鸡 (Big Plate Chicken)。This is the 4th place I've had it at in the area and it is the best. The spice aroma is amazing.  I definitely recommend it as one of the few Halal East Asian restaurants in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBb2j2TcyjyWxJjbx4A3U1o&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Sanjanaa Ravishankar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7eQ5nE-wntzeSSXfKchhJ9QSZZzwRvIaZFZYDA1Pa0Xp47KQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an amazing hidden gem!! I love how intimate the setting is, and how kind the employees are. We got the Samsa, Gan Bian Soman, and Uyghur lamb kebab and they all were just so delicious. Definitely coming back soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAk_2pRf0gae-4zglAqSKX4&fid=0x0:0x515e02874710c916"],"When":"2026-1-12"}]

[{"Name":"Ivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbpArQOEP-VeDw4vW_CtAA9cePHQv06_RqDQX9k_ZSlKfLUP8TBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time trying food from Uzbekistan. Lamb kebab was AMAZING! Plate full of flavor and tenderness. Lamb shank was wayyyyy too chewy, I wouldn’t get it again. Overall food was pretty good and affordable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDipLCPxLRrRzJvQOM9RTD1&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Ali Anwar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBUwJmthZ84cpBkWIVFQyQGaGxs06gKCCOATVON0DIm3WcPgju=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was great! It was my birthday and service was amazing! Illias made sure everything was good and came frequently to check up on us. We had a group of 5 and everyone got their food at the same time. The Lamb Shish Kebab was my favorite but steak burger and chicken kebab was good as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnbueXNNbxnx1yBXNYqgAz&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"y s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfhW_IVobLW8CeWyn6Gqobte7vRdLn8FOO9tdWdWBknTTQro4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment we walked in, the customer service was outstanding. The staff were attentive, genuinely friendly, and their recommendations were spot-on—every suggestion turned out to be sublime.

I’m usually not a salad person, but the staff encouraged me to try the Rokhat salad, and I’m so glad I did. It was incredibly fresh, with a perfect balance of tanginess and saltiness. Honestly, it was refreshing in the truest sense—it woke up my palate and perfectly prepared me for the main course.

Next, we followed their recommendation and ordered the special grill, and every single item on the plate truly felt special. Even the fries stood out—crispy, flavorful, and clearly made with care (they tasted house-made). The grilled vegetables and rice were exceptional on their own, with a unique, well-seasoned flavor. As a big meat eater, I can confidently say I could’ve skipped the meat and been fully satisfied with just those sides—that’s how good they were.

Now to the star of the show: the BBQ. I came here because I know Uzbek food is something special, and Rokhat Grill absolutely did it justice. The special BBQ platter comes with six different types of skewered meats, and each one was excellent in its own way. People often say to focus on lamb or beef over chicken—but even the chicken was incredibly juicy, tender, and flavorful. The lamb and beef skewers were exactly what you’d hope for: perfectly grilled, rich, and satisfying.

The only regret I have is not coming with a bigger group so I could’ve tried more dishes like samsa and Uzbek pulao—but that just gives me a reason to come back from Houston

If you love delicious, authentic BBQ with bold flavors and great hospitality, do yourself a favor and check this place out. You’ll love it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrxGmJcaRngWxwnE3rgDhF&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Cassie Ma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFWp3mUK9xBZSSy1hbbnYQE_KV4SfPoskOZqzhavsGcBI4ays=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved everything we ordered tonight. Unlike frozen or industrially prepared food, this meal tasted genuinely fresh. It wasn't overly salty, greasy, or saucy, and it didn't leave that nasty aftertaste you get from some other restaurants. It truly felt like a healthy and delicious meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAF5LNfQdxHktwp0Yy6SeFS&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"KYCAR MEDINA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvxm5QmR64C70T5909tsQ0HwUD9YGLxdCpeyZ2mE_ZU6wbNQ0U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The waiter was very helpful in guiding us through our meal choices. The atmosphere was relaxing and spotless, which made the experience even better. We were also treated to a complimentary fruit punch that was refreshing and delicious. Places like this truly make a difference.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_oK7ptSUKOvYfg-vY_ZUc&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Abbas Qureshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8D57olLer4WGgRIPQ4G7wpNupY3CpEbyEnscn2otRP9XRwnsj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food - 10/10 A+ Fantastic, delicious, home made taste, just outstanding!!

With that being said, let's talk about what and how to expect this said delicousness..... you WILL get everything ONE by ONE and not altogether when you place the order.  Now I understand a minute or two delay getting someone's meal out to the party, BUT, to have a significant delay of over 20-30 minutes before getting your meal and then your child's or your partner's meal is absolutely unacceptable!  We were told that's how it works here and majority of the folks eating here complain about this.
.
.
.
Well if people are complaining about just THIS, why haven't you fixed it or somewhat remedied the situation?

Again, NOT knocking their FOOD 10/10!!!!!!
Definitely knocking that practice 0/10 BOOOO!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBe3tKJ5I-sPyLZivAV-oB-&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Sathwik Mohan Vangari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk79h8IrblJGtD7slmT9hG6ASlFmFsfcOKbKdDRlJaLvsUyP5S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food is ok. Lamb Kebab was seasoned well, but that was the only good thing here. Ordered avocado salad and ended up getting tomato salad with what looked like avocado puree mixed into it. It was fresh, but can't eat so much tomato especially Roma tomatoes not cheery tomatoes as was written in the description. Very disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHFCRdXoPf_Koqaoz-oauU&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Eddie A. Bitar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj7MjlvCwHfxzfDjyELRbXOJQcjXNMiMME090jSQEO76MPcKTxFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Rokhat is an Uzbeki restaraunt, so focus on the kebabs (chicken kebab and ground beef kebab) and steaks. Clean tasting meat, big portions, and bang for your buck. A recommended restaurant, great job!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQP0CI1O3usszgxJEY3Nmu&fid=0x0:0xd89b9a6676336c73"],"When":"2026-2-4"}]

[{"Name":"Mary Dwyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtb0rREr4HtDRwdzDnZqDPW8ET5yAiIh_bE0t1Ofw23y-Wqwy7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Solid little Greek spot! I came here alone while on a business trip, after a long day of travel. I ordered the tzatziki with cucumbers, a small Greek side salad, and the baked haddock with green beans and Greek potatoes. Everything was fresh and the service was super fast—not a long and fancy experience, but a nourishing one and good for a night when I was tired.

The desserts looked phenomenal but I was trying to be good so I skipped them 🤣 Next time I’m in town I’ll have to indulge!

My only suggestion for the atmosphere would be changing the lighting to be softer so it’s easier to relax—it felt a little too bright and harsh for an evening meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeqpDJxGgR0tJUTqZctfNP&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"Lele Tinka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQtaYMX1s4cEMYonSV2Vs7yC1A54h_veKmxhwy1FnPS0xQGSaG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a great find. Food and service were top notch. We had a group of 7. We had the Mana Mou platter to all share as an appetizer. Several of us had the Brizola salad. The braised lamb shank and Yia-Yias Kota were also ordered. Everything was spectacular. Then came the desserts!!! We ordered 5 to share. They were all amazing but the Galaktobouriko custard pie was my favorite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDcLppHPVQcgkG7fDGOHBQI&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Rai Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnoZIq5cq2zIzpm1eHQfhpwNPC4rSDJrLMa1pRr0bQsqZ0qmg1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yesterday we went to PLATIA.
We ordered Calamari for appetizers, Brizola Steak, The Mana Mou, and Chicken Souvlaki from the kids’ menu. The calamari was a great choice for kids — no pepper and not spicy at all, my kids loved it. The Brizola Steak had good seasoning, but the cut itself wasn’t very tender even though it was cooked medium. Maybe medium rare would have been a better choice for that steak. The Mana Mou was a good portion. My kids are picky eaters, and they didn’t like the Chicken Souvlaki, so next time we’ll choose something else for them. This was our third visit to this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUCmlR5dy4hNu7arj7mKh0&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"tina do","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcOkOPGmTd3zK--R5_kKsKsE5uJoHcD7baP66cGplTDBMJg9Ze_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We got the mama mou, dolmades and lentil soup. The mama mou is a dish with all of their menu items, so it was great to try everything. I really enjoyed the Greek potatoes, dolmades, and gyro the most. The dolmades are the warm version with meat and this was my first time trying them. The gyro meat was delicious and the potatoes were seasoned very well. The waitress was amazing too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyfZcCq4TE-rJwK0VOPYbT&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Abbey Alexander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpmmr-JsYceS1JQDwhIw3eGd47G2LJ3QvImwGjdtIEm8Oi9XRh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here was fantastic. I got the gyro plate with Greek fries and salad with the Baklava sundae for dessert. I got it to-go and the lady working the desk was fantastic. She gave me recommendations and, since I was visiting from out of town, talked to me about the area. Service was great and everyone was super nice and welcoming. If I ever visit again, I’ll be sure to eat here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB697oerf8yAoRV_as_hqR-&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Mark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHkf5ICp073GzPUf97btOGGjpPM9l6HS7rEpoRn7K6KbquoK4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved our dinner here! The lamb shank was the star perfectly seasoned, fall-off-the-bone tender. The roasted half chicken had crispy skin and juicy meat, and the skirt steak was cooked just right with great char and flavor. Service was warm, pacing was spot-on. We’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOo6tGSt4TOkI-WxbCq2UM&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Fernando Ceballos, P.E.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcTnHIBry4uR2uI0vP05O4TBKQGUAV6b4ePcjI2nzt-or2Lzyv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A bit of a wait, but totally worth it. Staff was friendly, food didn't take long, and everything tasted fresh. The restaurant is BYOB for a small cork fee, make sure to take advantage of that. We didn't have dessert, but we'll definitely be back to try that baklava that looked amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCaeytHXztCFT0MpP9Mum_E&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Vladimir Guerrero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKzhIS4wk9JoTXe7L3RN8hctvC7vYDeax5ts15Khx5MR3BxqUK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a tasty musaka last time there, its sauce was so yummy! The gyro was good, but the baklava delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBx-Kx4-GOUsgS46xiUcYTA&fid=0x0:0x89df498fb1592c1d"],"When":"2025-11-6"}]

[{"Name":"Sydney Duplechain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxRRwOHIRkJZN5nswnrKsQp1Pz57Py5E0mkahDavfg0X8tFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The ingredients in my bowl were super fresh and I was directed towards the best dips to try! The staff was extremely kind and made my birthday lunch so special! The juice options are so refreshing and I highly recommend the cucumber mint lime juice! Also, restaurant was so clean! The manager even offered us their new cinnamon pita chips with warm honey to try before they debuted next week! They were a delicious addition! Overall, this CAVA location is one of the nicest I have ever visited! :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDte3jcq-sgCjdxn8ckRst3&fid=0x0:0x837afb83b28cb30b"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"D H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISDZoNjBqKoYXJAbUOqx6Ng6zgf1Wk3mpyiig3h80-s3ktw-7r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our family stopped by the area and decided to try this Cava location, and we’re glad we did. The food was very fresh, and the sauces were excellent. Renay and Que were incredibly attentive and helpful, making our first visit a great experience. We’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8oel4g-BPNEt-9to8PyY-&fid=0x0:0x837afb83b28cb30b"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Lesa Rayford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXg3eIpH4djSQTFF9g1fMd6445DKomkNx-5XfSVqBDbcDw-tl0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The DREAM TEAM was in full effect tonight! Ja’Mya, Pepe, and Anastasia were amazing from start to finish. Ja’Mya’s suggestion to add the harissa chicken to my bowl was spot on—so flavorful and perfectly balanced. Anastasia nailed it with her topping recommendations, taking it to the next level. And Pepe wrapped everything up with top-notch service and the blueberry lavender recommendation… chef’s kiss—absolutely delicious.

The energy, attention to detail, and customer service were unmatched. This team truly made the experience. I’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFYcCkvf5ZWpwaAfMEXwbB&fid=0x0:0x837afb83b28cb30b"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"J Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIX9NQeeVXBnM_OEeemtXK9cqFdQsEnV-ZM5F03gZDkXY-Y7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It seems every time I come here I am treated with a lot of sarcasm and rudeness. Workers don’t seem happy to be there and helpful at all. EVERY TIME I have come here, tables are dirty and when I see someone “cleaning them” they just do half or barely any of the table. I decided to get steak today and accept the upcharge just to get cold, extremely chewy steak. I do not recommend coming to this location. [{"Name":"Sam Khayal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5TFWiLhhkqPyX6EALT3Enpa8i2CCyq2pWKgsMrSdxkrt4s6Rl5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have been a loyal customer and previously considered this my preferred Halal Guys location. Unfortunately, my recent visit raised significant concerns regarding food-handling practices. The chicken container was left uncovered, and when another tray was lifted, the hot water used to warm the pans dripped both into my plate and into the adjacent chicken container. This constitutes a clear cross-contamination risk. Despite bringing this to the staff’s attention and requesting that the contaminated container be replaced, no corrective action was taken. I urge management to review food-safety protocols, and I encourage customers to observe the preparation process carefully.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBmiq6CZg37OTaq84Qw0Vq&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"The Whittons","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_wPJNLpuR6lY0AtrOOvyjQLYTg55DXpj_v7phgJ7wxtEdWqWc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious fresh food served super quickly and with great service! Enjoy the ability to customize your bowl or gyro - every part is flavorful and I love how quickly you go from ordering to the table. Every person behind the counter was super nice and greeted you which is always nice. Baklava for dessert is a must! It’s delicious and such a guilty pleasure! Highly recommend if you’ve never tried this type of food before!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6P69lAE&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2024-7-22"},{"Name":"Charles Boltas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV89mJiXDdzKxTURDvU1ansarvqfhWrxFcU4AM1qCYQh8EOGnIMdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I ordered the Regular Falafel Platter via a food app from my work. I have never heard of this place, so I decided to give it a shot.

Before I go deep into reviewing the food, I will say that this place was awesome. I read some reviews here and I didn't know what to expect. Very happy with my selection for lunch!

The regular sized portion of the falafel platter is huge. I ate half of it and was full.... But I ate the whole thing. The platter came with two giant portions of white sauce and a packet of hot sauce. The white sauce is creamy and the hot sauce is VERY spicy. I love spice and this hit the mark.

If I had to critique this delicious meal, I would say the falafels were very dense. I personally like my falafel a little bit lighter. Also, the yellow rice was very bland. However, when you mix everything together, you achieve a good flavor profile.

I will eat and order here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICz48O0Yw&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2024-6-4"},{"Name":"Animesh D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmudmjCo-waRHau7niEy0cIXnIbIjYLS5Dy04mDO72Ow21yzoO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Halal Guys opened in North Plano provides unique food experience of their unique platter with white sauce. The food tastes great and their signature white sauce always attracts its customers. There are ample seating arrangement inside and outside patio. The restroom is clean and parking is available. The portion of the meat seems low for that price. The price of the platter seems little high. Also there are white sauces available to purchase separately.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXw4PeAw&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2024-10-30"},{"Name":"CJ Simon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDHtwromXuVUd1AaFz0K1JBfTnsw5XQtKU65m73H-twYFIsmDR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Halal Guys, located in Plano, was the perfect spot for a convenient, late dinner.  My gyro was packed with fresh ingredients, savory sauces, and remarkable flavor. Try the shawarma chicken sandwich and the scrumptious Baklava Cheesecake. Thank you for the terrific service Fiorella!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnvZfxIQ&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2024-10-9"},{"Name":"momo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtSaNuTM-ClqX5vIl_HN4ufZ8ZwEGvVLlY--qVB09OgCY8cT6X1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Two fins up for their crispy, juicy and spicy chicken wings. Each bite packed a punch. It was worth the time on the toilet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQrKO3_ep8IAwTjpV5DzmS&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Umm Youssof","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsPcAeVA9HPDiewSA_FdvIbgpQS9jOrAn6uX3axyI9QLKMYB8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Upon entering the restaurant, we immediately noticed an unusual odor. The meat had a bad aftertaste and the overall quality was subpar. The combo platter was disappointing, and the chicken had an unpleasant taste, making it difficult to finish the meal. Unfortunately, this was not an isolated incident; we have experienced similar issues during our recent visits to different branches. As a result, we have decided to remove this restaurant from our list of preferred dining places.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLgMqOBw&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2024-6-24"},{"Name":"Tayyaba Ahmed (Tabysid)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJTdmkpVUQ0J7WIHFPz_BMQgk-FqO33WlufV5gz0QWtZjlvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pathetic service! We had been eating food from this place for years and taking out. This time when we ordered the family meal for 5 ppl and brought it home, serving was so small, in single and small tray they had rice in half ray and two halves for meat. When my husband called, lady started saying she can’t hear and this is what we have been doing and she kept saying I can’t understand or can’t hear. So disappointed!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgAL0mGk7DfI49AVfOV9_u&fid=0x0:0x75d6b611bf1514a6"],"When":"2025-8-23"}]

[{"Name":"Holly Plunkett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEFjsokIHz3NxPp0oECr3R6wH2tl3k-7kb_RBbS18tpXYRJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was the best Gyro I’ve ever eaten in my life!! Also, their grilled chicken skewers are great! Their French fries are seasoned and amazing! And their baklava ice cream is delicious! It is super nice and really clean and the staff there are so friendly! I highly recommend this place!! We will definitely be going back again! My new favorite place! -Holly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbvh2YEp2ZxuWGgxJcRai3&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Marissa Bruton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_mtfwxren-fD9ss157rourU2KtJKLXgEHX2tObZn7ZPiHXEWp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time dining here! The food portions were large and prices are affordable. The hummus was 10/10. I had the chicken plate and the everything was so full of flavor! Never had rice pudding before, but it was worth it. All the food was so good and the workers were friendly and the place was clean. Would recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4EEv467A7YYXYOeD2MT3Q&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Jacqueline Crider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5LxIt8fuGXnk2993YmTEBk-63GPB7oeTo29U8amKxEsMjCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First off Quito (I hope I didn’t butcher her name!) deserves a raise. That’s about the brightest, sunny shine person you’ll ever meet. Helpful, kind, checking in with us. What service! Then let’s talk about the food. It was good. It was well priced. The fries were excellent and crispy. I’m very picky about good fries. These pass the test. My suspicion is they double fry them but I don’t know that for a fact. The gyro was HUGE! Honestly that plate could have easily been split if you aren’t starving. Overall an awesome experience with great food. Oh and the place is super super clean. Last note. They have this cool thing where you can post on social media and they’ll a free meal to someone in need. How cool! I love that it was an option. I got to donate 3 meals to love food banks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-ctT6_KAE195-sbvb9_j6&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Tedi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJfD56EM6CYx1-MlhlxWeqOlGywKU9mSvp7uKRcTIojsZRYWUY3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered online, same prices as ordering in store! I am grateful of that. I didn’t feel gouged. So delicious and fresh. Order was correct and directions were followed! A beautiful generous piece of fresh grilled salmon, I especially love the small side offerings of the dips, very delicious!! Look at how they are top dressed like a full $7 bowl! Attention to detail, much appreciated. I want to try them all!! Hot was served hot and cold was served cold.
Pita warm & soft. So good.
Absolutely full of flavor!
Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIuxFaNRUZLwTYYqo2AxGc&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Leftovers House","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDAoJItjCLCuUv46fAA311XSBMghKX6DO7ACXiVBTrI9xf4VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"New Greek restaurant on Custer (just across the street from Morning Bliss). They have a large menu. So many choices! My husband went with a basic gyro (because you have to try that first) and I had the Greek salad with a chicken breast. They were both great, but my salad was truly fantastic! The chicken breast arrived on a skewer atop my salad and was juicy and tender. Loved the salad! Got better as we reached the bottom. The host checked on us several times. Great experience, friendly service, wonderful meal!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCO7PZoYoNyBEdd31cV62U7&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Cal C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKpPhGVzlCNVDAYtTlTZ3uxjk1UA_ifzrv6-YZRcfaD0Iuq6rX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good Greek food - we all enjoyed it. Felt sorry the AWS issue affected their opening, so glad we got to try before leaving Texas. Would come again as a change from BBQ and great brisket. Enjoyed the ambience - Greek music - and really friendly staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOU0PSFVQH2nO0WIIPTuXG&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Dr. Milton Mize","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUbcA62D60PNOwKn3D9xiihQuwyXvZoAfY71DCi7iW-6sjjCdC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First Day Fabulous! It was evening rush on opening day and everything went so smooth. Great Greek gyro was delicious and huge. Feta fries is a “great”surprise. Humans dip is very savory with warm pita slices. The staff preformed very professional, friendly,  and sharp. Great service bringing food out and helping clear table was a nice touch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVdxlfVOKbt8Z4n-F86aK3&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Yasmin Robles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjYJDTzG5yhQoU45GPUwgrviLO-1cqLoHB04j8Efp_WdM4aFEz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire establishment is truly amazing!! The food is incredible, the atmosphere is so inviting, and the workers are so friendly and sweet to talk to. I highly recommend the Great Greek Gyro!! Try if you’re in the area!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA24rof5YvLvZ4vpFXTCVxH&fid=0x0:0x9bd4c8156fd22e7d"],"When":"2026-1-12"}]

Thank you for your attention to hygiene and your friendly service.
We will definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnocXq-AE&fid=0x0:0x4a3089272f5860dd"],"When":"2024-10-6"},{"Name":"Punkie TheGreat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpXNcYMUaWXBVCp_MPIrQxYtPSVn1YEo8teGxcTpvemvtV5NVn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Wasn't the greatest thing I've ever had. But no iced tea in the place except the sugary one from the fountain drinks. 👎 Not ever coming back .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOv76j-wE&fid=0x0:0x4a3089272f5860dd"],"When":"2022-7-18"},{"Name":"carlos perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxjREJJ5hYuLwSJmMV0byBylQZ9FYqqO0ixSqRcsB4oGKPe2GTgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"TLDR: would I go back? Got a sample on the way out of Walmart, and was surprised, good shawarma, at Walmart! So, digging this type of food, I came back, not to Walmart, but to this restaurant. The store itself is clean, and inviting. The owner was there, at the register, with care about his business. Talked with him briefly, got my food, then told him a am a paid Google reviewer so that he would not treat me special. I them took photos with his permission. I took a video, several pics of the meat, and do on, it was great. I will be going back with the wife. I got a a wrap, 7", less than $5, sharwma good size, no sides, and I was satisfied. We also got a mexican skillet that was much better a 3.5 out of 5. Id probably go back for the pancakes again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA73Cc7z5ZD3MdL5ltt_oNc&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Heather Pilcher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPyfWz9dlSkbKksa6gXG5izjNHvrQBey5lKJQNgZXbWL07BC3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was all so good! They were fluffy and just lightly seasoned in the most perfect way! Can't wait to try the gf French toast next time!
The atmosphere is bright and fresh but still comfortable and relaxing. Matt was friendly and the right amount of attentive, adding the cherry on top of a great meal. 12/10, this is definitely going to be a new go-to for me & mine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8F_iQDw5EboLt4FAMnt2c&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Leah C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW95lgkMrk7f-Ltr5bRUsUo8HFy40_z02cUpq0Hi2t5rEnarV1V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful quaint little hidden gem. I loved the ambiance when we walked in. The menu has a nice variety. My girls got breakfast and I had the BLT with Avocado, it was so yummy, the sourdough bread was fresh and bacon was crispy like I love. Natalie was awesome, very attentive. We will be back. They are going to be open for dinner soon and have us a peak at the menu. ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD36QKrhshASUv3VN6KOOWZ&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Montana Bell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFEhgf6azmZ8h-Y5xM4rE_64NviB234NEMYbKMIJM_LQDFXLEAtA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very cozy atmosphere. Very fast service. The food was excellent. I got the avocado toast with Pico de gaio, two eggs whatever way you want them and fruit. My fiance got the house special I believe it was the Migas which was very delicious he also got a banana and Nutella French toast. Good portion size as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9ALT5RxRB7rKiP_Y3SgVq&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"BlessedT G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQTOeYt8PwqHNzz79vBcB95H6o1pi5rRwPtSgA0IqYxKCtC8i0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oooooh, this place is AMAZING!!! I have gone here on many occasions. My new favorite place. It is right off of Preston in the parking lot of Market Street. You can actually walk from the doors of Market Street to this gem. Angelica is JUST an angel and excellent server. Her customer service and attention to detail is the best. I love the environment, attentiveness, coffee, AND THE FOOD. I have some pics and video below. I hope you enjoy; breakfast and lunch so far...dinner is coming soon. ❤️ God bless them all.  The video is my favorite - Chicken and Waffles! The other favorite meal- Very Very Crepes. Best kept secret in west Plano.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPWSZSXkF3AWmmReaKoxKx&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Shane and Laura Ballard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEfNdRv7bmWFfCsCFrSwzQXUfy3TjCLNOeKH_9AV3acB8Fxw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to try a new place for brunch today and we are so happy we did ! Right off the bat our server Adid was so warm and welcoming! The food was all well prepared and very generous servings. I’m carnivore diet and they accommodated my diet with substitution of bacon to replace fries or toast. Adid our server was attentive but not too much ;-)

We will be back and you should try them too !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHfhdxg2qYN6QJwbOva4QC&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"mizellie12","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiDF8I5gaPTuJq4dGSK196bl-BQaTFDKW_vIePJMPiJ3i43_Hl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was craving french toast with strawberries and bananas. Found this place and it was great.
Only criticism I have is I wish the french toast had a strawberry drizzle rather than me adding maple syrup and that even though I ordered over medium eggs I got over easy. Honestly, often that is the case when I go out to eat and it was still a good egg so not a big deal. They still deserved the 5 stars.
I loved the plant decor and chandeliers. Would definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTDP4FiUmRDxiJ4--MbzR5&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"KathyAnn Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4OYaijS9L-UGMK4iexd5jcP_XnNX879TBkwNmkBXUclGLGA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went for brunch and the atmosphere was incredible. we were greeted as soon as we walked in and our waitress was great. the food was very great. we all enjoyed our meals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ06pvrpCP54sxNIaQPF6v&fid=0x0:0xd4ba67ffecd398cf"],"When":"2026-2-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joshua Ding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZPE1MNTiSYW266d26gwdTqL4M0B5bgmlpc2q-RY2uO7CjIFtW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"March 2025

A hidden deli gem hidden in a liquor store. This is a long standing sandwich shop in Plano. Great tasty and delicious sandwich shop. My first review after many visit.
Recommend highly and will love to revisit soon.

Only downside, seating was kind of beat up but great food trumps.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ4sCchQE&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2025-3-10"},{"Name":"Robert Korngiebel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1hYV2CIOXPvcRmd6A6hQhVORFeUF1jKAO-4XACjfDHAmCQpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great place to go for Rueban's! Prices are very reasonable as well. Some of the reviews say they're inside the liquor store, that is correct. However, they have their own entrance so it's easy to get into. We went, this time, right after 12:00 noon and there was plenty of seating available.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKCi1NnDsbfV1QE&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Carolyn Fox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1v4NpEgALJvhr2N-SjkGXmJ1_Cx9R8Kk0iqtPADWnv8DlGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome sandwiches! My wife and I had always been a little skeptical of a deli in a liquor store, but this place is great! You order at the counter (note: prices are about $2-3 higher than the outdated online menu), grab chips and a drink, and get your sandwich about 5 minutes later.

We were here at lunch and there was a comfortable stream of people coming in to order and eat. The dining area is small but pleasant. We’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVic2C-wE&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2023-12-13"},{"Name":"Brady Cakes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgG-Yd-kKk1NHRIstxageCDBKLq_gAdszmEeWZAQ29lZhmPFvT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Advice:
Come here for all your deli needs.  If you like Reuben sandwiches they have like eight variations of them and they are all amazing.  Come here - its is top bombzer deli and its not redick expensive.  Service is top notch btw.   Fast and to the point.  As a proper Deli should be.

Results:
Leave completely satisfied with the BEST sandwich/ deli "after-glow".    You aint gonna break the bank either.

Lessson:
Always goto Mr Gs deli if you are considering deli.   Dont even look back.  Get here asap","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD8cfbggE&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2024-3-29"},{"Name":"Ryan A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjNcTGbd4RHh5-vGwMHotUdSw7DQ7wXtePwFAmclJOUaXVEehq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I get lunch here about once a week, and it never disappoints. Delicious sandwiches at a very reasonable price, especially compared to some of the big name sandwich spots. It’s located inside of a liquor store, but don’t let that distract from how good their sandwiches are. There is seating available for dine in. They also have a wide variety of chips and drinks to choose from. I typically get the club reuben, but decided to get the classic cuban this time and I was very happy with it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdtIaKVw&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2024-2-12"},{"Name":"Kayla Bright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJy2WRq8JzGtaY92zPz8sWG47HMfjmS0mLtoeJ5xuf1R3lk_wdEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yum! Had the Philly cheesesteak. Try the cookies! They are huge.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFeLrP3c5JK1lHnBbR2ezj&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Amy Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiiCNubEV0NhND2TCRTZtR92NlmdfH_6B5VdJdxcCNnmsF0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had one hot and one cool sandwich and bother were excellent. This hidden deli is a gem. Located inside Spec’s but does have a separate entrance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeuzNVarwBE20PYnZ_Bns2&fid=0x0:0xdeeb920096644da8"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"CE Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH1sYLWY49eTzHTHjkp4D5c2xWxIDlIKwbKWcbToZMI0fe9rOs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Traveling on the road and goggled sandwich shop near me and I was led to Mr, G's Deli, inside of SPEC'S. After finding it ordered a sandwich, The Lucky Lucy, with a Mac salad, chips, and a tea. Thangs got right and will be back for more exciting delicacies of sandwiches","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"D. Lish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHpVYSIla3GScoCLB2Qp29BSY-LULQHbzy0_SND6l6n9h_wt0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I regret not discovering this establishment earlier. Tucked discreetly at the rear of the parking lot, this hidden gem benefits from a centrally located site and ample parking, rendering it exceptionally accessible. The proprietor exhibits remarkable kindness and attentiveness, with an admirable eye for detail. The menu offers commendable variety, and the majority of dishes are maintained at optimal freshness and temperature. The baklava provides a delightful conclusion to the dining experience.I shall undoubtedly return on my next visit to Dallas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHACpj9Vsd6gvg2H7inWOn&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"James “Sonny” Essert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRdTo8AjDPrHBYNROzvMI14UXEnPYMlQw0gP-T8DXvsczaRf0V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This restaurant (and type of food) was my first to try buffet style. It did not disappoint. The food was varied and unique for an American palate. I'm a fan of hummus, and the avocado flavored one was exceptional. The various rice options was a surprise as I tried all of them and recommend the beef flavored one. The most interesting drink was a rose flavor which was unique to me as having lived in China where I had rose tea and rose mooncakes. The service was not necessarily friendly, but all were extremely polite. The clientel is heavily Middle Eastern, so if you're identifiably American, expect to be starred at as my group of four were. Lastly, try this experience...you won't regret it! The weekend buffet was around $25/person.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgQ3CUIKmfe4xwywzC7leP&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Sidratul Montaha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrOgG_--ydQAKYpwnf_RE17rVO2wtJp9kxHCk83DTbg_ANym17=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was a good experience for buffet dinner, but they are a little expensive specially on weekends. As we couldn’t manage during weekdays, it was our loss. But anyway, coming to the food, I am giving it a 4 star cause being a Bangladeshi, I eat a lot more spicy & thicker foods. But this was also good, specially the rice with the chicken. Also, they had Gyro meat, lamb shank (which you have to ask for separately), different types of salads & sauce, chicken & beef kebabs, fish fry, eggplant & cauliflower fries etc.
They have few desserts but loved the rice pudding & cake","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjIwBnwETI_G0TqHfYEvl9&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Roman Petrovskii","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBJtpS3Q9zkPF-BKe8mlLaHoOaAuGl6o60g29pSzstb1Q1PnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dimassi’s Mediterranean Buffet in Plano is a great spot for fans of Mediterranean cuisine! 😍 There’s a wide variety of dishes 🥗, everything fresh and tasty, and the atmosphere is bright and pleasant ☀️. The staff is friendly 🤝 and attentive, and the dining area is clean and cozy 🌿. Calm background music 🎶 adds to a relaxing vibe. Overall, everything was really good, but one salad 🍅 had too much vinegar, which slightly affected my experience. Everything else was excellent: hot dishes 🍲, appetizers 🥙, and desserts 🍮 were all flavorful and well-balanced. I definitely recommend it to anyone who enjoys fresh and diverse food! 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzWHzGJ8jhhG0FC8vMtQHW&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Manoj Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbqmSUdYUPYIB-L8_FmWVbh8y8aHMiIFCTv7q9zpm4GoACSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Huge selection of salads, vegetables and meal dishes. Fresh bread and pizzas were great but really need better deserts. Baklava was little dry for my taste. Overall best bang for your bucks when it comes to buffet style food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCkfWtttcUSDqDkJFHZX2hg&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"sh mm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIknAX2vtFK40Z0GBqU9u2-IpOoEhzJ9ZqQDil7xC3eFlTsbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh that was our first time and I truly loved the food. Super yummy with variety of choices for any taste. You pay upfront and then serve yourself. Please try cinnamon tea with baklava at the end of your meal. My little one also loved the food. Thank you :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvjGl-RE9oZJbbtky6JrMB&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Remy Eldinary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqh9g5Q34azYOtsCWGmXI7fSgfFSGUr9WOzSy6fH3KdZ1RbaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While the ambiance isn’t particularly impressive or inviting, the food more than makes up for it. Portions are generous, and everything was well-seasoned. The menu offers a wide variety of dishes, so there’s something for everyone. I highly recommend the lamb shank (one per person) — it’s incredibly tender and flavorful. The hummus is creamy and balanced, and don’t miss the warm baby pitas they serve alongside. Just delicious. ious","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAu-NXkY1Q_oDP0YhKvokDK&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-7-9"},{"Name":"Omsai Aindala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDR0P23GukYEv1-lDVgMa2_Z-UnC5_lbjFGrg1Wzcf7HvJUK0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently visited this place and had a decent overall experience. The highlight was definitely the variety the buffet spread as it was quite wide offering a good selection of classic Mediterranean dishes. From fresh salads to hummus, grilled items, rice dishes, and a few traditional sweets there was something for everyone.

While the selection was impressive, the food itself was decent. Some dishes stood out more than others the hummus was creamy and well-seasoned and the salads were fresh and crisp. However, a few of the hot dishes lacked the depth of flavor I was hoping for and some items felt a bit overcooked or under-seasoned. The desserts were a nice touch especially if you have a sweet tooth.

The restaurant was clean and well-organized. It’s a good spot if you’re looking for a casual meal with a variety of options especially if you’re dining with a group that likes to sample different things. It’s a decent place to enjoy a diverse and filling buffet at a reasonable price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAoLt2eWIGq6O4jfZ78DqA&fid=0x0:0x7f0e70ea2ed19e38"],"When":"2025-7-7"}]

[{"Name":"Miles (Family Acct)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1-fmk486TapPuyBnM29LUy0McI-G3qJrhnYXuDbIkJQaXTaNz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyable.  Fresh ingredients.  Good portion size.  Very friendly service. We ordered the Greek Chicken Pita, Gyro Pita, and French Fries.  I tried all three and enjoyed them, but the chicken seemed a bit bland.  The fries were freshly cooked - super hot - and my son and I shared a look of surprise when we tried them. I’d definitely get those again.  Didn’t try their desserts, but they looked good.  Value-wise, it was a lot better than a fast food joint.

Busing your own table doesn’t seem necessary since they weren’t busy.  Probably something they shouldn’t ask the customers to do when the staff is just sitting at a back table looking at their phones.  But I’d definitely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHKDLsIXnbtmcS0kkBIJDB&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Maria H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRlYUscSK6FE3AC6A0Vtpnf3jsX1J6mpac6SihxYpQp-b2zq8uYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Looking for healthier meal and thought about Mediterranean and  found great review on this lil restaurant. We ordered lamb kebab platter ( meat has a peculiar small and meat is a ( lil dark in color and a peculiar smell ) Greek salad and falafel ( fairly good ) with the tzatziki sauce .
We were the only ones  in the Resto  an hour before it closed .Lamb platter was not satisfying enough that we have to pack  it home. I asked the manager about the smell of the kebab and she said it's from a special spice ? I think the meat is not as fresh . For the price bit could be better .
Atmosphere was fine for a small place . My husband said he is not coming back to this place .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBc-EZXV_zpU5zaiXpol1C&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Tara L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7PSP18fBDyeUQQDr6DmtXPcvT-ZkF7G9vmuLVCD4v2Csp4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Greek Salad with added gyro meat. It was a huge salad and could definitely be shared. Included a side of pita and tzatziki. I elected to remove the potato salad and tomatoes from my salad. Super nice folks working there and the place was clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrhpwpmnhHqf7ZkZNwkRTY&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Robert Korngiebel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1hYV2CIOXPvcRmd6A6hQhVORFeUF1jKAO-4XACjfDHAmCQpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent Gyro’s and very good French Fries as well. This Little Greek location consistently delivers excellent food at reasonable prices. Definitely a good go-to for a quick Gyro fix. And a shout out to the ladies that work there, they’re friendly, helped my wife with her order, and checked on us after our food came out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPUaM7WPEvqpHymieKwJKF&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Stephen Cranford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsYHs9_KTKViDRZzhBYK-le4a76FXAPV9TiJpRkljGBWS90zZQmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I haven't eaten Greek food to often but this was outstanding. We got the sampler platter and gyro platter. Really liked the lamb kabobs. Salad was great too. Ordered to go. They saw my PISD ID and offer me a free drink while I waited. Was ready really quick. This was more than enough food for 2 people so we had some left for the next day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Quan Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQoplkf5DKppQ-MEVkQucH100l_lDGRGtUTCKFK8A0vc0pJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food over all. Wish my giro was a hair saltier. Their tziziki was excellent though. The falafels were good as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heather","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzyGgawNUst-jRry8OwBsJQ5lHv2Jlk0cDCmbdvY2naewDSa0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed the sampler appetizer - consisting of spinach pie, falafel, pita bread, hummus, and tzatziki sauce.

I tried the Steak Pita - lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and tzatziki sauce and the Olympian pita -
Gyro Meat and Chicken with Lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and Tzatziki sauce. Both flavorful with a perfect balance of Tzatziki sauce. The chicken was perfectly cooked packed of flavor.

I also purchased baklava, and it was decadent, flaky, and sweet! I'll definitely go back for this Little Greek Fresh Grill didn't disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqKi5Mw&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2023-6-19"},{"Name":"ANTONIO PANA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4RZHlzO88NGT9Zsok7V-ypgbPjmfx0Snd8NkrCRaTsaMSv9-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had late dinner and ordered Lamb Skewers and Salad. Wifey ordered Chicken Skewers and Salad. Both are delicious.
Self service counter to place your order and pay.

Serving Staff are friendly and attentive. Well lighted Greek Restaurant. Lots of parking, too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLqdjduAE&fid=0x0:0x26bc97b075cf3c33"],"When":"2024-6-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rebecca Dominguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGTd6xwgQmfbSvR_6nTXrFDm_SnD72SDS5ax6zZYgOIU8A63xQyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re a taco lover, this place is a must. The flavors are bold, creative, and surprisingly addictive. Some of the fusion combinations sound unexpected at first, but once you take a bite… they totally work. WOW.
The menu is diverse, the tacos are packed with flavor, and everything tastes fresh and thoughtfully put together. Add in super friendly staff, a beautiful, Instagram-worthy space, and actually comfortable seating, and you’ve got a spot you’ll want to come back to again and again. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCK5-j1lxB3FWFgNFYHWGPa&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Sri B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7tqkcyedvmXDqAL-OZ5EjyK9tq-xZup-RmjxVVgwMRm8s_oUgYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent service and great ambience with all the vibes for the upcoming Halloween.

Loved them having a vegan menu section. Food was very good and we enjoyed the items.

The vegan chicken artichoke taco  along with vegan beef tempura tofu and avocado taco are pretty good - well made and decent portion size for a single person.

However the Wellington Taco was salty a bit more than we would have preferred. Apparently all vegan beef tastes that way. Maybe next time we will just stick with vegan chicken items only.

Overall we enjoyed our visit and most likely to return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAd8TjXULdEYU9wLrbRnCpq&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"ashley pelton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgkRpIGThqM1ai5wuw3C3KRhHcHdB15j94NRuJUdQCnKrZ9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the place for a great aesthetic, fun, filling tacos, and the staff is so kind! Definitely the place for a date night or a girls night out for some fun tacos and margaritas for dinner! I had two tacos and I was so full after just two!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-HKONt7L1Gn3nCIirdKw5&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Cookie Sol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTYLHuvOPbmKXZ0uea8cKccAqR5aR7gL83kJ8WzEdmcMFV76Di=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy fusion tacos.  Each taco is pretty large.  My husband and I shared three and were pretty full.  They have gluten free and vegan meats options. Outside seating available","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJc9hz3Il7nMCrDP2GFpWx&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Shai Avraham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0d998pMciAjwcnbyw6-XCzlNlUxIaxOimHP4HoAUuc8xdop-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I tried The Dream Taco while visiting Frisco because of the 4.6 Google rating, but unfortunately it was very disappointing.

I ordered two tacos: mahi-mahi and carne asada. The mahi-mahi was very dry and didn’t taste fresh. The carne asada wasn’t what I expected either; it was more like ground beef with unbalanced spices instead of sliced beef.

To make it worse, each taco costs over $10, which sets high expectations that the food simply didn’t meet.

Based on my experience, this place is closer to a 2-star spot than a 4.6.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDL_a8yQ-xSa6k3_Ctm9oF9&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"lyna d'shai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGmVDgQfXvUapxgJ-1tIJ7YVXxSgB-a1OMV2EjdWYVI4zYlVGd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is beautiful! The guy who helped us (possibly the owner) was so nice and even took pictures for us. The chairs were comfy. The lobster shrimp taco was very good. Drinks were also very good. I’ll come back again for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9EuHQb9MhBQdfCem846KN&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Ms. Garner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURUf0Sbi3T0ndCIfNLMqGsHm0-36RwOSaXPK9vbgZ3s6Zw-oh5UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely LOVE this place. I went one day with my friends after we went out. I was thinking a regular taco place, but no, this place is amazing. The ambiance is everything. It is even perfect for a little date night. I love the set up. The staff is very attentive & kind. I even went by myself to be alone & took my school book with me. I sat outside & the wind began to blow something aggressive. The staff came out & helped me & another family's things inside. I will tell everyone about this place & it is now on my favorite spot list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBf8Uk11GSenGsPMfPfI-hN&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Liz Franklin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjrhKPljFyK-2nDXXLydnIhZC9SPB_HSNf9jbY289wgK6XJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the service! Cute little spot in Frisco Texas. The Bartender makes a delicious margarita and their Mangonada is too easy to drink.
Really great fusion tacos, would recommend the Banh mi taco and Baja bacon taco with shrimp. Amazing food and great service, will be eating here again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_AWTPHWnzkOwORHLGnp5M&fid=0x0:0x7456d5d09f5c0932"],"When":"2026-1-3"}]
