[{"Name":"Raquel Cortez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCziseNt9M5nrJeOtttb_GXTPFc95CYDsWU2N7aetnYTi4occY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friend and I came here for the first time. I got a chicken gyro with the fries and the gyro was amazing chicken was moist and had great flavor and love that they didn’t skimp on the tzatziki sauce. Fries were crispy and delicious. My friend got the vegetarian falafel gyro and she loved it. We also got dolmates were good based off what my friend said but alittle oily but good. Definitely would come back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB757b4wscunhsxY4r9obv2&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Stefan G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK8xrInNjGMrut_kcpGmDDKBzhyzKbQMgg8XLvT_B3EeGIpQkJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff was incredibly friendly and accommodating, happy to make changes to my order and very flexible overall. The food was excellent, and the service was truly world class, 12 out of 10. The manager greeted us with great enthusiasm, which made the experience even better!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-VQjB5F-8d8Y3ILuZXMlz&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Naveen Devaraj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsSKt4DTxYHPufUu-WZIBcho6qgO-YgxNYG4quKip4qa-tBG3_4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A Fresh and Flavorful Experience

I recently visited The Great Greek Mediterranean Grill and had a wonderful experience. The food was truly amazing, showcasing fresh ingredients and bold Mediterranean flavors, though it leaned a bit on the pricey side with repetitive flavors and combinations.

For bigger groups, I highly recommend starting with the Four Dip Combo—it comes with warm pita bread and four types of house-made dips, each one full of authentic flavor and crafted with care.

The Athenian Burger was a standout dish—juicy, flavorful, and a must-try for anyone visiting. To end on a sweet note, the dessert sampler is a perfect choice. Among the selection, the Baklava ice cream was easily my favorite, balancing sweetness and richness beautifully.

The facility is clean and bright, creating a welcoming and pleasant dining environment. Restrooms are clean, and the entrance faces north.

The service was smooth, and the staff maintained a friendly attitude throughout the visit.

Overall, I recommend this place if you’re in the mood for quality Mediterranean food, and I may return depending on my Greek food appetite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo68fyYg&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2025-4-29"},{"Name":"Tommy Camilo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV-nwWyUdK7k4wHgwPoI8qqOzhyWvW4xanTFvHNOFkVk_DCyL1iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome food & service!!

They also have a QR code where if you snap a pic of your food, they'll donate to a local food bank!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlj-hQNYi0FjJQ2zSvCp_z&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"yaulanda powell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtktdSi81vOKJyMHFmNkV3W-lKKIwiZxW5tKf1Y9zQFxDU9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!   I expected a nice lunch- but was surprised by the great flavors, big portions, and exceptional service!  The manager was terrific and so kind to us.  The gyro was large and flavorful and the feta fries were delicious. The order of dips was big with plenty of pita bread.  The cafe is sunny and decorated cute and very clean.  Go enjoy a great Greek meal!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stefanie Mwaura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV17LgE5XXk59AoOeNgjp9RmroVfn6ETTYJgFwDhgsiR9IXp6c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped in for lunch and had the best salmon Greek salad I’ve ever had! Kelsey, the manager, was incredibly welcoming and helpful. You don’t see customer service like she provided very often anymore. Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAPLAPte4crojScj_0pxF0&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Corrigan Drews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-5Mer7w7cpFSlyfy4esZAWNXiKQtRTBE8DHUPOq7-sT0arpvMXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Wife and I checked this place out last week about an hour before closing and it was very good. The food was fresh and tasty. I loved the salad and spanakopita and Gyro meat . The Dolmas and Falafel were not my favorite but we're not bad just because I have had better. Our favorite by far was the baklava ice cream. Go check it out if in the area","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbhNaoSw&fid=0x0:0xaecd4b09ae0c9cde"],"When":"2024-7-23"},{"Name":"Jeevan Nair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgUhA48Wjtk85uK8E21YXX7w-NUsqVulmcMRU6CQNGPEGnOg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I went there on whim and this was our first time there. We were greeted by the most pleasant lady who introduced us to the menu and helped us place our order. And it wasn't just us. There was couple with two small children who came in behind us and she was just as sweet and helpful with them as well. If not the food (which was excellent!) I would return here for the service and atmosphere. Thank you so much. We were at the restaurant (next the Nebraska furniture Mart in The Colony, TX) at about 3:30 pm on Friday the 12th of Dec. I am giving that detail because I made the regrettable mistake of not asking the name of the lady that waited on us. I apologize.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"JENNIFER DAVIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2jdFhe4gSOV-D5bYk-dHqcBDVHUc_vcdgNPFu6AMXh46AdMU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small family-run burger joint in
a strip mall that is doing it right. We had the Patty Melt, the Hawaiian burger with a turkey patty and onion rings. It was all good. The owner was working behind the counter and was very nice. We’ll be back. The onion rings were really good and the ranch was really creamy. I loved seeing a young daughter happy to be helping her mom.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3eDzepFGk7FUhVCzDzsgp&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Connie Basham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8HAZiXyMOGA9goWe4t0nk7o9iUhyvYiJ8X9Msi6Ibiu_iG4NkGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Classic burger with lettuce, tomato and mayo only and this one did not disappoint. Not a fan of 1/3rd# or 1/2# burgers - so this one was perfect! Good flavor, moist and the bun was really good too! Fries were not my style (too crusty) though as I really prefer old-fashioned fresh-cut which are getting more difficult to find. First time here trying the lunch special "Burger, fries and drink" for $9.99 - will definitely be back when I'm in the mood for a nice, fresh burger.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClisz6DhmZHzK1muVFBPVk&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Vicki Trujillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIsWLZpDGSQolZOY3MWAqqSeWiXOXXMyqEYGWKxP5bomdf9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I ate here for the first time recently. We thought the woman at the cash register was so nice and we really enjoyed our visit there. We each ordered hamburgers 🍔 and they were delightfully big in size.  My husband is a good cook and he said he would give their hamburgers a five 5️⃣. He thought the meat was fresh and juicy, the presentation was outstanding, and the flavor profile was off the charts.  He also enjoyed his sweet potato fries and I liked my onion rings too. I did not get a picture of my onion rings, but they were good as well. We would definitely go there again if we were out that way and we’re so glad we found this little gem of a restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDn5fifVENcuuJsgkcAkHNW&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Frank Sobyak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBuHhnCbl45hp_wGY0PeUQuFT1s085bG3Q0ApzE4h6luAPdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"EDMUNDS IS SERVING UP SOME SERIOUS 5-STAR BURGERS!
Overdelivering for the price, you'll get a great meal and friendly service. Owners took over the spot from JC's Burgers and have taken it a step above with their personalized service. You have to love supporting mom-and-pop businesses that delivers. Thank you for the great experience! We will me back and we will bring our friends. See you soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAY1W6yEfis6O1N6Bfzs_W&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Jen Royalty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0JytclM8YQs0P0CKxW5KSh60VIlVTuR5BuQyBFTtw_CRNtpEP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wanted a good home made style burger so googled best near me and Edmonds pulled up with great reviews. I came around 330pm. The place is hole in the  wall style, nothing fancy about it. Menu has more options than I would think and I hope to return to try some of them. They only have fries, no tater tots which I was sad about. Everything is a la carte. I ordered a cheese burger with fries and a glass coke which was around $15. I tipped $3, but It would be nice if they at least checked in on you or offered to clean up tables. I get some people don’t tip and I wouldn’t really Wana clean up all their mess without tip either. But they can also see who tips so, that’s my opinion. It’s a bit dirty as far as tables go. There was only one family in here when I got here and at least 4 dirty tables. The booth bench with some food crumbs as well. That could improve and be more efficient, table with the family has been gone about 30 min and table not cleaned, not busy. The food came out quick and lacks a little bit of flavor but is good! Served hot and the burger is a double patty which I didn’t know so that’s a plus. It was quiet then they turned on the music which was a bit loud for me. Overall would come back for the food and pricing and recommend for the same reasons.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCgg5m10OmiyTZVQ-opDYM&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Kenechi Anene","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBUippOauAGguSb_QeuiX2PQzGm7quM0HCwSACmUE3XdrmH9k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here yesterday with my best friend for lunch. It was our first time trying this spot. The cheeseburger and loaded fries were so delicious! The food is made fresh so the burgers were fresh and the fries were crispy and loaded. The lady at the register who took our order was so wonderful and polite. And their house made ranch was absolutely DELISH! I will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWRHcGTQzZbcggXbCTEXSZ&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Ahmed Ismail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO7Cli7N0MyAQXG-xEPzrFGvqf5Sv-EWj_nWkMiwhRh00sDtAU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Edmond’s Burgers & More is an absolute hidden gem! The moment you walk in, you’re greeted with a clean, cozy, and welcoming atmosphere. The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive, making you feel right at home.

The burgers are outstanding — juicy, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. The ingredients taste fresh, and the portions are generous. Their fries are crispy and delicious, an absolute must-try!

What I love most is the overall experience — great food, quick service, and a comfortable place to sit and enjoy your meal. Whether you’re dining in or taking out, you won’t be disappointed.

Highly recommend this place to anyone craving quality burgers and sides!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBrzLHMKQlim_QCYEI5uoFT&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"G. Pal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUr9uwKohp71wO-H-oZTIE163MlGvwKyaeORUhQrsRP9U835L0e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Solid Burger joint, Very friendly and Family atmosphere,  Clean Establishment!  The meat is fresh and never frozen, well seasoned, lettuce , tomatoes, onions and pickles are nicely cut. All of this combined and you take one bite and you will know what an Awesome juicy Burger this place makes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXCaX8Fsa-P9p6wD0eEHcC&fid=0x0:0xd37ea868de9a74af"],"When":"2025-10-18"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joshua Ding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZPE1MNTiSYW266d26gwdTqL4M0B5bgmlpc2q-RY2uO7CjIFtW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"February 2026

Clean restaurant with reasonable pricy. Good generous portion and enjoyed the crispy potatoes. Food freshly prepared. Great coffee as well.

Recommended highly will return soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4nFxK47RstK_GrTnZ10eG&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Luna R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTG3oiyPATI1sH8KPcbHkovXCC-_WrqSlN9It_gtWxZURbYAbYKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Very mixed feelings.
I didnt mind the wait time, it was busy and we didnt make a reservation. My water did go unfilled for a good 15 minutes after I finished, but ill chalk it up to the business.
I got the chicken sandwich, and when I got it my fries were already barely warm!! Not even exaggerating I promise, I was considering sending them back but I didnt know how long that'd take as I had already gotten my meal after the other 2 people I was with.
My chicken sandwich was also... underwhelming. It was very thin, and all the flavors were very muted: only the tomato punched through. The last couple of bites my chicken was dry :(
I will probably come back- my friends meals were good, and honestly I liked them better than mine! Hopefully my next visit will be better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdoIkMmgdUxsn3u8BVGmIb&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Carly Cooksey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKeqiGa8Bet4UNFuCbrUXtdU16UuGdaWsHfbOn-mvTKr21yxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this new brunch spot! Bright and welcoming atmosphere, high quality ingredients, and generous portions. So great to have a family owned and run business in the area who take pride in providing a delicious meal and experience! I ordered the classic eggs Benedict - was cooked to perfection!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgW-FZcQiUbyZxoImiQ0mi&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"A-Aron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAxGd-9jgqYu9Xnue3ZnNT-rlEGJDg6hhKsNFKyf3eIbxdgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Snow days in TX? most places still closed- Bliss Brunch House doors were wide open.
Ordered the country omelette and it was excellent—perfectly cooked, came with golden hashbrowns, toast, hit the spot. Servce was excellent too-: friendly, fast, and genuinely happy. Everything about this place delivered.
Five stars. They earned it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeaioQxwbF1yW2XOJPt4hU&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Lillian DeRemus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxeiTG3m4R87Mi5zi-XuDB3sB5NHGLBD9_aszcAwZniCgksSsk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got to tried the new family own business restaurant. The food was so good with good quality and potion. The service was awesome and the atmosphere was very nice. We will definitely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzUSquT5s5ovnzjJyXflCW&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Mariana Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfes1zpJiTChsuk4XXlCAmp4Zk6ZTsuLIFPrFz-dlq5Ztq-Hm2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was delicious and very well served. Me and my friend got the Nutella and banana cinnamon roll French toast, the chicken Venetian panini, and a latte. Everything was delicious and service was fast:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGsAbcC_vsHILyZtt1Qd8o&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"dan george","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvSG5EwGzCwVlZgbqgrcOX5s4a_Nr5pCpp8aIZm5v2izadQTHBxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice little Breakfast/Brunch place next to Dallas Tollway by Costco.

They had a different spin on beignet with Nutella middle.  Had Hot Chicken N Waffles 🧇 😋...

Very clean, responsible priced, and close to home ...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6s2B8h58TtR-ONueHykxn&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"BeanBuds Co","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFaGfKY1dqHzNT6L1jfJ9boqKzWMpMcZy-DFbLcKm_Y-Gv1ezM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried out this new family owned breakfast spot and so glad we did! The food was super tasty, service was quick and friendly, and prices are really reasonable. The French toast was amazing, and the skillets and paninis (especially the Reuben) are worth trying. Definitely a place to check out 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDUQl6CQV1cAteVlTUz7qR&fid=0x0:0x78cd54faf4488f32"],"When":"2025-8-31"}]

[{"Name":"Shaibaz Gadhwala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbFqsXLyVq0o_hsp5Whh0aSuF-sIY_Q0YBVxEBb7t3wZoEYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this place, loved their concept on taking Mediterranean food and blending with casual dining.

The food was served quickly and the ingredients were all fresh. We ordered
the donor salad bowl and the medi bowl and both of them were really awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAo0QADdJUTbwk8zthGNLzY&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"sheida r","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOhjg6tOEaAwP4R0437LBhKckEs8NkOS5iqEEFxN3bgk6L6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere at Spitz is cozy and friendly. The food is truly the star.it’s my favorite spots after gym for a healthy food . I m in love with their sweet potato fries. I ordered the Mediterranean beef and lamb wraps , gyro and it was cooked to perfectly , full of flavor, and beautifully presented.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8znfIPAg_yD8KlDSOuHB-&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Melina Almada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUOP1AeAGyx6-oOmebnLiyonO0npCPONB9a_z2A-ao1bgQnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service was very good, everyone was incredibly kind, and the food was delicious. I ordered the vegan gyro and it was amazing 😍. I would definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrLCzVwh5hHBVyryR7E74u&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Madhu Sudan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK4CJk6SjDFyvzm76T3scp3hBNLyMbqqUMwnHXwojmOZYCcihJ9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited Spitz Mediterranean in Frisco and tried two items –> the Street Cart Fries (regular, no protein – $11) and the Chicken Tikka Bowl ($14.50). Both dishes were really satisfying in their own ways. The fries were the star of the meal for me  -> thin, perfectly crispy, and topped with just the right blend of flavors that made each bite addictive. The Chicken Tikka Bowl was flavorful and hearty, a great option if you’re looking for something filling. Considering the portion sizes and the quality, I felt the pricing was fair. Overall, a spot I’d be happy to return to, especially for those fries!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEke4NDiDR99WlKXYEvePA&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-8-20"},{"Name":"Local Guide Level 10","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2Xs7iayhAVgAEBEOr-rkLL7xygzHCjvjuf7NtxyqKP35W_X8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Warning! This place is a disaster! Food was bad, it was old food, cold food, nothing here is fresh! Pita bread was hard as a rock! The sauces in the wrap taste old, The service is bad, lady was on her phone all the time, cooks don'tknow how to cook food, place was so dirty with trash on floor, door is greasy and disgusting! This restaurant is going to make someone sick soon! Everyone needs to be retrained or let go! I do not recommend this place! Inspector should do a real time bacteria test! I normally do not like to give bad reviews but this place was so disgusting the public needs to be warned before someone gets sick!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8DMIBu2Utgc6F7JqXscdu&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Buzz Carrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCOO3RSNO9IbfmTJb2wpfqfXopNDx3yxWy7CGcYmUMveKujMgEMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic place, I had the Street Cart Fries with chicken. Fantastic flavors, amazing fries, very large portions. Loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-ubUAJQZ3ZjIHFrFaUaak&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"M. S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzJNEfGYCXEf3YekJpNYIvcQ5XDldKWwipgsDRiRUqpy5syEBx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We have usually ordered to-go from here. The staff is very kind and friendly. The food is pretty decent. We love the remix bowl, berliner bowl and the paneer tikka bowl.
The problem is with the packaging. For a to-go order, the packaging is quite bad. This is the 2nd time that the food leaked / fell in the carry bag. And this time, it leaked so much, that the carry on bag tore because of the leaked bag and the food fell in the car.
My only suggestion is, please check food is packed properly before it's picked and the lids are secure.
It's no fun cleaning leaked food from the car and the smell that lasts for days is another thing altogether.
Else, all okay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPdcgCEajwJMeUQrGy9zwt&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Rashmi Kalra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8KfxkeFTq6TQim9g72XHf7aOhx-t15yRYAZS7bpB1tlCoYSkESQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Spitz is an absolute hit – a must-try spot!
We recently visited with family and were blown away by the flavors and variety. We tried the chicken bowl, falafel remix bowl, sweet potato waffle fries, and the standout item – paneer tikka fries.

Now, I’m usually not a fan of fries, but these paneer tikka fries completely changed my mind – so unique and flavorful, they’re a full meal for any vegetarian. The portion sizes are generous, the taste is outstanding, and the pricing is very reasonable.

If you haven’t tried Spitz yet and are wondering where to go for a delicious family meal this weekend – this is the place. Trust me, you won’t regret it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENXDm-jUvtChtAE&fid=0x0:0xf3bba4496f0cb521"],"When":"2025-5-19"}]

I would highly recommend coming here!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Las Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpqoK_1C0W99dqoYajYyD0j51la0MkAd1ZJzXBsEhJt8bLYA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Never been in before today but thanks to Hannah’s unmatched hospitality and Nico’s spot on menu recommendation (Tilapia Sandwich 11/10) I’ll be back with the  fam. The food was presented elegantly and the environment was clean and welcoming.\nCan’t wait for more!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKv4dwsgSTCuRqRcPE00aZijDfpC_DH4lkNh-JBwUj8P-0ac9Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love when I walk into a place and you are greeted with hello how are you? [{"Name":"Jemy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaY7WmEEnuny-Jtp-3MfyCpSskwha_Vx0uNsphkv4VPbgqg-8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello Everyone! I’m gladly homered to share my wonderful experience over here! Starting with the beautiful decor and interior design ! Such an amazing peaceful place!!! Moving to the food I got the bowl with beef and 7 ingredients as you can see some veggies, salad, yogurt, hummus etc .. Very delicious and pure food!! I also got the PITA chicken sandwich !! Very amazing and delicious as well !! Moving to what made this experience such a unique   one is Mr. Sizard ~ the chief (hope I spelled that right!) ~ He recommended the magic sauce on the pita sandwich and it was absolutely on point.. Also such a fresh made juice .. Very tasty 😋.
Everything was perfect. The customer service was truly exceptional, he was kind, welcoming, generous, and just an all-around beautiful soul. You can tell he genuinely cares about his customers. Great food, great energy, and an even greater person. I’ll definitely be back for sure inshallah!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoDWTs3xDbWh0MlevmlZ4V&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Angela Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJl88qKDsv9MI8AbxEnIY4-5OA3rn9w0LmoU9AS-o8HHF-70g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"​We recently visited Selda Gyro Doner with a large party of 17 people, and the staff was incredibly nice and accommodating. Handling our big group effortlessly truly impressed us!
​The food was also outstanding:
​My Wrap was absolutely so good.
​The Bowls ordered by others were spoken of just as highly.
​Don't skip the Turkish Tea—it was amazing!
​Highly recommend this spot for both the delicious Turkish cuisine and their top-tier hospitality, even for large groups. Would definitely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1iZRJ21ffXz8M4fr_Pxu0&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"S Saed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbN4McVpnBZBJSI6lja6X0KblBxI3TqYrIXKtaPeq72SgMOnI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience at Selda Gyro Doner! I’m very satisfied. The staff were excellent, friendly, and welcoming. I ordered the Iskender, and the meat was incredibly delicious and flavorful. The chef clearly knows his craft—skilled, kind, and outstanding. They were very generous and even served me tea and baklava on the house. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGubhXQLngYpy2XKAsuhv9&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Serdar Cayir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlzy4xPPFQWu1E2T_zSxsxAJfZKBnORz4q5NSgPx-AFLuIJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Selda Doner and was extremely satisfied with everything. The restaurant is very clean and hygienic, and you can immediately feel that from the moment you walk in. The staff are friendly, warm, and genuinely attentive to their guests.
All the dishes were fresh, very tasty, and perfectly suited to my taste, with generous portions. The cozy atmosphere, along with the fast and high‑quality service, made us feel completely at home. I am truly grateful to the entire team at Selda Doner for caring so much about hygiene and guest satisfaction, and I definitely recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAa_aXTqHx4okwQdELeeTqs&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Mahmut Usta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUugMmkqxhqJD54Ahx92GtRkV4FPq30D7jEjpTRJweCCz8sNVpe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited a Selda Gyro döner in Dallas and was really impressed! The food was absolutely delicious the döner was flavorful and juicy. The place was also very clean and well kept, which made the experience even better. They offered a wide variety of sides, which was a pleasant surprise. Everything was fresh and well-prepared. Definitely worth a visit if you're craving authentic Turkish flavors!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEP4eZ5Mac-W6LyAUm7oD9&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"hakan solak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj0IF28CaQcKg0mC9aS9gLZnRqkn4RattYE2Lu-SMiGT5_uxR1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited this Turkish Doner Kebap place in Dallas and was blown away by how authentic and delicious everything was. The doner meat was perfectly seasoned, tender, and juicy. It was just like what you’d find in Istanbul. The portions were generous, and the fresh bread and sides really completed the meal. Very warm atmosphere and generous owners! My go-to place whenever I am in hurry and want to get delicious bite!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXh59Wxu7kekO1e7-DTFZi&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Erica A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4u9G69_yYEKmVqBnkNTZ6CqsbtPSByPWeYcumaj1SrjDjX_pT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was excited to try this new outpost of the local Selda brand. More businesses than I can count have failed in this location, but I hope they do well.

I came in around 1:30 on a Tuesday. Despite being after the lunch rush, there were several other people in the dining room, which is clean and bright with tables and booths. Turkish pop music was being played, but not too loudly, making for a welcoming and comfortable environment. The setup is build-your-own (think Chipotle), but they cooked my meatballs fresh upon ordering.

The bowl includes the choice of 7 options from the components/toppings, and each was fresh, colorful, and clearly labeled. I went with Turkish rice, hummus, tzatziki, arugula, lightly pickled cabbage, some chickpea salad and shepherd salad. I also orders some bread, and they have a big variety of bottled and canned drinks available. There is a small bakery case of delicious looking desserts, but i skipped that today. The portions are generous, and it was absolutely delicious. The meatballs were high-quality and well seasoned. No notes.

The gentleman that served me said the bakery 2 doors down will be opening in about 2 weeks. I can’t wait to come back for more doner and a beautiful dessert.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCC5HHJdvKhcACdyA9_ycJ8&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Didier Grande","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI428UB5S613FZxNA4lj5JCD9LRqFeCJaMN305l9MJuyIyynA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was craving Mediterranean food and I’m happy to have run into this place, everything was so delicious! It feels truly authentic and the staff was very friendly. The Turkish tea went great with my meal. The place itself is real cozy with plenty of seating, and plenty of parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJA6nt6IW67H7Bwp74HmtK&fid=0x0:0xda911f221f824538"],"When":"2026-1-2"}]

[{"Name":"Ava Harrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKx9lArhMrOoTSGHCnWVqauVRsw0cFCR6lrLls4yPE4pRB5bQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A hidden gem for brunch lovers

Aroma Breakfast and Lunch Cafe in the Collin Creek area is such a delightful find. The space is bright, spacious, and comfortable, with plenty of seating and a genuinely pleasant, if strip mall, atmosphere. The staff is warm and friendly, which immediately makes you want to linger.

There is even a “secret” beverage menu available for in-cafe customers, which adds a fun little insider touch. I tried a latte, and it was everything you want from a hot latte: smooth, comforting, and delicious.

But what truly inspired me to write this review was the shakshuka. Oh my goodness. The shakshuka. Exquisite, perfectly cooked, and divinely spiced. I fell in love with shakshuka at the InterContinental in Manhattan and have been chasing that experience ever since. This was my fifth attempt in the North Dallas, Plano, and Frisco area, and I was starting to think I would never find one that lived up to that memory. Then I hit pay dirt at Aroma.

The eggs were cooked to absolute perfection: firm whites and yolks in that magical sweet spot between runny and just set. Every bite was rich, flavorful, and deeply satisfying.

If you love brunch or are on a quest for great shakshuka, Aroma is absolutely worth a visit. We will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_D9lreJlwKCPNgWPboyfi&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Brenda M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKg-cp5tZwQ1Z1CaDl9Pq5PSq7JSE__gGyXYpudE6UuC5v-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant was my first time there, and the food left a lasting impression. It has a clean and inviting atmosphere. The staff greeted us promptly, and we were immediately seated.

I opted for the Shakshuka. The eggs were simmered in a rich tomato-based sauce, garnished with fresh parsley. I added the beef sausage to my dish, and it was served with warm pita bread.

My daughter chose the banana, strawberry Nutella French toast, along with a side of scrambled eggs and crispy beef bacon. Both my meal and my daughter’s were well-seasoned and flavorful.

Overall, I highly recommend this restaurant. The food was delicious, the service was attentive, and the atmosphere was welcoming. It’s a place that we will definitely be returning to in the future. My daughter left her plate sparkling clean—yes, it’s that good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDv5N69wgn30kBYbBnLh0JF&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"Doaa Ibrahim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBTztlPl8Z2-yjoHW6skdhgKKFZbfzkS_ZBwjx9Kiq-UZlXZn0ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you to the owners for being so welcoming. We were a big group celebrating a friend, and they even put on music for us. The service was 10/10—very fast, and all the meals arrived almost at the same time. The food was beyond amazing; we enjoyed Syrian dishes and appetizers, along with chicken and beef sandwiches.
I will definitely be coming back, and I highly recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASn_oONwIrPkma-KzZGhtT&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Goya No Machiawase","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrUQvFBetkiztjb27lLdcr1mTb1qNp7Ag_1aZUND0AMHz8Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was there with a friend experienced in the cuisine. He said that it was the best gyro fatteh that he has ever had. I tried it, and I don't doubt it. He may not have thought the shakshuka was amazing, but it was one of the better ones I've had.

I myself had the omelet. It was the best omelet I've had from an American breakfast joint. Not that I've had too many, due to most of them being disappointing. But this one was good. Good eggs, good seasoning, well stuffed. No extra charge on the pita bread, and all at a reasonable price.

I don't eat breakfast out much still. But if I do, this'll be one of the first places I think of.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkI-0PfLO1XojOj6zTSAQ7&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Brandi Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVh2AIz-Or712hPRNcPlrTpPzijWDSWP2Czu1VnabKUl0SwB5N3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found this new spot driving back to San Antonio and it was wonderful.
We had Chicken Fetteh, Shakshuka and the Syrian waffle.
We were so full and the staff was very friendly and accommodating.
Abdullah, the owners son, came to greet us and made sure everything was great.
Would definitely come back when in the area.
Wish we lived closer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1JkykUdqO1HTvtr4uLONU&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Shamila Yasmin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7H7PajWXyCRKBDiufU82OdrKr-LE6TZZF29AfU370heCAI8vhfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a warm and refreshing experience at this brunch place! Large dining hall + beautiful decor + friendly, welcoming and attentive staff + all zabiha halal. I was so happy to finally be able to order a meat lover's omelet! And my side was a Syrian fusion pancake that was straight up delicious! The coffee was perfect as well. I intend to return many a time and will try the lunch items next time:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7N-PvyCU0kRKaxFrh8rTg&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"TARIQ KHAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG1hqaZKsIHYjZa8pa1b-ZNiyTGoUhXtmbZoM2vPEAnmiMPtL0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for something different halal  breakfast and brunch near my hotel and after google search came to this come to this place with family . Very well maintained place and courteous service by all Muslim servers . I tried chicken fajita omelette and my daughter and wife shared shakshouka and strawberry banana pancakes , must say every thing was fresh  and delicious and would highly recommended. Atmosphere is almost all Muslim customers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC16YFrums168wGh5QCOh8g&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Shaikh Tariq Hussain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVU3R9Ed6lCiPpKtNQReAEh_P3hAaseH7mv97rlJXszyd2WbYI-iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We tried this place breakfast last weekend, and I was super impressed. I was craving an IHOP-style American breakfast and honestly needed a break from idli/dosa and halwa puri.
The food was delicious and the service was excellent. We ordered Banana Nutella pancakes, Meat lovers omelette, and a traditional breakfast. Everything was spot on. Highly recommend this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmHYxM2A36dTaMTTYHiYml&fid=0x0:0x80f834c28ce3d402"],"When":"2025-12-17"}]

[{"Name":"Andrew Stavros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhbzFSeil3bv3M97i-mtl3QMDNUjyRnhqPOG8cxk7zh7AaoMhb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic. Quality. Fast.
That’s all you need to know! This place nails Mediterranean flavor every single time. Since opening, I’ve enjoyed their food several times — and it’s consistently fresh, delicious, and served quickly. Whether you’re grabbing lunch on the go or sitting down for a satisfying meal, you can taste the authenticity in every bite. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWMEWOLuWHAuVAqCo1Ivy7&fid=0x0:0x31d3003dd6535726"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Jeff Meeker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVk-8W4D_hX3fNiTAjgOg7_BsLItZ5VzeReGmMhwlZeQCQAgYCT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty gyro.  Ordered the regular, made with lamb.  Meat has a lot of flavor. Fresh vegetables and sauce.  Served up quickly and I found it to be very good value for the money I paid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC3z1GobmJ6xM3_fwe5PHJ&fid=0x0:0x31d3003dd6535726"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Thomas Pinto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6uU-RT-CE95RUBrd_9NKXQc5uwRG6OXPk8HZ50oSyszqafQX7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s been a while I have had food and service of this quality. First thing one would notice is the quantity of food for the price. Then the taste. Got to give them a hug for that. The other good thing is the freshness. Can’t find many places serving this fresh and tasty food. And the guys helping out were awesome. Now I have one more reason to say I like coming to Dallas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paradigm Shift","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzpmUsVIttkTuWGAnI04ngTJxMXeI97oovGHLZFcsyrULMbhk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love a good gyro, but I had never had these fries before and I clearly wasn’t living my life right.  Customer service was top tier. 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtUn2Y0oCOEcj7zEn5VYvz&fid=0x0:0x31d3003dd6535726"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Jesus Pesina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK97YxQl61hwngSdJ8AtiLXvw-ObN92zCW7Z_rjUCZCuX9Ylw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pulled into this plaza aiming to eat at another spot, saw the sign and wanted to try it. I go in and the two dudes are churning out orders boom boom boom! Although they were a little swamped they said hi to me and asked me for my order. That courtesy means alot and I didnt mind waiting a little bit.

All the dishes I saw them make were packed with food. These guys really feed you! And even though they were pressed for time, they didnt sacrifice presentation.

I ordered the Gyro with Greek Fries and Baklava... just look at the pics! Everything Fresh... Everything Hot... Everything I hoped for.

Cant wait to come back and try other things. Thank you! Wish yall the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqKQx7rZNHO5Wha6PXeaGW&fid=0x0:0x31d3003dd6535726"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Cory Hinojosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_OE9raBZijR3_OmonBbgsMVhdMBUR-ViryiXm07fi5sq1OA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean store, fast service, and friendly staff. The only thing I’m upset about is that I didn’t know about this place sooner! Idk how they’re able to provide this quantity and quality of food for such an agreeable price, but it was worth every penny. Everything tasted fantastic and super fresh. I can’t wait to try the rest of what they have to offer! I highly suggest the getting a Plate, (I had the gyro) but I bet anything you get will be just as good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristin Calvert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlvefRZFGp4KwqFs0Ct-ixMkJUrs7TREEXV7sIAD9dIH-mEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sort of wish I didn't try their food last night since I'm pretty sure their hummus is going to ruin most other hummus for me. Traditional gyros were delicious! Quality & quantity not lacking. The falafel were a good size, had great flavor, & were cooked well. None of those dry, crumbly, overcooked messes around here.

Their garlic/white sauce was thicker than I'm accustomed to - would've preferred a thinner sauce with more garlic. The greek fries were a miss for us with little flavor & cool temp, but delivery might've played a part in that.

It's nice to have a healthier quick food option nearby, especially on the kids' sports nights. So good!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Haitham AL-rousan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwDeVi6gbTnCKQtbUy_i6eOV_qyvEIUHCyoyudeLQ8tuIw1k3P-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best halal gyro spots in Dallas. The food is fresh, flavorful, and absolutely delicious. The place is very clean, and the atmosphere is welcoming.

Khalid and Sultan are incredibly kind and genuine  they really make you feel at home. Amazing food, beautiful people. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Eileen Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGL-MQbTaBoowZfzmWNe1SW6Unv1t_p79v2gLoDvDHv49pwwPP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here for brunch with friends and had a great experience. The staff were very friendly—usually I only get a quick “hi/bye” at places, but the person who took my order actually made some light small talk, which was really nice. The food was delicious and felt healthy without sacrificing flavor. The only thing I wish is that they had coffee on the drink menu, but other than that everything was perfect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNQ9tDU3wygXZ9QJenGnf7&fid=0x0:0xe9df3454cde6795b"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Jake Myers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqNGZGqWgInC67Hq9pHY-QWSG_VzTpymeLRoLQ4EwhNrli2JOj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been dining at this location for the past year or so and have never had a bad experience.

THE FOOD is always soooo fresh, delicious and filling. I would recommend their not so fried chicken sandwich to anyone dining here for the first time. Its an interesting spin on a fried sandwich and is my go to order. I have tried most of their salads and sandwiches and haven't sound one I didn't like. Their green drink and lemonade options are also bomb.

THE SERVICE is top notch. I had the pleasure of working with one of their catering specialists, Alan, who helped me plan a 120 person catering order. I know it is hard for restaurants to juggle a big order like that and still manage in store needs, but the catering order arrived a few minutes early and we were all raving about the food. They have been added into our rotation.

THE ATMOSPHERE is casual and clean. While you can bus your own tables, I usually get stopped midway to bus my tray by a staff member who offers to do it for me. The music is the perfect volume and I have never had a problem finding an available clean table.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kaylie Mynar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOnMK6OmBVSVsXkQ_l3Ar_UUT3BytWVJqq1-pgQfdKcGX2i59-EA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been here a few times but today ordered lunch in for a few in our office due to us working over lunch. Everyone loved what they got! I had the bahn mi 1/2 sandwich and holy cow, I was so surprised at how delicious it was. The flavors were perfect and the bread so fresh. I also had the chicken soup which was very tasty. We all ordered the lemon cheesecake cookie and were very happy with that choice. I found a new lunch spot!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessie Cintron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgHvNcacFqCFkE9_kKrODva6RTBIKUruMbuOg-PBalzMhraUg3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Perfect Lunch Spot!

Stopped by Mendocino Farms at Legacy West for lunch and it did not disappoint! The corn and hatch soup was packed with flavor, and the steak sandwich was absolutely amazing — tender, juicy, and full of bold taste. Add in that guava drink (SO good) and you’ve got the perfect combo. Chill vibe, quick service, and fresh, delicious food. Definitely one of my new favorite lunch spots in Plano!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiac9m_gBa3WrlrDgA2YDY&fid=0x0:0xe9df3454cde6795b"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"Mariana Betancourt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyDIAntlateRlGI9qVMH9oAHGOHMGeoMj_j5ax4YwUP9dBzfygeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience at Mendocino Farms! The food was fresh and delicious, and the atmosphere was very welcoming. The entire hospitality team was incredibly nice and made us feel comfortable from the moment we arrived. A special thank you to Katherine, who took care of us, she was extremely kind, attentive, and provided excellent service. We will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsy Hines","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVL6tdMb4xMdR3_50Sy64V5OFF3zHXdeg7P1QQm0tWw7y8RXwMgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mendocino Farms is so yummy I wish I could dine here so much more often!

My 4 stars is simply my disappointment in the cost. The Farm Club is so hearty, delicious and flavorful. One afternoon I stumbled upon this when I was visiting Legacy West for something else and grabbed the Farm Club to go. It was delicious! So when my hubby & I found ourselves here a few days later running errands, I was looking forward to the Farm Club again. I know a sandwich can just be a sandwich, but the bread is a HUGE part and this bread holds when you eat the sandwich, it doesn't fall apart. It doesn't get soggy with the spread and the turkey has a great taste too.

But ugh $12.50 plus tax for a sandwich is just too hard to swallow.

While my hubby and I sat there eating our sandwiches we were both shocked and bummed the two sandwiches in front of us cost us $30!

If dropping $12-$15 for a sandwich is in your budget I highly recommend Mendocino Farms!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAA7CTm8clnTFHN3a5LVego&fid=0x0:0xe9df3454cde6795b"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"JD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvwzUh0bc90aB35TiLs3smQ76HA3jq0oCf1NnWW-D-ehU9ww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had an extremely disappointing experience with the customer service at the Legacy West Mendocino Farms.

I placed a large catering order totaling nearly $500 for a scheduled pickup at 12:30 PM. When I arrived, I spoke with an employee named Katherine and asked about the order. She told me they had no record of it. Even after I showed her my email confirmation, she continued to insist that I must have placed the order at the wrong location or that I hadn’t actually completed the order.

After going back and forth for about 20 minutes between her continuing to work on other orders, I went to the front counter and spoke with Ruby and asked if I could speak with the manager. I was told the manager was “too busy” to come out. I showed Ruby my confirmation email, and she went to the back room and immediately returned with the order.

So the order had been ready the entire time.

Instead of acknowledging the mistake or apologizing for the delay and confusion, I was simply handed the receipt and told, “Sign here please.” After being accused of not placing the order or ordering from the wrong location, the lack of accountability and basic customer service was extremely disappointing.

I asked that the manager follow up with me about the situation, but I have yet to hear anything.

This is not the first time I’ve placed a large order at this location, but it will absolutely be the last. When customers spend hundreds of dollars and plan events around a scheduled pickup, they deserve professionalism, communication, and at the very least, a simple apology when something goes wrong.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Komal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrXf98iUERgxag8tHBKm8P60HEDA_z1LWyqvA_Qa_uT5f5j7Cs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the chicken hummus vegan wrap. Delicious, spicy. I opted out of the pita chips and pickled onions. The garlic sauce is delicious. Also loved the side dish basil pesto pasta.
Online order and pickup was super convenient and quick! They place the to gos on the rack near the side door that opens to the garages. Easy to grab and go during lunch hours. My lunch was ready before the time listed when I ordered. Truely appreciate it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN-_wuSD89a-qwE&fid=0x0:0xe9df3454cde6795b"],"When":"2025-5-15"}]

[{"Name":"Joshua Ding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZPE1MNTiSYW266d26gwdTqL4M0B5bgmlpc2q-RY2uO7CjIFtW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"February 2026

Drove by this restaurant very often but decide to try it today. Very welcome and delightful greeting from the owners. This is a neighborhood store but this kind of cruise.
My meat pizza was kind of burnt on the side but nice crust regardless. Tastes healthy and mediocre flavor. Chicken and beef shawarma were freshly prepared with fresh ingredients but portion was on the weak side.

Good experience over all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9-DRli8vLgBE-w2Mmpxmf&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"M Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqt3oFdNXL-h9lB62XMZ_FtE6vf_IzxpejDozP4GdH3YY7xGA4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While most of the time, I order Fadia's for delivery, whenever I get to stop by at the location to eat, it's always a joy! The food is incredible - in my top ten restaurants of Plano, no question - & the owners are kind & generous. The akawi cheese pizzas are so simple & so tasty, but all of the pies are delicious. The hummus & garlic dips are outstanding! Every single thing I've tried, I LOVED.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sara Bseiso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIcd08202hJ6IXePLA9r_X42yVpnFWtGpNLcVrcum7tNxBiq3b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"100% recommended food is beyond expectation. We ordered one half half pie, one meat, one cheese with veggies and one zaatar with cheese. All were delicious, Fadia the owner is so humble and sweet she offered us figs and coffee. If you ever find yourself in Plano Fadia’s is the place to go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAw6D6VLxNDLONOEwstrYey&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2025-8-6"},{"Name":"Sumer K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7PI1pAohodCPnmvVmU-6WpbGV-NtAY2Sb7qr128-eBoBJ29o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Super delicious food, i am so glad i found this bakery, it will be my new go-to spot. Tried the meat pie, kishik, cheese and zaatar and all were amazing! The owners are very nice and lovely, we had a great time meeting them and getting to know them. We will be back for sure!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo0sC5kwE&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2025-4-15"},{"Name":"Rehab Kirmani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0c_Lpp0LBHXBc3zJElWW8CFAQ8GlcKAlDfL-e_N9m-d3G97BYxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fadia’s Lebanese Deli & Bakery in Plano is seriously a gem! We tried the Zaatar & Cheese Pie and the Soujuk Pie — both came out hot, fresh, and full of flavor. The dough is soft but perfectly crisped at the edges, and the cheese is gooey without being greasy. They’ve got a great variety from Shawarma wraps to Fattoush salad, and even baklawa and maamoul for dessert. Everything tastes homemade. Nice staff and a cozy vibe — 10/10 recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJqfqpfT7PGdYw&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Grace Fulton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIGfWjdOgbBwMBvXDU9gvQzH6dBBV0itrOJ1C4-tb1xWjyy1Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I haven't been to the restaurant yet.  But, I have been gifted a container of their baklava two times. It is fabulous.  Perfectly prepared in a very professional presentation each time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abdallah “Dooly” Ismail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjGJjRJ1vtKTZiH-JZjGIOWIhZvXqkI7ZfY8guCmvt7VI_wH0d=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been here twice and I wasn’t disappointed both times. Y’all have a returning customer for life, this is the best shawarma I’ve had in Plano hands down. The food is made to order fresh so it’s hot and delicious. The friendly Lebanese man and woman running the place or a joy to talk to. They have a plethora of Mediterranean groceries if you need.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqyMLiNg&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2021-6-26"},{"Name":"Sanaz Canada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdtB2-EZ86vLTyFsJ1o2AdlnJreHWefV0IndB00aoZWS0Y9c7trg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Used to be good, not anymore! I ordered what I used to order Akawi pie. When I took it home I see they put 2 little cheese bite, like finger snack. The price is high. Also they give the burned food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClOnfVn06USiBJU-v9BJCt&fid=0x0:0x616609271938c046"],"When":"2025-7-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamal Khoury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIuQFzHuCMqhw2BpgoN8n_gJf8HqPQ0MjQfWOLUJYA1GlWjJpc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re searching for authentic Middle Eastern comfort food that tastes like it was made straight from a family kitchen, look no further than Original Shawerma. This place truly lives up to its name — serving the best shawerma ever, crafted with passion, precision, and a whole lot of love. The shawerma here is nothing short of incredible — tender, juicy meat seared to perfection, wrapped in soft, house-made sage bread that adds a distinctive aroma and flavor you won’t find anywhere else. Each bite bursts with freshness and perfectly balanced spices that make you crave more.
But the magic doesn’t stop at the shawerma. The falafel is light, crispy, and full of herbs, proving that simple ingredients can still pack a punch. The hummus is velvety smooth and absolutely to die for — creamy, rich, and served with warm pita that makes you forget about carbs altogether. Every dish feels like a celebration of flavor, with attention to detail that speaks to genuine culinary passion.
Adding to the charm is the owner, who’s not only talented but also hilarious — greeting customers with warmth, humor, and genuine hospitality that makes the experience unforgettable. Dining at Original Shawerma isn’t just about eating; it’s about feeling at home. The food, the laughter, and the energy all come together to create something truly special. Once you try it, you’ll understand why people can’t stop talking about this little gem — it’s pure joy on a plate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7wsy_vHXlfEROjuNewtqb&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Nive S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULkGhFG56YEjc_aa8gIL4_-4FM4WfyWN6GIIOaQhI5jz3k5SCo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place has a welcoming atmosphere and a clean dining area. The food was flavorful and presented well, although the portion size could be slightly larger for the price. Service was polite and professional throughout our visit. It is not perfect, but overall it provides a solid and enjoyable dining experience with consistent quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjhcXaYtV853Qw-XzmZ1QE&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Sara Musaad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-ianLJxgKvpT79rmQ2XFqZAKzkXABGWo8t9m98V7tBhaR1nxx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried both the Arabic shawarma and the wrap, and they were absolutely delicious. The flavor was very classic and authentic, with a perfectly balanced and tasty seasoning. Everything tasted fresh and well-prepared. Highly recommended for anyone who loves good shawarma.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKn9fXJJLZoA4c6nv2Nu2I&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Madhu Sudan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK4CJk6SjDFyvzm76T3scp3hBNLyMbqqUMwnHXwojmOZYCcihJ9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Original Shawarma is our goto spot for chicken shawarma in this area. The Chicken Arabi with fries ($12.99) is our absolute favorite. Also tried the chicken shawarma bowl ($12.99) with rice, lettuce, olives, and jalapeños, great option if you want something filling. The regular chicken shawarma ($8.99) is solid too. Well maintained dine-in space, quick service, and they also have outdoor seating. Highly recommended if you’re craving good shawarma in the Plano area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA6khpVSmd0xyf-yXexWhC&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Rehan Zarak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe_LTg0hD3VrJ_V0BSgKUQTejxHvoC98fiVSNbD7n_oz3goTML=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ordered the Chicken Shawarma Arabi style. The shawarma flavor was okay. Felt like it could use some more seasoning or sauce. The seasoned fries and pickles were good. Atmosphere is nice. Will come back to try the beef shawarma.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRBISpYCvzkIZlwIpbAOrt&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"A Camacho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgkTKZiJneCtVOywQUbztMFNoif-8gig7q4OzUCJ4iKQks3XvjHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dined in, chose the chicken bowl. Chicken was a little dry, but overall the meal was good. Very flavorful and the portion was more than enough. I like the unique drink options, and the place was clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAK0fTl-jZrx3hOBuvJeXZS&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Mohamed Mohamed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMsFNft8qPuwiq6gcdiZ5GztZMea3252jbAyYLqGwnD44rE4fBEA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every single time I visit the Original Shawarma House, it’s a 10/10 experience! The food is always incredibly fresh and full of flavor as my son puts it, “it’s hitting!” I usually go for the Shawarma bowl, and it’s so good it leaves me wanting more… which is why I often grab a second one to go! I just wish there were more locations around so I could enjoy it even more often. This place never misses!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDicmlMqg1LAIGPkhSkxnFR&fid=0x0:0xa71bb470ed6fdd45"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Tareq Abunaser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUzYAYkO8XNqJYXjIrV2r4DW0Z8F5eKphKFBLQJcss00A0DqSy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience, The food was absolutely incredible — rich in flavor, perfectly seasoned, and truly authentic. If you’re looking for Halal options, they have them here, which makes it even better for anyone specifically searching for Halal food.

From the first bite, you can tell the dishes are made with care and real traditional recipes. Everything tasted fresh and full of spices in the best way possible. The service was just as impressive — friendly, attentive, and welcoming, making the whole experience even more enjoyable.

Honestly, while you’re sitting there, you almost forget you’re here — it really feels like you’ve been transported straight to Middle East. If you love authentic Mediterranean cuisine or want to try something new, I highly recommend original shawarma .","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Steve Malkoc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVnVgE2DbiX612h75WheQgmMzxRy-Hc0xdFRhCRkz0VZ8gnUE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I discovered this family-owned Turkish restaurant inside Horizon Turkish Market, and it was an amazing experience.
The food is absolutely delicious authentic, fresh, and full of flavor.
Their desserts are especially incredible and a must-try. I highly recommend this place if you’re looking for real Turkish cuisine!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBG19RmpakQTnMXhEEX4jjE&fid=0x0:0x204d7cceca22251d"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Nate Spillers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKV6TQOZ4_gUbO8x4k6gRsYBUGm4_wkYfc7cwVhGH9jf3QkAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Horizon Cafe is a great spot. The food is consistently fresh and delicious, with generous portions and great flavor. The atmosphere is welcoming and relaxed, making it a perfect place to grab a meal or coffee. Staff is friendly, attentive, and makes you feel right at home. Everything I’ve tried has been excellent—definitely a place worth coming back to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M Cee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJS40WFDAmG6n2v5ZUthAvNolnlkLGfyJGyaSd9GmRPl8wIcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food, friendly service and a great price.  A hidden gem that needs to shine.  Doner plate with rice was excellent, I recommend trying the Lahmacun (aka Turkish Pizza). The Doner Wrap (Yufka) was delicious, as were the succulent deserts.  The only thing that topped the food was the service, it felt like we were eating at a family home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Salih B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQzBbuc394iccaI1Ic5f40rXjKpFZ7mYKMITFgUZIISqp3SlI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their Boshnak börek is absolutely delicious—fresh, flaky, and full of flavor, just like homemade. The bagels are also very good: soft on the inside, nicely baked, and perfect with tea or coffee. You can tell they care about quality and tradition. Definitely a spot I would come back to and recommend to anyone who loves authentic pastries.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU8ha8bDJpMyij8Kw-YA_7a9yX4E_UQFGsA3qjsbcFlN0EQS8G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It sounds like Horizon Cafe & Kitchen is a place where trust and good food go hand in hand! If you’re looking for a great experience, just ask for Hamza—he’ll make sure you get top-notch service. Definitely worth a visit!
Deserves more than 5 stars","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDInsrQlgE&fid=0x0:0x204d7cceca22251d"],"When":"2025-4-10"},{"Name":"Olay B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJL9f8QH0hkhVtNXyh--uIBVaUN_1ugj0o_7eWp7WeAk2MbCjI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was recommended by a friend at my gym. The food is incredible. It's being run by the owners so you get personal touch. The food is incredible and well priced. They served hot tea as a compliment which was the icing on the cake.
If you don't know about the place, it is hard to find. It is located inside a grocery store. So let the word spread in an effort to flourish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Omar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJG2pNUG2gH80vJYFj1yNKVhjtnvafFoCiKJDK4CYZPolo23ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely delicious! I came in for a quick bite and was blown away. The kelle paça soup was rich, comforting, and full of flavor — perfectly balanced with just the right amount of garlic and vinegar. You can tell it’s made from scratch, not the powdered kind some places serve.

The beef döner over rice was equally satisfying. Tender, well-seasoned slices of beef layered generously over buttery rice, with fresh salad and just enough sauce to tie everything together.

Portions are generous, prices are fair, and the food comes out fast and hot. Whether you’re in a rush or just craving something hearty and authentic, this spot hits the mark. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBC7Cv03ZtcsCSfryP821u6&fid=0x0:0x204d7cceca22251d"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"R. ilhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGSNvoTjpNf4WX4zSIaXG5STORFcnvrjn75CvPlin2rRcL5ckU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There’s something magical about a warm, fresh spinach and meat Gozleme – it’s like it’s been touched by the hands of your mother, full of love and care. The perfect blend of savory flavors wrapped in a golden. Simply unforgettable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvp5SbQA&fid=0x0:0x204d7cceca22251d"],"When":"2024-12-24"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark Sheah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqlqPycS_OLuztJCM4BAuatX7DO1rPDPL_NzzEjBBjl3hAGa-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Last time I went with my family over 5 years ago at least, finally went back recently and it’s still quite nice! The saganaki appetizer was fantastic. I ordered the Moussaka which was pretty good, was surprised how much I liked the soup, no photo of it unfortunately. The customer service was also great. Will go back whenever I get the chance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHhm5qeOXAmH3WIBKVZCbA&fid=0x0:0x192bfc04111b27f0"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Kelli Rust","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIp5KIe6cH8L4n2VXOnqD89ad1NeQxGaue-o4v7xRzsnC_I8WHIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Right away, from stepping into an authentic, cozy atmosphere to the stellar service and phenomenal food, I couldn't be any happier! I was greeted warmly and promptly as soon as I arrived and seated at a centrally located table. There was authentic Greek music playing lightly but also, the Cowboys game on silently.  The atmosphere is so cozy and relaxed and it truly feels like they welcome each and every person with the utmost care. My server, Ric, was pleasant and attentive, and did a wonderful job taking care of not only our table but every other one since he was the only server.  He even suggested a lovely red wine for me. I enjoyed a small salad along with some very fresh bread before my meal. I opted for the Athenian combo so I could try a few things and my husband has the Greek combo.  Every single morsel on our plates tasted absolutely devine, was cooked to perfection and seasoned beautifully. I am not local but I would absolutely drive here just to enjoy a phenomenal meal again anytime!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwYcR8Km2O5Ws-kvcSHhX2&fid=0x0:0x192bfc04111b27f0"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Rebecca Banks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmsTzOPqc9R4Mv3AvcYKSgFP4Xpmrn5pEuS1lWPy4fvvWtWars=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ We heard about this place on TikTok, so we thought we’d try it out with very low expectations. It might now be one of our favorite restaurants! The service from Nick was impeccable, the food was next world good, and the owner checked on us twice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBF5Jt9TpCkfOcioqKGr3MJ&fid=0x0:0x192bfc04111b27f0"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Sabrina Patton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXz_Wlq6IvPPZBU5LnZ8lZpkxivckltAPPGbTyx37BEEj8vt4vOoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I think I've just found my new favorite restaurant. I ordered the dolmas "hard to find dolmas that are served warm" and these did not disappoint. Generously filled and lots of yummy sauce to dip into. The chicken shish-ka-Bob was also wonderfully seasoned served with rice and green beans.  The bread was soft and still warm after a 25 min drive. The kind man who handed me my food said that I would be back for more, and he wasn't lying.  Delicious food, friendly service, and reasonably priced.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kayla Nixon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPnErV0xH_diY3WvCk8JXw5k72hOpwgx8jD6_wxgTAPWSa7Gkvtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a wonderful meal and the service was top notch! Such a cozy little place. The kids loved the candle light dinner and commented how fancy they felt multiple times. We had the meal for 2 and it was delicious! I haven’t had shrimp that good in a very long time. The lamb chops were so good! Would definitely recommend Kostas!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brianna Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKbF5yMJdpMjFQ2dPvMcVw-fS9BdE44JMTwXolwHe3G2e3Lw4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful experience. We weren’t expecting this restaurant to be so nice. We ordered lamb chops and the gyro sandwich plate. Boyfriend said it was the best lamb chops he’s ever had. Even when he was stuffed full he couldn’t stop eating them. The gyro sandwich was absolutely stuffed full of gyro and it was the best I’ve ever had. We left very full and satisfied. Everything was delicious. And the service was impeccable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtbrS1ta_23EInRW8vddew1l_Q26_JD-OxpDnbjVSqlSQeaW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We’ve been coming to this restaurant for nearly 10 years, and while the menu and décor haven’t changed much (aside from a new interior paint color that isn’t our favorite), the food has stayed reliably good. On one visit we were served a lamb chop that had clearly gone bad, but the staff replaced it immediately and the rest of the meal was excellent.

Our only real frustration is that the owner often spends his time drinking and watching sports in the dining area, which can feel a bit tacky—especially now that prices have risen and the average entrée is over $25. Because of that, we’ve shifted to visiting only for special occasions, when the atmosphere matters a little more.

Even so, we keep coming back, because those lamb chops are absolutely worth it—pricey, yes, but consistently delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Life On Spokes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAm3Ua20CoTuvf3eg2NKFdhad6RgX1K6QNrVZItymR9uw6j7vf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful food in spite of the steak being overcooked. It was still tender and had great flavor. I ordered medium rare, but got more of a medium well with very little pink.
The staff were very friendly and the restaurant was clean. I’d definitely go back here.
My only complaint about the atmosphere was that a couple with two young, very talkative kids, were sat next to us in a very close proximity. They weren’t loud, but it made it very hard for my wife and I to converse. I will also mention there were other tables that were empty, further away from ours.","Images":null,"When":""}]
