[{"Name":"Khiem Vo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKc7FRmiiTcd1QjrZijR3KG3R5DXlnfiny8W-T2VUlLvLlsvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Coming here again. I thought the sample platter was gonna be small not a three course meal lol. The Spinach pie and dolmades were delicious even though it was my first time trying them. Now I’m trying to finish my salad as I write this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjVVX4LXKPhuFrmXZ7JqUn&fid=0x0:0x7dfc75d7dfc40bf5"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Kaitlyn Butler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBDi9V2K19krClDzWmQgAMOUPYsQ6TN3I_3ohPme04DHgBQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used a 40% off promo, and even after delivery, everything arrived surprisingly fresh. The pita and feta fries (not pictured) were still warm. My husband had the gyros with feta fries, and I ordered the large Greek salad and fried pita chips with hummus. The salad was generous and fresh, and the dressing had a nice sweet and tangy flavor. The pita chips were warm, crisp, and well-seasoned, and the hummus was really good. The feta fries stood out—probably some of the better fries we’ve had from a restaurant. My husband really enjoyed his gyro too. Overall, a great experience. We’ll definitely order again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzomifg&fid=0x0:0x7dfc75d7dfc40bf5"],"When":"2025-4-9"},{"Name":"Hadia Adnan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-BvWLiqB1zjyvLvSPhW1TG0Fm8KVtBKBVzxTszSUkT0QCCmc_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place has some really good food. The gyros were fresh and were yummy. The chicken skewers were juicy and had a nice taste. The prices were reasonable and I recommend this place for people who want some quick delicious food. Halal","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqLd-aVDy_ZyyhEtF_UsP5&fid=0x0:0x7dfc75d7dfc40bf5"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Danny “LordGoofy” Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1PHmRtHXIoDfyF4OsZfMJNkOKYhUNGKXubo9TAu8hgbGb02Sx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were craving some Greek food, so we stopped by Little Greek Fresh Grill. I've always passed the restaurant and wanted to try it.

It's a lot bigger inside. The restaurant is very clean and had some nice music playing in the background. The front desk attendant was really cool and answered all of our questions. It's nice and cool in there which is great because it was a 90 degree day.

We ordered the limited edition loaded fries, two gyro platters, and the fried pita chips. All the food was made to order, so it came out nice and fresh. The food was super good. It really hit the spot.

A bonus was that everyone was in proper attire for cooking, so that's always a plus for me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXyfaK5QE&fid=0x0:0x7dfc75d7dfc40bf5"],"When":"2024-10-28"},{"Name":"Melissa Oosterhof","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWieOcYPqazM_YpzQO2k_3FfJI5u_JOco5t1gqc4bK3dfvQUmc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For a couple of years now I have ordered Little Greek about once a week on delivery apps and the food quality is always consistently good. The meals are prepared with care and wrapped up for delivery carefully and securely, which I really appreciate. This place is my #1 takeout option.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7gS6gF7ADPdMgaoowTbC2RAm_FZC4sfBg-gpXtfZejSRVCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had the worst experience I’ve ever had at a restaurant, especially for my first time trying this Greek place. I ordered two kids' kabob meals, and the portions were embarrassingly small—honestly, it felt like they just gave me leftovers. I called to complain, and the girl with purple hair just kept saying ‘Oh, I’m sorry,’ without offering any solution or even understanding what good customer service is supposed to be.
To make it worse, the next day they called me back, accusing me of not paying, even though I was handed my change when I paid. The whole experience was a mess. The food was dry and bland, the portions were a joke, and the customer service was beyond weird. Definitely won’t be coming back."","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_xvvSiAE&fid=0x0:0x7dfc75d7dfc40bf5"],"When":"2025-1-23"},{"Name":"Vanessa Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItOfN_3rQJg6NAGR-l7VrNetVPF6a_r4x8udWWm_KyvjSPJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Today I had the chance to visit this amazing place!!!! OMG, the steak skewers are spectacular; they have a flavor I haven't tasted anywhere else!!! We also ordered an appetizer platter where the falafel and hummus are a delicious combination! I loved everything, and my family and I will definitely be back!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melissa smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB327QT0vBEv8-DdTqmfkbJmBV6j6EyhIVD2pqkFoJuOlO3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family and I came to eat and the food was amazing. The gyro pita was the best. My kids ate so much. There portions are alot. Service was great. We will be coming back for sure...","Images":null,"When":""}]

On top of the amazing food, the experience was lovely with the hardworking woman being so kind as let us try the amazing fresh hummus , would love to come here again !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0wJCqdrKSyKOdAKi5KdrN&fid=0x0:0xde0ebf5f82a0c9c1"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Xeeia K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4qinYWCx4MdR5330lxDQy_xCrpeGS9_nzR7Kitr1UEF2lax40=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to eat, hidden gem and definetly deserves more attention
Everything is at a good price point and the location is very nice and clean and aesthetic. The food itself is also very tasty","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjIsFRWf5Px9o1EBrme6st&fid=0x0:0xde0ebf5f82a0c9c1"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Asfand Yar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaG-ngTo-2detXoy6IZKdQwHhw8c6Ijpq8Hq-tBYDHya0e2ndXnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the opportunity to do Iftar at Jaffa Joint, and the experience was amazing. The food was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. Every dish tasted authentic and well-prepared. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, which made our Iftar even more special. The staff were friendly, attentive, and provided excellent service throughout our visit. It was a wonderful place to break our fast, and we truly enjoyed the whole experience. Highly recommended, and we will definitely be coming back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leo Aldwairi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTVy-_g663W3Q-4MEXhCgM2mPx-ccdghCZik7-TkdICopLqGOMlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very special place. Great food really and the atmosphere is charming and the attitude absolutely lovely.
Price is very affordable...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD34wCleVAaDZAiCULD_QCo&fid=0x0:0xde0ebf5f82a0c9c1"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Sumiya Choudhury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2aguhLj8Rmgu-YlagLj4R5GNGrxggEk-25KYyBkzvGkB1PSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went for iftar buffet today very last minute after almost 20 minutes of iftar time. They kept refilling the food and ever single item was substantial and delicious. Besides the salads there were no filler items. Service was very good aswell.  The tables were getting cleared off used plates very fast. Definitely recommend this place and would visit again. only one thing is they do charge all parties regardless of size and 18% which is fine since both the service and food is pretty great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randy Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVs19mti0i2qBquMuVQDEWuURXfQ697UlbW25k8FLWhNqXHJNE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried this spot on a whim and we were so glad we did! It’s a casual spot with an excellent price to portion ratio.
The chicken shawarma was very flavorful and juicy, the rice had a great flavor as well. Nice tangy pickled vegetables on the side added a good vinegar balance, and the creamy garlic was so yummy I wanted to marry it! I also got a side of battered fries that were perfectly crispy, but not overdone.
The owners were very friendly and  gave us a piece of fresh baked bread, I’m not sure what it’s called, but is like a thicker, fluffier pita. 10/10.
The owner mentioned an all-you-can-eat option that they do at night, (not sure if it’s every night), so I will starve myself all day so I can pack in as much as possible the next time we go!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K Dorey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxDKciPtoQPe7_Kxu145jlQRtfGTy62mgji92Xu8EN2OQfOmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Falafel plate was very very small  and Dry, dry, dry. Had to choke it down with water. no onions or lettuce. It came with very tiny sauce. Falafel mix was from a box. Just all around bad. When your cheap people dont come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGhy1g3eoblN0RkwB_u1Yj&fid=0x0:0xde0ebf5f82a0c9c1"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Adil Malik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLT8VEGkCVK4U38SDDPeT_K1ecGECIj75MI0W4HRjLwZu1msw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time trying this hidden gem! Everything was fantastic! I ordered the combo #1 BBQ plate with the butter naan and it was fresh, authentic, and a generous portion for the price. The owner is very kind as well. Will definitely come back often.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ameen Shawwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfB0eWrgwh1WaKp-ecuXrzCPMWnrSLjLYM4KFi36A_K7QxCVi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eddie's Diner is the perfect example of a charming, small-town restaurant. It has a warm and welcoming atmosphere that makes you feel right at home. The staff are some of the friendliest faces you'll ever meet, always greeting you with a smile. The diner is spotlessly clean, adding to its cozy appeal. As for the food, it's fantastic--there isn't a single bad thing on the menu! Every dish is made with care and tastes amazing. If you're looking for a delightful dining experience, Eddie's Diner is the place to be!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhd9x38_aswQiOmbGywRjz&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Lulu “Lulu” Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjcvRQ1snY9rm6J-wSPHohxpOLTc5kkTf_rtJH9xLflKUuDyFfgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Family and I went to Eddie’s Dinner on a Saturday morning and it was absolutely delightful! We were a group of 6 and were seated in about 15 minutes. Service was fast and very pleasant and every single dish was enjoyed to the max. Big portions and overall beautifully executed. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApk5rfLrbN0Hdi6Xh4iOuY&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Lance Dao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUA7oexv0SPmq6o31R4oDfA0NyKAZnjXXf1P_BiqKwOd-8KfBLPyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eddie was actually there, the service was quick despite it being busy. Food is hot to the touch with it being fresh so let it cool. Chicken tasted moist and flavorful. Pancakes fluffy and buttery.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIAf36R9AimOcy7SXOvGKH&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Marshall Holbrook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3crYfTQ0J-d1yJjhFsp_RM7RhSThNLbuWh4QhUoHnkAGRIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Breakfast was excellent! Loved this family owned business. Looks like locals love it too! Will be back before we leave Dallas. Waitress-Vanessa was awesome!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7tXUY2n4mYSBQ2Cwd3iw3&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Pete Tormey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4dv-l6nLKIkr9U8EL78xOGXa7cUJ2TQRD1Clb_OdQBTMDwn7H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decided to find Somewhere we hadn't eaten before for breakfast and Eddie's was on our way to our destination.  Decided to try it because they had 4.8 review weird 1300 ppl reviewing.

When we got there they were super busy but had room at the bar so we sat there to avoid a wait.

Everything about the food was great and it was probably one of the best Benedicts I've had.

I definitely recommend trying them out if your looking for a good breakfast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAg6l0ayhkZmJfNnH1REyeh&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Erin Bolin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8gAHmCev1pgarDcFNecmBMbEwuruxpCyr20A_awB7u9kMvg50oA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 would recommend this place! Unassuming on the outside, but so cute and cozy on the inside!! Not to mention how tasty the food is, how caring and quick the staff is, and the cost! 😍😍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChQwInQKVVpHEhBMf5kymX&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Dawn Craig","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKF0kKpL-038JHBCY-74GvIVpVhs2dCkPEgGD0uQ2UtT2YXxM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Chicken Fried Steak was scrumptious! The CFS breakfast came with 2 eggs, 2 pancakes, and fruit. It was big enough for two of us to share and still have leftovers.

The Avocado Toast was fresh and flavorful, too!

Eddie was our great waiter: his shirt says I'm Eddie on the back. He's the namesake for Eddie's Diner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENaGoOzAjoCH9AE&fid=0x0:0x64d9625312b2f903"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Kimberly Hanson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpGQiV5yKHuK2IytOrXDa_ZbUyeivQDeNHY4T6F2VgwNOmV1YG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We did brunch here on Sunday. Arrived at 11AM and were finally sat about 11:35. I picked Eddies because it was the top rated breakfast place in Plano and supposedly has amazing corned beef hash (husbands favorite.) After we sat down, we realized we had been here before (again, because of the good reviews and that everyone loved the corned beef hash.) Maybe the last time (several years ago) our bad experience was a fluke because this place has 4.7 ⭐️ !!

So, our waitress was awesome and our food was delivered promptly. Husband’s corned beef hash was out of a can/mush (Hormel?) and the hashbrowns were completely unseasoned all over and uncooked in the middle. I ordered a turkey club and like someone else said, they flatten/smash their croissant to press it like a panini (weird.) The turkey tasted like it came from a package next door (Walmart) but the fries were good. Besides the awesome waitress/service, I seriously do not understand the high score or extremely long wait.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The chicken rice bowl was also too good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvTxlaCeEElx7wVHFwaO9t&fid=0x0:0x15fabfa6f242842b"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Victoria Finol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8RxKBeSwD8wD3xp86AsjSC4pOrEQAx3cRiKtMMjzZHkInMnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Anytime I order online my order gets messed up. So after a long day I paid $21 for only chicken and rice","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfNo33MuW5QRRy-kCGW6Dm&fid=0x0:0x15fabfa6f242842b"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Bob Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4SjraFGMT24q__w90pYlsNkK_BRRUu0UyZMHXt3_Qqfo4R6k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The spicy chicken pita wrap was very good. I ordered 2 bowls and 1 spicy chips. One of the chips is taken a bite by someone when delivered. And the ingredients in the 2 bowls are completely wrong. 1 bowl does not have meet at all!! Most disgusting CAVA store ever. Dont ever come.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7G7oZsLyVxfyrTsAS22bO&fid=0x0:0x15fabfa6f242842b"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Carlos Alderete","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzxXa3pjrh_FiTDC56sEbix3stMj5l5ALwW4lOaEzFC9RgxA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Solid spot with great food and a nice atmosphere. The location at Windrose has a beautiful outdoor fountain area that makes it a pleasant place to grab a meal, especially when the weather's nice.
The food itself was excellent, fresh ingredients, good portions, and everything tasted as good as you'd expect from CAVA. No complaints there.
The only reason I'm not giving it five stars is that the service felt a bit impersonal. The staff was efficient and got everything right, but it lacked that friendly, welcoming vibe that can really elevate the experience. A little more warmth or interaction would go a long way.
Still, it's a great option for a quick, healthy meal in Plano. I'll definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diamond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnQBzJgPLhoM8g4PcpuKJypnEnd2PT8iazcal56OBnu0BHN9ZO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Please know what you want. They hadn't even grabbed it off the machine yet. But they were cleaning up the restaurant even though it didn't close For an hour, they did not have any of what I wanted. And then told me they could not issue me a refund.
But once I stood around in there 42 minutes, I realized I wouldn't eat anything out of there.The place is disgusting smelled like pot and  the kids in there were completely careless","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jay Kerr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYPJYSwPOIFvOHLd53xUFpL1FeC-L9RcciK3gt_24l-UsX8bs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly, more than a 4 but less than 5 stars. The food was all really quite good. Had the chicken in marinara and my wife had the baked chicken. Huge portions of sides. We got too many as we wanted to try a bunch of their offerings. The spinach hummus was the surprise. Really tasty. Italian green beans, diced tomatoes, the Greek salad and the regular hummus were all excellent. It is a cafeteria line serving style. The staff were fantastic and lovely. Took the time to explain all our options and each of the sides. Easy to manage. Finished with walnut baklava and hazelnut chocolate. It was the only two options today. Both were moist and sweet with a crisp outer layer. I preferred the more traditional walnut but either would be nice with a coffee. The place was very busy as we sat there. About 1PM on a very rainy Saturday and 3/4 of the place was full. It was a little expensive but that was partially our fault for getting all the extra sides. If we lived here and could sample sides 1 or 2 at a time, it would be more affordable. Lastly, good bread. Went back for more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByMA75IyO9SS8b9pVxc2YF&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Adriani Rothman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWd8rNnK4-Hj7vP1Q3QLIo_Gm7n91AagOXpAm0K_A7gDN4icTX4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My family and I used to eat here constantly. Fresh, variety of food, good service. I went there today and this is my last trip. Increased price for what they offer. I ordered the top menu choice. No eggplant, no cauliflowers options anymore.
Very limited. No lemonade anymore, just sodas. The basket for the bread had the papers greasy as if already used before. I ordered One beef and one chicken kebabs, but they gave me de the lamb and beef. The gave me later the chicken as I complained so I tasted all 3 to leave them all on the table could not be eaten, dry, super salty, no flavor at all. Food was not even hot, meat disgusting. This restaurant used to be packed at lunch time, not any more. I do not usually write negative reviews always giving the benefit of the doubt, but this one I could not hold as it was a very bad experience and I left the food on the table. Refer to photos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_qrJAdzTfSPpxvw8aPmVZ&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Jennifer Waida","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsO20jpBmfUQfdN4hdv3Mu0IkWRkHt3CrXLNLYznGTUEBbQw1NFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fadi's has some of my FAVORITE food! So full of flavor, very tasty! They are so friendly when I ate in and when I ordered doordash, they chose the best pita rolls to send my way. My photos don't do it justice ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADG6yIOUhiG8QmA9nVg47N&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Matt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5o1Qt5duAsz8xs1HyHrU_q0V0TI-bcA-et_azvmqMtHORM4mzsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I were in Frisco this past week for a conference and ate dinner here one evening. We love Mediterranean food of all types and decided to try this restaurant. The food was very good, the service fast, and the staff very friendly. Enjoyed our first experience with this chain.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB22AjYFow_gRSAgH3_WT8c&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Aaron Weeks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI58bl9L-JdUCRiTjXEJDWXL_ObmZk94sOmAPWyjoEaHtgYo729=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible food.

I ordered the chicken adana wrap, but the meat was just chunks of chicken breast with no discernable seasonings or flavor. In fact the only flavors in the entire wrap came from the pickles and the garlic sauce (which had very little garlic, mostly tasted like mayo).

The hummus wasn't great, a bit too bitter for my taste but I know some places make it like that so it didn't bother me. The worst part was the MOLD on the bread. It was a small spot, green and fuzzy. I found it on my second piece, so hopefully I didn't eat any on the first piece without realizing.

The baklava was also not very good, the top layer of pastry was completely dry, as were the chunks of walnut inside (which were way too big); the only syrup in the baklava was on the bottom layer, seemed like it was made dry and then placed in a pan that had syrup on the bottom.

The best part of the meal was the salad (which was just a few leaves of romaine, one halved cherry tomato, and some feta with a basic vinaigrette) and that's pretty sad.

Each of these issues individually wouldn't completely put me off from giving them a second chance, but taken all together is just unacceptable. I won't be back, there's much better options in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzMU7ZjRK6_d_PKuTXoQmQ&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Divine Dents","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNYSccoiaVdKBrPxqmpLHl-0X7z55Kqf6QdVcf9YOTY9LkfW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We met our friends at Fadi’s and were delightfully surprised. The staff was very attentive to our needs and the food was delish, not to mention the portions were mammoth! For plant based eaters there are a multitude of choices!!! We will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC7VrVxkJ4nsLgekmmJmj0&fid=0x0:0x104ba7709b31ba35"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Seo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhYLHjWadDcQ2QXQlRrZgTjq2cfR79RAfNTDQNx2CtU18UnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time in, the staff was so helpful in deciding what to get. We got the Fadi’s chicken, beef and lamb gyro, lentils, rice, cucumber salad, pasta salad. Everything was warm, flavorful and tasted like legit home cooked meals. They also had fresh baked pita bread and chips.

The portions were super generous, we ate our fill and had to take the rest to go. The owner was so kind and very passionate about the food. Overall a very friendly atmosphere, delicious mediterranean food. Highly recommend the Fadi’s chicken!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ella Sladek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxYlYRJP0p-DIX0s022xeWN56pm2h_U8Rj1BxEVxYVuG6LyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely outstanding experience at Fadi’s, and a huge part of that was thanks to the manager, Wail. He was incredibly friendly, welcoming, and genuinely helpful—going above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect. His positive energy and attention to detail made the visit feel special, not just like another meal out.

Even after moving away, this is still my favorite Mediterranean restaurant, and I make sure to eat here every single time I’m back in town—that’s how good it is.

The food is phenomenal—fresh, flavorful, and served in generous portions. I highly recommend the 4 sides + one meat combo with hummus, Greek salad, roasted cauliflower, and green beans paired with the roasted chicken. Every item tastes homemade and full of authentic flavor. The pita bread deserves its own shoutout—soft, warm, and absolutely delicious.

And don’t miss what I now call “Wail’s special sauce”: mix the garlic sauce with the hot sauce—it’s a game changer! It takes the meal to a whole new level.

Between the amazing quality of the food and the exceptional service from Wail, this is hands-down one of the best dining experiences I’ve ever had. I’ll keep coming back whenever I’m in town and will continue recommending Fadi’s to everyone I know!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mostly Insane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIswzVt5W3gT6X0aBwujwzmyOpx57E-0vIUhvp6Wdx3z78xPE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Legacy West is easily one of the best spots in Plano. It has a fantastic mix of high-end shopping and great dining options. The atmosphere is very modern and walkable, making it a perfect place to spend a Saturday afternoon or a Friday night. I love grabbing a bite at Legacy Hall—there are so many choices that everyone in the group can find something they like.
Pro-tip: Parking can get a little crazy on weekends, so I recommend going straight to the garages rather than hunting for street spots. Highly recommend!"","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcsUmzlBQCgRAZrjQE9giu&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Janice Haynes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjValXCnr7OKUns_q86ASMoNAt2TkIH7-W5eS-WyLj_RTM17_UGvvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Legacy West in Plano, Dallas is an absolutely fabulous destination! It's the perfect spot to hang out with family and friends, offering a vibrant atmosphere with a fantastic selection of food, drinks, and entertainment options like live music. The information and security staff are super friendly and professional, making the entire experience enjoyable and seamless. Whether you're looking to shop at high-end stores or just grab a bite at the amazing Legacy Hall food court, this place has a great vibe and something for everyone. Don't miss this place. ⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMyXzx4WFrWBmi_L5OqfNN&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Dennis Markham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0XXeFrnLEOchB0XIY1Xxvvt1tuFkEVMnzNUfQy8jjxws8ub4b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to Root's Chicken Shack and the food and service was excellent. We got the tenders combo and the chicken was crispy and juicy. The duck fried fries  were awesome. The banana pudding was one the best I have ever had! There are several other restaurants at Legacy Hall that we want to go back and try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7sswBKHINSlA5BhbPwglL&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Monica M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtWNgIAx3Ak8fTE6UVv5P071A_h1uR_CjBXVFi98jgpOeAsJ8B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have been here before but never for a Music event.
We came to see the Chris Stapleton tribute and it was awesome.
We enjoyed their music, the set up, the food options and how organized it was.

I just mention we paid for a table and there seemed to be some people that were just I. The area and stayed., we literally had a family dancing around with their kids right in front t of us (not in the dancing area). We missed a good part of the initial intro of the concert 🎶
Eventually they weren’t anywhere to be seen so it made us think they just were hanging out without admission.

After that their whole experience was great. We really enjoyed the whole event.
Will definitely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpoVTMtHrQdyPGuO4FNnj6&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Jessica Hensley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQJvBB6Uh0_oMvEihcCkqsoFshOBjCyOXZW6dNp7028LzXhbZmHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GREAT event hall!
I went with my husband for a bucket-list Everclear concert, and the experience was amazing. The acoustics were incredible, and even though it was a packed house, it never felt overcrowded or uncomfortable.

We grabbed food from Son of a Butcher beforehand and it was delicious. The bathrooms were well-lit and very clean, which I always appreciate. I also felt completely safe the entire time. Security was visible and helpful, and the parking garage was bright and easy to navigate—which, as a woman, makes a huge difference.

Highly recommend this venue. We had a fantastic night!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8U3wKeZkcrNocP9W1Tqrf&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Ameen Shawwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfB0eWrgwh1WaKp-ecuXrzCPMWnrSLjLYM4KFi36A_K7QxCVi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Legacy West gets a four-star rating from me. It's a cool, trendy place with the best restaurants, offering amazing food of all types. My only issue is that it has basically little to no seating, which can be a hassle. Despite that, it's still a fantastic spot to enjoy great meals and a lively atmosphere. 4 stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDS8KOO2Hbcjvy3DdGuZgt4&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Nicole Peters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnFg6gIjvKrNbUd3---Ppsr4P0v65caVxVGFm-8sQMV-yF1_cooA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great atmosphere for dining and meeting up with friends! I ordered my food from the Roots Chicken Shak restaurant and everything was delicious! Here's a list of what I ordered: 1. The Big Bird Chicken Sandwich. 2. The Mac and Cheese dish. 3. The Banana Pudding dessert dish!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNX_-yUDR9fXTLczg0YLoc&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Dee Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnUm_RatIRE7UX7HlcuIlq9JvZH2nH6YgnckN6i0D_dQp5aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Legacy Hall is known for their fun events! They really go all out. I went to their Mardi Gras celebration and it was a total blast! Live music which was so amazing, face painting for the kids, lots of great food choices and just a great vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCb59vQWopUf48Y3sp1Wlyg&fid=0x0:0x2cd326096d4933b2"],"When":"2025-8-29"}]

[{"Name":"Nigar Sultana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnWA4jGW7cclJWN7YpxOP2NMtRjv8rqpTYTP5xpBf8DRxETZHJ8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fresh, flavorful food in a cozy and relaxed setting. Great place to enjoy a peaceful lunch or dinner. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8bZUj6WglvDTLgN8xVmjn&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Rashid Rana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXehfy9OpN62xYZ8uw1EE4msZ_-bp4x65TTpqpP7gd60KKoPsdC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently dined at Kebab Uncle and had an absolutely fantastic experience! From the delicious food to the exceptional service, everything was top-notch.

The pulao was perfectly cooked – fragrant, flavorful, and paired wonderfully with their succulent kebabs. Each bite was a delight, especially the juicy, well-spiced kebabs that melted in the mouth.

A special shoutout to Imran, who went above and beyond to ensure we had a great meal. His hospitality and attention to detail truly made our visit memorable.

If you're looking for authentic, mouthwatering kebabs and pulao with excellent service, Kebab Uncle is the place to be. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo9pf-1AE&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2025-4-24"},{"Name":"Mohammad “Atiqur” Rahman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYtYgUFfQp0ZCmO9kZgSjkGPdXizhU0lXGCLq97hBVd8ShJL9f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant is an absolute gem! The food is incredibly flavorful, served in generous Texas-sized portions that offer outstanding value for money. Prices are surprisingly reasonable, making every bite worth it. Honestly, it outshines any big-name spot in the DFW area. We tried the lamb shank, bihari kebab, dum keema, and grilled chicken shish kebab — each dish was bursting with taste and cooked to perfection. Highly recommended for anyone craving authentic, mouthwatering cuisine.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chanakya .vunnam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfKUq6JB4om1cHls21tk8QkIKYSQEaOK4zX0hfbe4o4-FyvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered grilled chicken with aroma rice platter. Rice was good, lettuce was good. Chicken didn't get cooked properly from the inside. I showed it to the person at the counter, he didn't respond anything. He went back and started to arrange the chairs to close the store for today.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAD_SqLXODHrDMYm4hwgmmt&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Fraz Tajammul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBW-ugLq75ZxAOxfevAUAQcJg-bwSqxurVQlktY5h41TJdfgE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This was our first visit. They have limited many options but something for everyone including Pakistani (Afghani, Persian) style chicken, beef, lamb and fish.

We really liked the food. Kebab and chicken were very delicious and so were the rice, However rice were bit spicy to our taste. Dining area is quite simple. Service was ok. It's definitely recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzlsfr1AE&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2024-6-1"},{"Name":"Mubeen Kamani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGWkqnLZf6FNiplb7mYHn2kdcovP1iLVDCfuFeoEi1547RgEc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We catered food from Kabob Uncle for a 200-person iftar during Ramadan, and it was an incredible experience! We ordered their Ramadan Iftaar Platter, and the food was a huge hit with everyone. The menu included Beef Kebab, Chicken Kebab, Grilled Chicken, Fried Fish, Qeema, Rice, Naan, and Gulab Jaman—everything was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared.

The Fried Fish was a standout; everyone raved about how delicious it was. The kebabs were juicy and well-seasoned. The Gulab Jaman was a great treat to end the meal.

The food was plentiful, and there was more than enough for everyone. Kabob Uncle delivered on time, which made the entire process smooth and stress-free.

If you’re looking for catering for a large event or just want amazing food, Kabob Uncle is the place to go. They made our iftar stress less and great, and highly recommend them!

Inshallah we plan to do one more iftaar with them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQnqDg_AE&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2025-3-4"},{"Name":"Matha Goram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJ41XspTIiWZjFC4h9G2PtiQPFRvnnZ0KR7iEP8QWfrBO3g0Zt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Carne Kebab Arroz was grilled to satisfaction. Please understand that this is genuinely South Asian cuisine - distant relative to Adana Kebap or Koobideh Kabob in some aspects.

The Carne Bihari Arroz could have spent a little more time on the purported charcoal grill. It had some traces of gristle, which is definitely a "no-no" for any Bihari Kebab. Instead of dousing the kebab in marinade, the right blend for Bihari kebab was present, and the grilling did touch but not penetrate the meat -- definitely above average but with a little effort (and chef's desire) could rank as excellent in the future.

The kitchen staff should spend a little more time trimming the meat, and management will realize that customers don't mind paying just a little extra for properly dressed proteins.

Very limited menu and surprisingly low prices. One supposes if one needs a limited choice of kebabs for a catered event, Kebab Uncle merits serious consideration.

The Familia Charolla is excellent value but we made the mistake of supplementing it with Carne  Bihari. Sadly unlike the one that we tried earlier this time around it was below expectations in the critical aspects - a little dry, overly spicy (that is not an issue except that our family included young 'uns), insufficiently grilled, poorly trimmed, etc. The Lamb Shank hit all the bells and even the young 'uns wanted more.

There is an Allergy Notice at the website and we thank management for that notice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbjqidLw&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2024-7-27"},{"Name":"Mohammed Maqsood Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2h4oUwobz8eMUjyyY3uJJthqwB7wQvkJ6hNZG6T3wi6HFkrSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the Fried Fish, the Beef kebab and Grilled Chicken. All the meat tasted good and the Salad and raita was very fresh. The rice was excellent. Will definitely try the other things on the Menu next time. Must visit ones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdhMvkLQ&fid=0x0:0xe4513980da5db67f"],"When":"2024-2-11"}]

[{"Name":"Ameen Shawwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfB0eWrgwh1WaKp-ecuXrzCPMWnrSLjLYM4KFi36A_K7QxCVi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Olive Burger is an easy five stars. The place is clean, laid-back, and has that classic burger joint vibe that just works. The burger was seriously delicious, juicy, flavorful, and stacked perfectly, and the fries were hot, crispy, and tasted fresh. Portions were solid, everything came out quick, and the staff were friendly and easy to deal with. On top of that, they have those really good Oreo shakes that are thick, creamy, and exactly what you want with a burger. If you want a reliable spot for a great burger and fries without any nonsense, Olive Burger is definitely worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDp1OMNHDq4HM8KFJ61x7At&fid=0x0:0xcf2028d0a9b2124c"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Nathan Hoxie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMdrIBqkr4yV2zCsxAinCypy5ULuIXp6Lyqkj4eXTNTRGrq2E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love it! Recently tried this place for the first time after seeing it so many times. Glad I did because you don't think olives will be a good topping on your burger, but you'd be wrong. Mostly a regular burger, but that extra dimension of flavor from the olives is really great.

Also, try the onion rings dipped in the signature sauce. The onion rings on their own are fantastic, but the signature sauce is something special.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adam Abrahamson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-q455k12usG4oJy4YdPMjKlUzPqxaNp8hX6gUzAos9xxRWTYn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time visiting a Olive Burger and it was a great surprise. The staff was very friendly and the place felt spotless. The tots and fries were top level and we all loved them.

We ordered multiple Jalapeño Burgers and the flavor was great, with the only disappointment being the bun. The bun felt very basic and sugary. We even had a discussion about how if the bun was better, we thought it would be one of the best burgers ever.

Would recommend this place. It is worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR74vMfA&fid=0x0:0xcf2028d0a9b2124c"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Katherine Clowes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlWoqhk-FwUFLG4krYnWcGT9U6lF38Ruh-HNgGSj3TSkyNng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just reviewing for the dozens of times I have eaten here without doing so. I love the beef bacon SO hard, it is delicious. Perfect burgers every time & the signature sauce is 1000!!! I can never decide between the burger or the gyro, so I often get both.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hasan Jafri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRGhsamY4MqnUjjkB3KvInph_6TfCb_fpRY1cZ1l78oqeqdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"F9od was amazing, they stop selling philli cheese stake sandwich wich was best in town, but we had their house burger and chicken cayenne they bithe were excellent, french fries were gr8. Chicken nuggets were fresh and crispy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICNpqPfxQE&fid=0x0:0xcf2028d0a9b2124c"],"When":"2024-1-14"},{"Name":"B. C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXX4_WtTthg8Bay20DjobjHF6R9_-AnOYIDTiqzwfPq2gUlMt5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Braums is right across the street and I usually buy my burgers there just because they have such great value. Today I thought I’d give Olive Burger a shot. So they have no double cheeseburgers on the menu board, I asked how much it would be to get a double cheeseburger and it would be another three dollars. I elected to not get a double and just got a regular jalapeño cheeseburger. With tax and everything it was almost 9 dollars as compared to Braums double cheeseburger, which is seven dollars. There was no comparison. Not even close. The burger was uninspired, the service was MEH and I won’t be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yasir Kayani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXGwHmaHbwbWiaMtEF2itO-jDjjnl5min0jnetLNs-MK66EA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for nice halal burger place in Plano finally found Olive Burger in Plano. They serve proper fillet chicken burgers and and juicy beef burgers with best crunch Fries 🍟 and don’t forget great price as well. Well done guys 👏","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEI20v5y3ttTe2QE&fid=0x0:0xcf2028d0a9b2124c"],"When":"2025-5-8"},{"Name":"Mohammad Youssof","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXc4xApE6memWxyTLjYDi7_YU6mvLvkvuofqMrZ01qqkP__3fLZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My first time to try it. It worth trying it again. Clean restaurant inside. They took a while to complete the order. The burger was tasty and cooked perfectly. I had four items from their list and all were quite good. Next time, I may try the plant-based burger.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-0PvKtAE&fid=0x0:0xcf2028d0a9b2124c"],"When":"2022-10-25"}]

The best part here tho is the ranch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCS6QC5TqafcIEEJFzF1-nC&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"J C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj8WKvOcevRuaCxPHAe4m348yXas95xbYAl3l3Coub61CFgYUR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good burger. They offer a gluten free bun or you can get a bunless burger on lettuce. Vegan patties are available, as are non-beef options (chicken or turkey). If you don't want a burger, they have salads.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB68j5yIy2CNLqL4xgdBqZ6&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Ursula Wilridge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6rD_Kvd5p5CnTHytuwJg4BBHecATPNhKot-Z4B_opPXgfQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burgers were good.  I didn't like the fries.  My son had grill chees and he loved the it.  The Texas sheet cake was good as well.  Our waiter was really cool! This was our first time here!  I'll definitely give it another chance!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjmVukYA8LvlGHGguAD4Wz&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Rebecca Fountain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEFrHwSxd9YUhl39aks9UZJLz_onC-h7lmF9_SqeOfEBG02w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can I give it a 10?   First time to a Rodeo Goat and it was absolutely the best hamburgers and Fries. Taiyana our server was quick and efficient, giving us suggestions and explained the menu.  We took her suggestions at heart, ordering the fries with the chili at the side. Brisket chili was good all by itself. Food was great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAo9MHA5s7vlWrqM0XUyUMl&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Brian Conley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs3gdgFNxFYEudjxEqzjStbEqhITXcPs1wJP99AYkZ9vdOL50=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a different but wonderful experience.  The service was fun and everyone was very nice.  Pretty cool place for a great burger experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC045i-Ro4kJvGgZFol2oDM&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Caitlin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHBdzL-kapEE4Hfwr_De3uPwfPDGLbwLyPFSccCAO416D8Gzl4ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have indoor and out door seating. You seat yourself, service is always quick and good.
My server today recommended the sugar burger and its by far my new favorite next time I go I will add Gouda to it as he suggested.
I've never had a bad thing here and very week or every month they have a new burger in their head to head competition some of those can be CRAZY but good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Korngiebel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1hYV2CIOXPvcRmd6A6hQhVORFeUF1jKAO-4XACjfDHAmCQpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rodeo Goat has a diverse range of delicious gourmet burgers and sides in an atmosphere of your choosing.

First, on atmosphere. The restaurant is big and has a very large high tabletop bar area, a dining area with booths, and an outdoor seating. If you can't find the atmosphere you're looking for, you're just not looking. It's quite enough to carry on a conversation yet loud enough not to be overheard. It's usually difficult to write things about atmosphere, Rodeo Goat makes it easy.

We've been multiple times, and the food has always been top notch. This isn't a place I'd go to if I was trying to lose weight, but if you're after a burger and sides, it'll have something for you.

Tonight, my spouse had the Cheese Fries Surprise (w/chili...see picture) for her meal. The portion was huge, they said we could get a half order, but we opted for a full order since it was her dinner. She probably would have been fine with a half order, I helped her with much of it and we still took some home. We were both really fond of the Brisket Chili they served with the fries, it was really delicious.

I had a Ranch House burger and a side of sweet potato fries, again delicious.

The service was prompt and courteous, the staff was firing on all cylinders. I can't speak for all of their locations but the one in Plano is certainly worth the trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYgsTKogE&fid=0x0:0x4a9efed460234e55"],"When":"2025-5-2"}]

[{"Name":"Matt Samuel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW14J4KVm_4VSW9X7SQWrDrqV6a3x1RIVXHZjghOF2BEl4oT3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Halal Munchies is the closest experience to NYC chicken and rice here in DFW. The food is incredible, and I loved their white sauce. The hot sauce is so good, and it actually has a kick. We've been there twice now, and both times it's been delicious. The staff there are so nice, and the owner was a real chill dude. Seating is limited to about 20 seats. Definitely recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCMYBHrgRMLFZ4yiHER011&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Javier Monta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVffbIPi7kTW53ZK1GJJnH9ENcwCxSrjHfNrSnqKTO2j8l_M20=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I tried Halal Munchies today and honestly, it was disappointing. The food tasted stale and there was nothing special about it. The chicken had a weird, off flavor that didn’t taste fresh, and the rice was very bland with no real seasoning. For a platter spot, I expected much better quality and taste. Dallas definitely has much better platter options. I wouldn’t recommend it based on this experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBW2ZAWvxwlVIuR56mc4y1q&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Ahmed Iqbal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQtdvTf1YqZzeF1fRnTiWFBULE5qXmvFecMTPzm3-7Z9YZsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best Halal places in town. Had wings and a mixed platter, both 10/10. The service is amazing too, amazing people, definitely recommend 💯","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3KpBnE1lSmcJmEvaJn7dR&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Imdad Ali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXprkgfcrVXgCjjSuyXpDBEvkPtjCMimNk3p6Zc23FumOlDbJI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DIARRHEA ALERT 🤮🤮🤮

I honestly wish I could give 0 stars. Unfortunately, my experience at Halal Munchies was very disappointing.

The food tasted reheated, and the chicken had an unusual smell and flavor that immediately made me uncomfortable. Before ordering, I asked the staff member at the counter if the food was fresh and prepared daily, and I was told yes. However, based on the taste and texture, it did not feel fresh to me.

I tried to eat it anyway but later that night I became very sick and experienced vomiting. I cannot say for certain what caused it, but the timing after eating here was concerning.

Overall, the food did not seem fresh, and the experience left me feeling unwell. I personally would not return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTifRlr8PT34ZeZMzB7eeN&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Raza Hussain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVENrUza-o5N_3CwIobpHJhOnyXN5zzkOMwZGDFhqGkZnlhimG6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best chicken over rice I've had in DFW. Not imitators, they're straight from New York. The quantity is massive. I can make this into 2 meals. Coming back to try their burgers and wings next!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1hr4HA7s56Vsi41Nfq0Id&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Wadi Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2bzHIM04cyTAhuUsN-kTOTopKCuB8jvUoojQLnoGid3lf650=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I honestly wish I had read the one-star reviews before coming to Halal Munchies. This place was a huge disappointment. The food felt poorly prepared, and it honestly seemed like the kitchen staff didn’t really know how to properly cook or assemble the dishes.

Everything was drowning in sauce — way too much — making the food sloppy and messy. The gyro in particular was extremely wet and falling apart. I kept wondering, does this really count as a gyro? It was nothing like what you would expect from a decent gyro spot.

There are definitely much better gyro places in Richardson that actually focus on flavor and proper preparation. Unfortunately, this experience left me regretting my visit and feeling unwell afterward.

I won’t be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJVYG3R1vMmqqyssx1wfod&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Yasmin Farzaie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlO8vlcpsDOGEt1KXrui_JE46Mj67EU6N8ZzQs-LHg-Xo3-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best food in the area. I’m so excited for this business to continue flourishing. Food is absolutely fire🔥 ordered the chicken platter and it did not disappoint. Staff is excellent!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ayoub Himeur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqEXI1zwA5NOymj11TNo8xR-n-XwS-bwwWdJtIlolaKjUBpM0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite spot in Richardson I highly recommend it. The food was very delicious and the staff were kind !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuAxGyQKFWshBf35c3e-86&fid=0x0:0xaa1e44b3cb41041e"],"When":"2026-2-25"}]

[{"Name":"David Tawater","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXms3A-ktG7X7teUPMlyinvW0NoI7SBzMleTtvQfQp4fAF8Orr2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing.  I really enjoyed the coffee.  It's fresh and rich.  I got the western omelet and it was very delicious.     Susie is very kind and made sure we enjoyed our breakfast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATLQ33JbJSviJdfXoG1Ob_&fid=0x0:0x71fc808caa1efaa2"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Keith Boivin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2Lt8FWCTp7jN8aLu6CYfdXwhkJXDuOcnT0M0lrwahB9FCk_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a cute little neighborhood diner! Small, quiet, and quaint place with excellent service and really good food!

I tried the seafood omelette and got some hollandaise sauce on the side which was great!

You can tell there were some regulars in there, plenty of space to sit and they have an old fashioned diner style bar to sit at!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwh4iBGA&fid=0x0:0x71fc808caa1efaa2"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"C. D. (CaDe86)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRsMxVzoK8X-79iWGZ55ibCNYerGUsUJaLEpFUiSZzm6FvtgE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'll be honest, I don't remember what we had at this place. I just remember it being good enough for me to keep the receipt, forget about it, find it, and still come back and write this review. The vibes of this place is so comforting and nostalgic in that it's one of the old school mom & pop home cooking diner type spots. It looks like a true family-run business; they were so gracious. My niece had an issue with her food, and they quickly rectified it. It was just good vibes, food, and service all around. Just go and enjoy yourself!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janette Liggins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5FLdSemGVvv29Ip-CAwZscO01g_94MlpV7zhJ2BB1jbmzzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"my first time eating at this place.  i’m a very picky eater and where i eat.  it was ok til i got to the biscuit. not sure if you can see it but it was very very greasy even the bag is greasy so i left the biscuit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBR2P4zrza7Cf4j9B8eYzyU&fid=0x0:0x71fc808caa1efaa2"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Michael Parsons","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD1mEJq-yYH6LO2m-JkMyv8httRp93TckIkTs07O33fKI0tRa3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DON’T GET THE CHOPPED STEAK AND EGGS! The steak is literally just a dry unseasoned beef patty. Our waitress could have at least warned us we are not ordering what we think we are ordering. She said we are not the only people to have the same reaction about it. My gf couldn’t even eat it, it was so disgusting. The food was very mid. The two plates of food with coffee were definitely not worth $41. There are plenty of breakfast places around this area 10x better than this place for the same price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"curtis thompson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7-hQvc0ze-SG2qt6PJy_54gIbeV5otICurJAA8CP_ige1ew5B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a business breakfast at Little Gus Cafe this week, and I’ll absolutely be coming back any time I’m in Plano. The portions were generous, the quality was outstanding, and the atmosphere made it feel like we were regulars—even though it was our first visit.

There were seven of us, and while we weren’t a huge group, we definitely didn’t make it easy. Everyone had their own unique twist on what they wanted—from extra crispy bacon to eggs cooked with surgical precision. But somehow, every single plate came out fast, accurate, and incredibly tasty. I had a massive omelet packed with hearty chunks of sausage, melty cheese, and onions and jalapeños so fresh they still had a little snap when you bit into them. Absolute perfection.

Gus himself came out to check on us, which added a personal touch you just don’t see much anymore. It was a small moment, but it really brought the whole experience together—like the final piece of a puzzle that makes the whole picture click.

I’m looking forward to many more meals with Gus and his team. This place isn’t just a great diner—it’s the kind of spot that makes you want to become a regular.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIr9-tmAE&fid=0x0:0x71fc808caa1efaa2"],"When":"2025-4-5"},{"Name":"brien black","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYN_84QXv47sLCy75XuGjo2FkQRSb5W_PjH1_JM-O319tuDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We found this place while traveling what a find. The staff was beyond 5 star starting with our server never got her name but said she’s everyone’s grandma top notch quick with the coffee refill fun to visit with.  The cook had orders turned in great time for the amount of people seated. Food was amazing the gentleman that greeted each table I would have taken for the owner was pleasant and friendly took time to make sure that each guest was happy.  What they have I hope it’s there on my next visit thru Plano.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Egemo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKa7OZQ4SA-fqsU67ulaJsVi5JE0uWfZ6lsKHblIyyvO9ldQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Folks, this is a legit diner! You can sit at the counter like the Diner's I grew up with.. or at a booth, or outside (nice roses and other plants)..  I stop here for a to-go lunch at least once/week. Staff is friendly! Food is great!  Where else can I get zesty chicken cacciatory, or a chopped steak with mashed potatoes or cabbage rolls, or liver and onions?  My favorite is the Reuben with a side of rich tomato-basil soup (best I have ever tasted!)...  I will be back for another review after I hit them up for a weekend brunch.. all kinds of great egg-pancake specials.. Great job, Gus (and Beve).. Keep up the good work!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"A Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHHvGMkyqeMvIJ8R_lBw3Ym-4JHmDLMr4WbTCR0M0p78vzrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Had heard good things about Olive Burger. I’d driven by several times, but never felt compelled to go in and dine. A friend talked up their Chicken Caesar wrap and their jalapeño cheese burger. Both were just OK. Fries were good, though!  The staff was friendly, but the food is “meh”…even for fast food. Will go back to Whataburger, In-n-Out or Chik-Fil-A any day over Olive Burger.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQs1_aXmRlJvQuJ1ipXZrX&fid=0x0:0xfe544689090bb53b"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"J M (Texas Foodie)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCKUOlKCC2NTWLf0SDJszqFJo7D2nnu-v1ugntDqMkrvPWvgaF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got the Gyro pita and it was excellent. Friendly staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3QOQYwZ4mLfE0Um7AQkeq&fid=0x0:0xfe544689090bb53b"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"RC Appas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6uPyactkRPvlNjoyzrd8kSnJjo_AFzdbgMGxe1fOBGxW9HB6Kaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Service,  awesome food and great prices - this place checks all the boxes

I added American cheese & jalapeños and it was amazingly delicious. Did not feel like your regular fast food sandwiches.
The lemon chicken is grilled chicken, flattened, juicy.
The sandwich is huge so its plenty of food.  The quantity of the fries is a lot also. Fries are crispy, fresh and tasty seasoning.
Onion rings also delicious.
Service is top notch, very friendly and helpful.

#1 go to fast food but healthier option compared to your chain restaurants.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClR-gePQYF5xQUWm-o4pPn&fid=0x0:0xfe544689090bb53b"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"robert bell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwBeHJRcM-mH3zZJGkYuXa0cmb95s77rhoC1GkIep4GNW0jgfQdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I always pass this place and one day I just decided to stop here because I love olives and I can tell you,  this place is a must try.  The burgers were juicy, large and packed with flavor. I had the grilled chicken sandwich and the crisp fried avocado chicken Sandwich and omg, so so juicy and flavorful. My side item was the bacon loaded fries and man oh man, I was so full, I had to force myself to finish it. This place is a top 5 out of 5 for me. The service was nice,  the inside gives a nice clean feeling and the food makes you happy. I will be back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByrrPm-YeTeND-stT3oYoF&fid=0x0:0xfe544689090bb53b"],"When":"2025-8-1"},{"Name":"Javier MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDKt874qqnDejDH2rue92lnsBzMx8DGvL9dFnKgPFvj6bU5VNT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super tasty burger!
Great fast food restaurant, with affordable prices and excellent cheese fries. The staff is so friendly and that’s also worth to be highlighted. We will come back again in the future for sure","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXipGesQE&fid=0x0:0xfe544689090bb53b"],"When":"2024-10-15"},{"Name":"3hunnit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjCkTkPOlxVxNyRoHeVYMNCibcq-wUqKpZV2OH1oPOciJcPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"PITIFUL

I came in hoping for a decent meal and left questioning this place. The bun was soggy, the patty was UNDERCOOKED, The fries were limp and cold, like they’d been sitting around since only god knows, food basically was emotionally exhausted by the time it reached my table. Service was just as disappointing I let the manager know what needed to be fixed and got nothing but a bunch of attitude. The manager’s attitude was unbelievable Instead of listening or offering a solution, they were rude, dismissive, and  Mistakes happen, but bad attitudes don’t have to. Very slow and giving off strong “we rather you weren’t here” energy.

The restaurant itself wasn’t much better. Sticky tables, and an atmosphere that screamed “we gave up years ago”. For the price I expected at least edible food, not a burger that felt like a prank.

A bad meal is one thing, but a manager with zero professionalism is another. Management sets the tone, and this one clearly doesn’t care about customers or quality. I won’t be returning
If you’re craving a burger or any munchie, do yourself a favor and make one at home or literally anywhere else but OLIVE BURGER! I wouldn’t recommend this place whatsoever!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Preiti Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGqeFz2sCAj0TzYHzhY0KDiQ1sPlRgKUKLunNJneRAOHm9Bqv8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was good, not great. I ordered chicken kebab with a side of yellow rice and Greek salad. The salad was the saving grace but the chicken was a tad overdone and dry. I had asked for a spicier version so they put a red chilli paste topping on it and that made it taste better. Missed the mark for $22 plus taxes.

The chicken shawarma ($20) my friend ordered looked boring but was way more flavorful. The falafel appetizer ($10) tasted yum and I crumbled the falafel balls over my rice to enhance the flavor of my dish.

I did not taste the walnut baklava but the birthday girl liked it.

Service could have been better considering the place wasn’t busy but they did have considerable food pickup traffic.

For the prices charged and awesome reviews, I went in expecting a flavorbomb. I’ll be back to see if I like the food better next time. I love Mediterranean food and this is close by!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPI-CL8FYYG8gJGSbe26VF&fid=0x0:0xc2f462b71e3fd1a1"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Abolfazl Baloochiyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiMCMwf52CbMiMc_xhkwP9b-6JRxWUtGo1gWCwhYJsrg0FvTc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect restaurant!

I had a lamb shank there today and the taste if their food and quantity and quality is extremely high!

Very kind and respectful people. The artworks amd the paintings on the walla and tables takes you to the heart of Persian culture. Really nice paintings and decoration!

The restaurant itself is slightly off down town but the taste of their food really worth it! You can also order with delivery options like doordash and stuff!

I loved this restaurant! 🥰😍😇","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXm6oK4161EetlpHL-EVrI&fid=0x0:0xc2f462b71e3fd1a1"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Eric Licker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0j1K8ijgB1ko0UBJ712REJvwHD2ayFU93219nXfiU5MuQ-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic all the way around. The lentil soup is the best I’ve ever had, the beef and chicken kabobs are wonderful, the felafel plate is delicious and tons of food.

I highly recommend trying this as you will be a regular after the first visit.  What an absolute hidden gem.

We will be back very soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2GgdVoMWllrCL8UijIBSA&fid=0x0:0xc2f462b71e3fd1a1"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"S Sali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxaYIdLqwo5cNBF21HRlWCqYGkvKBH_Q3KxSqIirT7rq_uIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was very good. The atmosphere was good too. The only issue was that the service was slow. We had to wait 45 minutes to get our food and no refill was offered neither enough napkins were on tables while taking meal. In general service was slow even though the owner was trying genuinely for customers to enjoy their meals. Having an extra person helping ok weekend or staff to check on tables is highly recommended","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWNdeeKLyipmWIhNy74oqx&fid=0x0:0xc2f462b71e3fd1a1"],"When":"2026-2-23"},{"Name":"Chetan Salian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEhUmbhqI940bvI_wSqUXR3rGsNaPmOI2fX8Hney8A8BgHo6Sv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a find!!!

Actually a recommendation to us and we are ever in debt of the recommender for this place.

Rose serves authentic Iranian cuisine and I am sure it is better than any served in Cali (read South Bay. Silicon Valley)!!!! Hands down!!!

The Kashke Bademjan , the Tabouli salad, the Hummus, the Falafels, the Baba Ganoush and the soft and succulent and so flavorful chicken and mined beef kebabs all made with the freshest of freshest veggies, meats and basic ingredients and perfectly spiced/ served with Sumac, generously splashed with Olive Oil and then served with the most appetizing Basmati rice spiked with saffron and the delightfully warm and oh so soft Pita bread.

We were floored by each and every dish they served (even the simple but so fresh lettuce and cucumber salad served with a tangy light  dressing) and guess what the Dugh Drink (buttermilk with some very tasty digestive powders) elevated the experience to the next level!

And Pooneh , who seated and waited on us, was so friendly and kept serving the dishes at a pace that never kept us waiting nor allowed the dish to go cold while we savored the previous served dish.

In the end we had lots  of leftovers , only because we had over-ordered, but we more than looked toward to consuming them later!

Cannot miss out on the deco! The entire place was decorated with miniatures of everyday life items from the home country and invoked an unmistakable aura and nostalgia for folks from that part of the world! Video added

We are already planning our next visit !

What about you?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpERsmDsTwY29v4IYbW9NL&fid=0x0:0xc2f462b71e3fd1a1"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Ram Laksnarain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-2lUrdRWSnXaNZJheHSSKpVAxfm-t6nE4_9sHbYjeukLd-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being a vegetarian I had some restrictions in choice but the limited choices available is not an issue as my choice of vegetable platter had all those that I liked. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Enoch Eshetu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs9ks7cNupp2cpca7yCa_rqBDX9sX4ef9vB1KqwEEf2An3WsLx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Medina Halal Grill while I was in Dallas for a work conference and honestly loved it. I’m big on Mediterranean food and this place reminded me of one of my favorite gyro spots back home in Minneapolis. The first night I got the chicken shawarma with fries and cleaned the whole plate super fresh and flavorful. I came back again before flying out and they actually recognized me and welcomed me back by name, which was pretty cool.

Second visit I tried the chicken bowl and it was just as good. Quick service, friendly staff, and really solid prices. If I’m back in the Richardson area, I’m definitely coming here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhPe6d3yDik6BjuQM11XcI&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Eno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLzjprVg2gZ_s7luis5AOvuHRveb96OQJzwl9mR17xYRxBTuU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shawarma can go wrong in so many ways, but not here, they really know how to cook it right. The shawarma is always on point, and even the platters are another great way to enjoy their food. You honestly can’t go wrong ordering anything. It feels like food that can’t go wrong, straight up feels like home. I also love how they updated the tables and chairs and expanded the place it looks really good now. But the real heart of this restaurant will always be front staff and the crew. They genuinely make you feel welcome, especially on those late, beautiful nights.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVSXmIf6-1-dD_WB-vSDdq&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Harrison Speegle Chong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfhkzzPaLFiXASpldGPVSiKKT7_oAlhRcrQdL0AFDtKsmaqFKM2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been wanting to hit this place up when I crave a gyro platter and it did not dissapoint!

The styrofoam togo box was so heavy, the portion was ridiculous! I got the beef/lamb platter for $13 and it was very flavorful and balanced. Huge bed of rice underneath everything, the meat were in sizeable cubes and not crumbled or in strips, and plenty of veg and white/red sauce on the side!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcTU4uzOTCZGW7VWfmy8oi&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-2-10"},{"Name":"oscar reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDydkHsplmOgaqRaqkaV6SjFd4R0HVoYZTrXzAGv4pYgo88g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The first time I went was on a Monday and later that week I had to go again. I’ve had the chicken shawarma and gyro wrap. They were both very flavorful and well-seasoned. Be sure to get garlic sauce if you get fries. They also have hot sauce for those that like spicy. I spend around $13-14 and leave feeling very full so definitely worth it. Even when I get a dessert it still doesn’t add much more. I now go every week and will definitely keep going. I can’t believe I’ve been in Richardson Texas most of my life and it took me so long to finally stop by and try it. Better late than never, though!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyyM0DCLKg8k8r7kx-qEZ2&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Awais A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLq5Lf9Trs9qypkpEqmiSz1odbgAR2zBVI0A5wUh0A7S0S8MaY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chicken shawarma over rice was delicious. Spicy and full of flavors. Reminded me of NYC halal eats but this one is better! Reasonably priced and huge portions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWrOM-o-EjJA0jPJ-GSEov&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Jessica Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKKTJbLwIPSXnU6Cp7Yb-ERvgP7xHQ_kvpIricC9Xr-Qar7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food. Enjoyed the chicken shwarma wrap and side of falafels. We accidentally didn’t order lamb, will have to try that next time. Overall a great experience and will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUwl4ArKWrbwVTudDpur6V&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-3-4"},{"Name":"Kristen Smitheart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYxjEM1CnCceFZXacEjk7ZfsaJrBIYFkE8x7SXqRstGbt0aps=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is amazing. Falafel is perfect, shawarma right off the spit. Hummus and pita bread delicious. Just wish the restaurant was a little bigger!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMBeNCGsXaPzYoBzjt41PI&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Arif Sonnet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJJA9AjnKwDDerYqz4T0pfZpdxuC2TcAreftev7Sbb5fHHsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food is excellent, but the atmosphere needs improvement. The tables and dining area were not very clean, which took away from the overall experience. I hope they focus on improving cleanliness to enhance the dining experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeMPOVWVh_kVjAgvr2Roc_&fid=0x0:0xc744fc798c66d79a"],"When":"2026-2-6"}]
