[{"Name":"Ancelin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNFTAVuiINEdjlzzLp7wdKRXpBFOZkN5sAOVEvAIMeCjx8KKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the chicken over rice platter from here, and it was absolutely amazing!! I haven’t had this good of chicken and rice since my last trip to NY. The chicken, fries, rice, and salad were full of flavor. I appreciated how the portion sizes were very generous! The white sauce complimented the rice platter very well. I’ve already been here twice within one week and plan to make more visits. The food is that good! I would def recommend that you check out this spot!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHKx18ToUKVGKRpTw9YJBm&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Absaar Siddiqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBFSHSX-9DxQT7FL_01Ra7VWF6CWUeHZ8mpY6w4erLSX_Nm58=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The chicken and rice here is always bomb. I appreciate the serving sizes here, they do you good for the price you pay. Also generally pretty quick service and the staff is friendly too! I’ve also had their combo rice before with the chicken and lamb, definitely worth trying if you’re a fan of lamb/beef!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZXjAjUouN1FCBrU3E-rsH&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"Kani M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIElUvIAnl6qy1A8rWZZKQ8NYxV1RGo2SHIsSL-PFxOxymTwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is absolutely fire! The chicken and gyro plate was seasoned perfectly, super tender, and honestly one of the best I’ve had in a minute. The smash burger was so yummy. Crispy edges, juicy center, and packed with flavor. I was genuinely impressed. Loved it—will 100% be back. TikTok comments didn’t do it justice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhEZvHiM3dZ0bK_Fr44l3f&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Ali Surtiwala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImhNPV8CQrRtru2Ho8fsGDgD-YzLI1heu4QNzRAmrQz1gUaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"OG Chicken & Gyro

I have been to this new place a couple of times, and I absolutely loved it. They had a lot to from Burgers to various chicken items. They also have a signature dish called Fajiro, which is basically flat bread with meat in it.

Another thing to note is that their Gyro Wraps had fresh vegetable in it along with the protein of your choice. And that is something that I was able to taste. Well done.

Atmosphere was good, lots of light, and they had good space to sit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtilUfz3v1WJhDVqtGQ7bA&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Muhammad Usmani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2cycmansh9h6S1PGyE6jBUA_GKPTHFDTfSEBClsDE_pEgMlXH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One word - Delicious! A great addition to DFW community. They came all the way from NY to Dallas to serve us! Unique taste, loaded Philly steaks sandwich to juicy wings every thing was top notch. I also ordered fish to go for my wife and she loved every bite of it. Loaded gyro on rice, gyro sandwich everything was mouth watering, yes they open till 2am !! 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTmBjzIISIKKHwYqAAcWvn&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Sidratul Montaha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrOgG_--ydQAKYpwnf_RE17rVO2wtJp9kxHCk83DTbg_ANym17=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Finally, I got a place to eat halal philly cheesecake in the city, which is quite large and tasty as well. As a gyro lover, Also ordered a mixed over rice, but didn’t taste like a gyro we usually eat. That was disappointing. The price is a little high too. But enough for 2 people. Usually gyro meats are spiced very mild, but they were not good looking either. Still rating 4star as the service was top notch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbdxJkjC7HJ_wAkQ7hJObW&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Chantal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJmDHN1xwfSnPGDVo8ZOASHpKUls2BY06RHruz4I0AA2y848M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Enjoyed our visit. Could use more high chairs. I got the chicken platter ($13). The salad and fries were so bomb and the chicken and rice were delish. Service was exceptionally fast. Would be good for lunch when ppl need to eat and leave fast. It echoes and is hard to hear anyone when people are talking even slightly above normal decibals. I wish these owners all the best.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBnq-CjxSlW3MH3C38vXUDx&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"SharBebe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnqo5WhGbvjZQisem488fy6UHpngOARM--8md6WOCEiz7_ITEH9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food halal food here is incredibly flavorful and they don't skimp on the housemade 5 sauces that they offer which are delicious. Service is friendly & portions are huge. This place in Richardson is currently open late night till 2am. I recommend the OG platter with chicken & lamb and if in the mood for a burger you can't go wrong with the bbq bacon  burger. They also offer milkshakes and falafel.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOsmmdm2B2DGK1PwDbJ8py&fid=0x0:0x43cc6903c0b3adaa"],"When":"2025-12-19"}]

[{"Name":"Britney Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3J7IgN6yogB9CeZodhEAGqkvG0tn02zZb_uWgjGAJAwKh0EY4Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend trying this place!! I ordered the Mix Grill, Hummus & Pita, and a Greek Salad. The food was absolutely AMAZING!! Great portions too. Would definitely order the Mix Grill and Hummus again 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB15OPjSqtPwYuT4klQOozD&fid=0x0:0x7f952e5594f83f05"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"kimlovespigs21","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJX_aj9wGJOcMI2djoYWmUzNxFUefe1MeYg2SRcc7CFILQ_4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great daily lunch special for $14.
I got the chicken shish tawook with hummus and fries and my friend got the gyro plate with a salad and hummus.
The fries were good but I wish the seasoning was better distributed all over them instead of just tossed on top.
The hummus was delicious and I could eat that all day.
The pita bread was kinda flat and not that soft.
My shish tawook was good but I kinda felt like it wasn't much meat.
My friends gyro plate was good and she had no complaints.
Service was good and everyone was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALep2Y8ACDqp14rdxNuU31&fid=0x0:0x7f952e5594f83f05"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Mariah Rocha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbeeNetjWqeRHBY8d2xUw65qbu3IxazMW7oh6QZH99UhgSJUY7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time visiting was perfection. Our waitress was attentive and kind and provided service well beyond expectations. The food truly blew us away and my entire family enjoyed it. Portions were heaping and we all went home with leftovers. Pretty much all of us ordered the half chicken entree which came with two sides. The Greek salad quickly became a favorite of mine. We enjoyed the service and the food so much that we ended up going the very next day. Since then we’ve returned and visited their other location in Arlington. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Veronica Fernandez Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeyBMY-9hQhXAf9_9V142vFxRNbCefzF3YAtjLCcSdN7bprDNbxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Taverna Rossa - Plano
Overall: 3.5 Stars (Rounded to 4 for the team)
I have to start with a disclaimer: my heart belongs to Neapolitan pizza. That specific airy, fluffy dough is what childhood memories are made of for me. I am well aware Taverna Rossa does not claim to be a Neapolitan spot, but that is the benchmark I use for a 5 star experience.
The pizza here is a standard American thin crust. It is crispy, but it lacks that perfect combination of airiness and crunch that makes a dough truly memorable. I have had similar goat cheese and fig pizzas at other non-Neapolitan spots across the country that were significantly better than this one.
My pizza arrived almost at room temperature, but I will take the hit for that one. I chose to sit at the bar and I know those bartenders are running a marathon back there. Having worked behind a bar myself during my college years, I have nothing but respect for the hustle. The service was actually great and the staff were very nice.
At the end of the day, it is a good pizza with fancy ingredients, but the soul of the dough just was not there for me. 4 stars for the service, 3 stars for the pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgORawu3S2qhe64eeOeXSc&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"David K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvJUNnFgGHKRPMwDOCMtH-QEjXshcX4x8HxCnANTBIU6phcMho=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time back in probably 12 years.  Came for happy hour.  Our server was nice and attentive.  Ordered the pizza, pretzel, penne pasta and deviled eggs.  Pizza, pretzel and penne were good. Deviled eggs were just ok.  Drinks were tasty.  I would come back to eat their pizza.  Nice and large place for a large group.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCK2sImxYK3Ena3Jjz-hhuc&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Kbinos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUilXUpipK9WNYV7oohI_6wcVyWfcHIzJYb77aRmhL-7wOdNxo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have driven past this restaurant many times and finally decided to try it. We had the pretzel and we had a half All American half cheese pizza. Both were good. We went during happy hour and would probably try a different appetizer next time we go. The pretzel was good especially if you love garlic knots. I loved all the Christmas decorations, we sat in their covered patio area and was really nice for our family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAodiaFtAap1Vm0qvQSv6j5&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"T T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVg5DE2mU_aVH9TWyOpUEDk5R-eUoA6lcIC_zAxqI-sZWx8rydw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"$16 Lunch Special (choice of salad, pizza and fountain drink). I ordered:
• A nice plentiful bowl of salad (not pictured) - Farmhouse Salad and added feta
• Individual-sized pizza— Enough for leftovers and the crust is thin and crispy— Luscher Supreme and added fresh jalapeños. It’s bigger than the picture appears.

**********************
• Blueberry Lemon Martini was delicious and not too sweet (not pictured)

• Buffalo Shrimp- too soggy to me- the shrimp was plump and Buffalo flavor was good— they’ve should’ve just drizzled it with the Buffalo and ranch instead.

Service was friendly— could be a tad quicker.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBggdaHtp6OFYG2I5Mqe0xg&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Snehal Pendharkar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDlnQiFdJVkJykmizaaAYl_LVVSPUJls4x4k03NYCk_a9f-EY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A nice casual pizza joint with lively atmosphere . The place is actually huge and has patio and indoor seating. The mac and cheese is actually better than pizza and has a nice cheese crust on the top.  There are limited vegetarian options but overall is a nice date place. The service is pretty slow during the rush hour for dinner ( we went over the holidays during Christmas so I give them a benefit of doubt).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-QEGqE2AeDSEoYHLEAXHm&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Rebecca Lane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDeOuivfKulkorW2Nn23sYzv1m91ZrMKAazNG-rWwyWCCaUfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of our all time favorite pizza places. The wood fire pizza is so delicious and fresh. We customize our own pizza each time and it is perfection. Also you are able to book a small section of the restaurant off for gatherings. We ended up having our daughter’s first birthday at this location. The staff is always on top of it and the drink selection is great as well. Looking forward to dining here with our family for many years to come.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMcMQtVQ-9Pt4IrMfwuYLy&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Christopher Wise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5VsWJBaWgIAHJ4Y6gNzm1ZbLDneM79RC8pDM07HcN4XiZ8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went in for a late evening snack/dinner and a few drinks.  “Grace” the bar tender was absolutely amazing.  She explained to us they infused their tequila for Margaritas and their own vodka for Bloody Mary’s.  She let us try a few samples and they were amazing.  We ordered Buffalo Shrimp and a Pizza which came out promptly cooked to perfection.

Definitely would go back.

Oh and they had live music.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQfkoE_9z2eFnIHe7Dos8S&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Leah C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW95lgkMrk7f-Ltr5bRUsUo8HFy40_z02cUpq0Hi2t5rEnarV1V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience. My first time here. The pizza had a nice crisp crust and you could taste the fresh ingredients. We sat in the bar area and our waiter was so attentive and knowledgeable. We came at a good time. He was able to let us taste some of the multiple beers on tap to make sure we made a good selection. We got the stuffed mushrooms, yummy. We tried the cheese bread also was wonderful with the warm marinara sauce for dipping. We tried 2 different pizzas that were both just as good. Nice to have a variety. We will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUgFY_KWV4KYRgQO5O_er0&fid=0x0:0xcef7bcaed956b828"],"When":"2025-8-10"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKUzwVqUDDhnwmSI8bYNEkrv4XfBMb_u_rCdHU1pQy2gl-gA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good pricing for huge portions on the bowls. The service was quick and friendly. I liked that the chicken was cooked to order! Very tasty tahini sauce as well, I personally liked it more than the house sauce, which is mayo based. Garlic sauce could be thicker, imo. My boyfriend and I both got bowls. One gyro \u0026 chicken combo bowl and one chicken bowl. Loved that both came with a fresh side salad. We truly enjoyed our meals and will be back again! Next time, I'm trying their banana cheesecake!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrIdw_SkM6ndLa1UijbVTQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Adam Beuchert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfomI5mbfTRyIJeyiBLnjI0BSl-ULEXTdt7EE25s4STM0Gcchg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved Gryo Rice and Spice! The service was wonderful and very kind. Inside it is recently renovated and very clean. They actually come out and clean up as soon as others leave. We got a spicy wrap with chicken, a gyro bowl, and a small fry. Everything was prepared fresh and the portions are generous. The spicy wrap is definitely an item you don’t see at many gyro places. I enjoyed it. The gyro meat is so flavorful and delicious. We will definitely come back, I want to try a gyro and their hummus.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTJvM-Zntg2X9uz7WUsClu\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-8-11"},{"Name":"Nicole Santa Ana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXTAr4gf10tMaX2ZuC8OSAu1J51xYbVA3Z2qGB0IoDanQ646Kk8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The spicy Gyro bowl is phenomenal 😋 perfectly cooked meat... salad is fresh and the house sauce💯!! Staff is pleasant and service is fast!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBa59DStBuM8JD6srSp68eE\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Eloy Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsBtYgQ9laFGZ6HYT3jcdJPXKKOAz2G7dgibps_1nPyoE7dRiE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I tried 2 location in dallas, I love go to gyro and spice at Trophy Club cause there gyros always have a lot of meat but I tried this location and it didn't have meat at all! It was just count pieces of meat. So disappointed cause I love this place but not coming back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBl9TS2d2IiTKfl4H9Sq5ZZ\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Xtelle-Faustine (GlowwithXtelle)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJICGRFzqfTga3saXtZkw4YhwkuYs32XQHVLjmU7Xs8Wt-4NLFoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am currently eating here and just making sounds yummy🤤. I ordered to go and decided to seat and enjoy in the football match on tv. The small fries are a big portion, hot and perfectly crispy and seasoned. The spicy gyro wrap is to die for, huge so I can have some for lunch tomorrow and so full of flavor and they toasted my wrap crispy exactly like I asked for. I also ordered the gyro wrap to go for my hubby I know it will be delicious. The gentlemen are nice and welcoming. I will be back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPC2i4P7orDEzAE\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Rida Ward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEi0QRRjzShLtMfc1USy7-7QLNXEJ_1CNISsLA_osstQm2kA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Second time around....spicy gyro wrap top tier for me and this time I got another with a Mediterranean salad with chicken...Now $4 dollars to add chicken and 15 in total for this salad, I could have used the whole chicken breast and not just a quarter, but chicken is flavorful. But a disappointment of serving. I'll be back for another gyro wrap for sure . 3 for service as the young lady at register does not speak, nor smile. Guess I'm not at Chic Fa La🤷🏾‍♀️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYojaKKa6whRNp8pWkzi7q\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Shahriar Sonnet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFlhpd1vRJfAnxyCCXKawef6clvfq4m5U2VLM1mVPE6TDJiQDTcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Their food portion is really large but taste is unsatisfactory. Specially I haven't found any Mediterranean taste at all. I was surprised ti see my gyro comes with mushrooms. I ordered Large Spicy Gyro Fries and Spicy Gyro Wrap. Both of them had mushrooms which killed the taste. Then the use of the cheese and spice less green pepper made it worse. There are specific spices for Mediterranean foods and spices that has flavor. These doesn't go with Mediterranean taste. I was very disappointed. Only good thing was their amount of food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_8XKtsb20UZ_rkm8MTgST\u0026fid=0x0:0xf4b571223e77db50"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Where's The Lamb Sauce?!","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxX9Mhxv_m-5LCYBB-JJjmBX98j7M9lknQcqllzM_fGbUAixfC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The crew here always is super kind and helpful not to mention the owner. I had the privilege of meeting him on my first ever visit and this man is a true saint. Without asking he offered us complimentary deserts and some other sides just for simply stopping by and giving his restaurant a shot. My wife and I now make it a point to stop here when we are craving some AMAZING Mediterranean food. We loved going to a place close to home in Flower Mound but this place here is far superior in my book and is well worth the drive.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Shenila Mehdi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIiz3Wf_NVWS1mOOlhkq5R-tfPAWJVDhfZKYNrcdrwtcc9uKBC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quick lunch stop here during our visit to Dallas. We were very warmly greeted by the owner who explained us the choices. We went with the buffet option which was $15 pp and $8 for the kids. We added Beef kafta kebab and chicken for $3 each. Buffet had pretty good options of salads, falafel, rice, chicken and beef satay and more. We were also served with hot pita.
Kebab and chicken both were juicy and flavorful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbdHzOHceegYzgFyRhgskL&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Dhantei Roman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbwmZfpc-2ydXoYRM0Fn2EFMvxwZGLJ4mi-3ZhdzWomudrSHZ3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Best Kebab You’ve Never Heard Of: A Masterclass Turkish Craft.
I mean what do I know, I’m just Mexican.

But If you’re anything like me, you know that the best meals aren't found under neon signs or in trendy busy plazas. They’re tucked away in blink-and-you’ll-miss-it storefronts between a dental-care and a hardware store. I recently stumbled upon a family-run gem—the kind of "Mom and Pop" spot where the air smells clean and has a cafe style vibe—

However, the food was nothing less than astounding. I haven’t stopped thinking about it since.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBH_rXqm76iE2ROkK0NJcVS&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Raine Butanas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJokO1Tct_UXFWvxVyY43ny7K8NbnV0Rh6ex5Q8rY-l5JSUROI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ray, the owner, is a gem! We went here for lunch and he was very hospitable! The food selection is varied, and everything was delicious. Great kebabs and service! We even ordered hummus to go because it was so yummy! You get a bang for your buck here!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBU_lz98YEE3YVJLarv8O0m&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Susan Kilgore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWKPozu-ye9laiU7_4Bx6H4A7HwcV6u6axobZMxbrEoek8ow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went early and was greeted and assisted by the verry kind owner.  As this was my first time we spoke about the food, likes and dislikes and I went with the buffet.  I q as able to build my own, and selected the spicy rice, fabulous,  and the kale salad,  wonderful and then tried the 3 meat options from the buffet.  I had 2 with chicken and 1 beef.  All were very tasty and enjoyable!  I spent about $10 and had enough to eat twice!!!  Great food at a great price point!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"saikumar nalla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnxcuYuoQuuAmXauavRHHaIbdCMcgda4JgvujXRtLChMoKUgB_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Loved the way host welcomed us.. not of lot of varieties here but whatever they serve are the best in taste. Would love to visit again and recommended","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCA6hKtPV8tzJ2mblRb5fLy&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Brandon Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX16H6MDlE2wH1VOk3eRDjwczJBDSfaIKS_FoY57LeUd4BbqDsu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent hospitality and a great first experience with Turkish food. The owner was very welcoming, friendly, and continually checked in on us throughout the visit. When we arrived, we were warmly greeted, and he personally walked me around and explained everything.

The restaurant offers a buffet for $15, which includes drinks, soups, appetizers, salads, rice, and pita bread—everything except the kebabs. Chicken and beef kebabs are available for an additional $3. Unlike traditional buffets, everything tasted fresh and well prepared, not mass-produced or sitting out for long periods.

This is clearly a family-owned restaurant, and it looked like a one-man operation, with the owner handling everything himself. Despite that, the restaurant was very clean, organized, and well maintained.

It was my first time trying Turkish food. I’ve had Mediterranean food before, and this was a very good experience—homemade, authentic, and comforting. Overall, great food, great service, and great hospitality. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sabira W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKE4YN35AYpQpdiKcl8mSM5Y2c9L3JnlXwdYuKijFJG_nZg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently stumbled upon Sofra Kabob House, and I can honestly say it’s one of the best-kept secrets in the area! As a Pakistani, I wasn't familiar with the names of the dishes, but the flavors were absolutely captivating. Every bite was a delightful surprise that kept me wanting more.

The buffet was a feast for the senses, showcasing an incredible variety of dishes that were bursting with flavor. I was particularly impressed with the fresh pita bread, which was the perfect accompaniment to the meal. The highlight, however, was the kabob! The owner, who is the kindest person, personally prepares these delicious kabobs, ensuring they are tender, moist, and full of flavor. You can truly taste the love and care that goes into every dish.

This place is an absolute gem, and I can't wait to return the next time I’m in the area. Love love love this place! Highly recommend it to anyone looking for an amazing dining experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_ke_3LA&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2025-1-16"},{"Name":"Jenny W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7gKJkg_icA7u7fdrqVoscaI09HYioqkEUBrjw_-JTg6R8RA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The boss is very warm with his greeting and checking in on how things are. Their Kebab chicken is very juicy and tender, arguably the BEST kebab I have ever had!! Soup tasted good but wish it was a bit less salty. Other items were OK. Overall the restaurant is very clean. Wish locals gave more support to this family-owned restaurant!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_1bnAqwE&fid=0x0:0xb401d04462f6e5d0"],"When":"2025-1-25"}]

[{"Name":"Faisal A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGzfWbIkW7_gWi_bxPj9z-_d-LKBl946YOMoId3tl-2qmuKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was one of the worst dining experiences I’ve ever had.
There were no plates available, and no one was even behind the cashier when I arrived. The food was dry, clearly old, and just reheated ,absolutely no freshness or quality.
It honestly felt like I was eating leftovers from days ago.
This place is a complete waste of money, and I strongly recommend that no one tries this horrible experience.
Save your time, your money, and your appetite , go anywhere else but here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcHBvTtdNEzt6iduo3LxaD&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"Stephanie B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLCc7GovgyvcaMHqZREo-NFesSkaOTONWyjX9AkkfbIpczzEsK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time in and I was pleasantly surprised by how tasteful the space was decorated. Gorgeous art glass hung perfectly on the main wall and gives off a high end vibe.
Service is great! I was greeted with friendly Hello’s and a smile from everyone. The lady who took my order was kind enough to listen to my cravings and gave the perfect recommendation!
The New York Style Lamb Gyro over Rice was delicious and the portion was generous!
Wava Halal Grill is going on my list of Good Eats for when I’m in the area, for sure!😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDj1LHdlAE&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2024-4-29"},{"Name":"Saif","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSSy8kZ_NOivWakqR9Plsw8BOBu8Em8duZNGLBjmb4GRHHE-tQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered two philly steak sandwiches. They are not edible, they taste like last night microwaved  leftovers. Cheese Baklava is just a piece iofcheesecake and small baklava whata joke. Wasted my money, not going back again","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfrcxItdoud8SstmHOceVF&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Kiran Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIp4uwrPn2tCqIPJ_gFyGvNZDxLo8k_-VuU582GPb9n0usMc05=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of dining at Wava Halal Grill on Greenville Ave in Dallas and I must say it was a delightful experience. I would give it a solid 4 stars.

Firstly the ambience of the restaurant is inviting and comfortable. The interior is simple yet tastefully decorated with warm lighting and cozy seating arrangements. It created a welcoming atmosphere that made me feel at ease right away.

Moving on to the service I was impressed by the friendly and attentive staff. From the moment I walked in I was greeted with a warm smile and promptly shown to my table. The waitstaff were knowledgeable about the menu and provided helpful recommendations when I asked for them. Throughout my meal they were quick to check on me ensuring I had everything I needed without being intrusive.

Now let's talk about the star of the show: the food. Wava Halal Grill truly excels in this aspect. Their menu features a variety of halal dishes and I had the pleasure of trying their lamb gyro. The meat was juicy and tender perfectly seasoned and packed with flavor. The gyro came with a generous portion of fries which were crispy and delicious. It was a filling and satisfying meal that left me completely satisfied.

In terms of pricing Wava Halal Grill offers good value for money. The portions are generous and considering the quality of the ingredients and the overall dining experience I found the prices to be reasonable.

If there is one area where Wava Halal Grill could improve it would be the wait times during peak hours. The restaurant can get quite busy resulting in slightly longer wait times for both seating and food. However I believe that this is a testament to their popularity and the food is definitely worth the wait.

Overall I had a great dining experience at Wava Halal Grill. The ambience was welcoming the service was attentive and the food was absolutely delicious. I would definitely recommend giving this place a try if you're in the area and looking for a satisfying halal meal. With its flavorful dishes and pleasant atmosphere Wava Halal Grill earns a solid 4-star rating from me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZ0YOhag&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2023-10-3"},{"Name":"Emma B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuBTELOw1-TRSWjqSFa2Cx4p0Y67QFmDSucWnE8IXNO3ZTfIUW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"to Mr Ali the owner,
we have been coming to the location (Richardson ) for a years now and it was my to go restaurant for dinner time however, my last experiences mainly from one of your employee was unpleasant  and awful.
I usually go for either Tri or Lamb and beef gyro over rice
so i picked up the order and there is usually a guy behind the counter very friendly but last time i went there a rude disrespectful women. I was having a chat with here while waiting for the food to get ready and i did catch her in a lie which was very weird thing to lie about !
anyway when i open the order i found out that the portions are reduced Tremendously that wt am used get so my husband called the place and he was talking to her explained how disappointed he is and guess what she told him ! IF YOU DO NOT LIKE IT DONT COME BACK !!!!!  she made you loss 2 paying costumers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw_cDXJw&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2025-3-27"},{"Name":"Alexela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaKj-H2qPI2rBDDgXYY3ipFN9beVUT2lWWa5h4b0NvOIHjaTzM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unacceptable and dangerous experience.
The cashier was immediately rude and dismissive. While eating, I found a white hair in my food — and shortly after, I became seriously ill with symptoms of food poisoning. I am 8 months pregnant, and this could have put both me and my baby at risk. This is completely unacceptable. Basic hygiene and professionalism were clearly not a priority here. I would strongly caution others against eating at this location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAYYi4YwD-k_wOk4mpYDCMC&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Rimsha Tahir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjG81vEwsuAAPvINfJCSBfVRo3qA5GHu6JYCLiYssYYYbSbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I tried this place a year ago and i visited today. This place used to be really good but it sucked today! Pathetic food, bland taste not to mention how they have cut down their portion sizes into half. I tried the philly cheesesteak sandwich and chicken shawarma. The size was a joke for what they charged us. I drenched it in sauces to make it flavourful but that didn’t make much of a difference. I don’t know if the ownership changed or what but I’m never going here again! Money wasted","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dewan Mahmud Raihan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsWh2LYQjoNzg-qQ3NPkDDpUmlvraD4jpfrRQB_Lx2UaG1M1x0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This restaurant’s environment is top-class. It was so calm and quiet, and the food tasted good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQXv3RqW1Z59LysLPj5ZQK&fid=0x0:0xcb719f9682a1b58d"],"When":"2025-8-26"}]

[{"Name":"Tusar Rashid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtz_lX6OFxl4v-z6PMbFRph-7GP5O2lYGbJrUWtak4tlLqFLU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently ordered catering from Yalla Eats in Plano, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From the moment I walked in, the owner, Husam, welcomed me with such kindness and genuine hospitality. He went above and beyond to help me choose the best options for my event, and you can truly feel the pride he takes in sharing the rich flavors of Middle Eastern cuisine.

The food was absolutely incredible—fresh, vibrant, and full of authentic flavor. Every dish was prepared with care, and the portions were extremely generous for the price. The shawarma chicken was so juicy & flavorful😋 My guests couldn’t stop talking about how delicious everything was!!

Supporting a new local business like Yalla Eats feels great, especially when the service and food exceed every expectation. If you’re looking for amazing Mediterranean/Palestinian HALAL / Zabiha food and exceptional customer service, look no further!Highly recommend Yalla Eats—5 stars all the way! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApvzKpw91C7tI_Ea51Yqwq&fid=0x0:0xf0fc8f5b8419e753"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Irina Kremen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVf4mIMCfM4KyrBB0wclWOx0HavEV2y4BQQPEigaBOB7KJLzX4i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was our first time in this small restaurant and we really like the food. We didn't eat inside we took the food home. The samosa was delicious, plenty of meat and very juicy. Definitely will come again. I suggest to call them ahead for the take outs and they will prepare the food in about 30 minutes for you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAm8HgIf9tyc__pMaeqn8Vz&fid=0x0:0xf0fc8f5b8419e753"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Darci Daggett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXr4nKrc0bnodRHbUqxXIneEtGINJamC7VWu5rk1vR0eJ6JFp9UA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owner (I think he’s the owner? Whoever the kind man and his father who served my bf and I on 11/21) was so incredibly kind and informative of everything on the menu!! He gave me such a wonderful suggestion to try and I couldn’t be happier with what I got. The food was SO delicious and I am so excited to return soon.

Also, the little Yalla mascot is so cute he looks like this and it makes very happy:
.🙂
<| |>
. | |","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsLlbHXijmpXeg6njwCgKY&fid=0x0:0xf0fc8f5b8419e753"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Irma Lugo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpfqyEPFY_7EvPElVdw2qtZZGAZvLGV88-lU8PQUvPqYJB_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is my plate.
I ordered the chicken plate with extra rice and extra pita. I don’t think the pita is real Pita. It’s more of the chapati.
Also I was expecting a salad, but they gave me these carrots. They’re really good and also the hummus didn’t come with the olive. It looked a little bit different than the picture but overall it’s pretty good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqEF-LG_j0iZJA0ztLHqE0&fid=0x0:0xf0fc8f5b8419e753"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Suhail Sabharwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIu4zuhQn64cCRIIlKFqR-HKvg3NPil7GV6nJm0VoESSDt8i_n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried Yalla Eat in Plano for the first time and it did not disappoint! The chicken shawarma was absolutely amazing – flavorful, juicy, along with the perfectly baked bread. The accompanying salad was fresh and tasty, adding the perfect balance to the meal. I also got the falafel, which was spot-on: crunchy on the outside and soft and flavorful on the inside.

Overall, it’s a great spot to satisfy Mediterranean cravings. I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjnCEaBh2R-z-jA-Dg523i&fid=0x0:0xf0fc8f5b8419e753"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Eli_Quinn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrgNPID63Rsz6vaiV55egs4rMYT0djJjvXubWnhj3j1ngSDyo-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic food!!!!! I ordered the Beast Style Double Burger Combo, with no ketchup, and no onions, but it had both. Luckily they gave me utensils, and I scraped it off. 👌🏻 other than that, I’d suggest keeping the burger buns warm somehow.  If I can’t feel the heat from the food, when taking it out of the bag, that’s not a good start.  Keep up the great work, and I’ll see y’all again soon. 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdsYK7Mg\u0026fid=0x0:0x4351bb7e4ecab9cb"],"When":"2024-2-16"},{"Name":"NAIDA PABLO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfBTNBaKBrKe5dlcuFLg3l-xhNsikr5zKapz_QupgGgt7S-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is a mess. [{"Name":"emBrace Desires","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyW0gGcYR49G1TQ7mvSNNB4RWD24zPW-IYMaDxVB-rloyxbWAK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went looking for lamb for our dogs who are allergic to beef and chicken.  We left with over 20lbs of boneless lamb that the butcher cut just the way we wanted, brains, spleen, a few other organs, fish and could not have been more happier.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDy0-YQjp9-pUcCjMQJ3zYz&fid=0x0:0x62cadf910dfec5f6"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Sai Krishna Katterishetty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmNCDYjhspeHa81OglBseBWAOyXrTaqdlkDQMfikFCSrwHVDH9zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing to express my profound disappointment and frankly, disgust, with the abysmal customer service I recently experienced at your Plano location. What was intended to be a pleasant family meal turned into an exercise in frustration, humiliation, and ultimately, a complete waste of time and money.

Upon recommendation, we attempted to place a phone order. This seemingly simple task proved impossible due to a representative who, after multiple attempts, blamed "bad reception" and curtly instructed us to place our order online for takeout. Fine. We complied, albeit with growing irritation.

However, upon arriving to collect our order, circumstances changed. My young daughter, understandably hungry after our travels, requested we dine in. We collected our takeout order and began to unwrap the food when a staff member confronted us. What followed was an astonishing display of coldness and discourtesy. We were informed, with no prior notification, of a dine-in surcharge and given the ultimatum: pay or leave.

Let me be clear: the issue isn't necessarily the surcharge itself (though the lack of transparency is concerning). It was the manner in which we were treated. The staff member was utterly devoid of empathy or basic customer service skills. We were made to feel unwelcome, as though we were attempting to perpetrate some kind of fraud. Humiliated and frankly, shocked, we chose to leave.

The food, which I can only describe as "okay" at best, became an afterthought. This entire experience was soured beyond redemption. While I understand restaurants have policies, the way in which those policies are enforced can make or break a customer's experience. In this case, it irrevocably broke it.

I would give zero stars if possible, solely based on the unacceptable customer service. I strongly advise anyone considering dining at Zabiha Halal in Plano to reconsider. There are countless other establishments that value their patrons and treat them with basic human decency. I will certainly never return.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SYEDA AASIYA OSMAN HUSSAINI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1StkjaTsQPbtz6Qv4SoxIZk9eVYHsVAIDS9sJjaDsxjo9J7th=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hello,

I am writing in regards to my recent purchase of halal meat. The cashier (Anusha) charged me an extra of $5.98 for an item i did not buy. I called them back the next day, with no regret she said the manager (Karthik) would call me back to help me. He has not called me yet and now seeing the other terrible reviews here, I bet Royal meats is not going to help me with the mistake made by them at their end! We are regular customers here, buy fresh meat and shawarmas, but now very disappointed with them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SRESHAM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1qiFpVTHPURVHukYTzmKyfX1l_MuJ9pCE47wRvy9ga7XhFwT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We purchased the goat brain, liver from this shop. And it was told to us everything is fresh but the brain was stale, smelling. And the liver also looked 2/3 days old.
We have to trash them and it was waste of money. They don’t carry trash stuff!!
Please check before anyone buys from them . They change the wrapping of desired date , so who knows what is inside that tray.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN7uxvnlgYu5mgE&fid=0x0:0x62cadf910dfec5f6"],"When":"2025-6-5"},{"Name":"Samuel G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBkNUEqPKAg0UJEfmIM2uDG9lsxjiHufhZZBKScGCnyiZ6ToJ9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The beef shawarma sandwich and platter were downright horrible. This place used to be good. Not anymore. Falafel was burnt. The place is extremely unsanitary. Please read other reviews where folks have similar stories","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Muhammad Rayan Ahmad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWf2wvS_UfyWeOCfcbP2dAeXyL8bsnBgO8yfXQs7yycVkAQrNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'd been looking for a good pizza and shawarma in Texas for a long time and then I found this place. It has both with excellent taste. I tried their BBQ Chiken Pizza and Chiken Shawarma and it felt like the scene from movie Ratatouille when Anton Ego tried the dish Ratatouille at the end and he is left speechless by the taste. A lot of people might not even know about this place since it's mainly a meat shop and not a restaurant but you can order Takeout. Their Shawarma has real sauce and it's sooooo freekin good. And don't even get me started about the pizza 🤤. Also the staff was really friendly. I'm glad to have found this place. Would definitely recommend it 💯","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICitt-RUw&fid=0x0:0x62cadf910dfec5f6"],"When":"2020-11-1"},{"Name":"Erdal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9GG5ikLUxoEFM82vxF05JOVMwHy1DUHYEWCOYDXBD552d_in-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best filet mignon ever! The owner does not sell steaks if he doesn’t think they will be worth of customers’ money.

Update on 7/30/2024: Owners have changed a while ago. I haven't been going there since then. I have no knowledge about their current quality and service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDCweik6wE&fid=0x0:0x62cadf910dfec5f6"],"When":"2020-9-29"},{"Name":"Paul Carpenter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYHebUYB91VeSDEFxK9Bc90xRwNjXIfp6JlV45swhCgSM0MZEA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just tried them for the first time and felt the need to give it 5 stars. The Gyro and chicken strips are delicious. I thought the prices were reasonable as well. Looking forward to exploring the menu.

Edit: I just saw all the negative reviews...They must've taken some of the criticism and improved because I absolutely enjoyed mine.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Claudia Villarreal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBP7uO4POiWE6C2Qr_uTDMx1k56mFwzgktAvoMENYRPZII3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The atmosphere was great, but it was a very busy night and having only one server for a table of 15+ people wasn’t sufficient. I ordered the chicken kabob, which was unfortunately undercooked and made for a disappointing experience. On a positive note, the hummus was excellent. The staff did offer to replace my plate, which I appreciated, but I declined. Overall, the chicken dish detracted from what could have been a much better visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNWHLd-WjrwloRkTWpxF2i&fid=0x0:0x51b6b721ba2bc248"],"When":"2026-2-10"},{"Name":"sharif Mirza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaJYuPsm6atigrk3uVWDMyOyDfj-TaKFUN2KU1hcxm1AIjH6lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience on valentine night.. The food was incredibly delicious flavorful, and authentic. The hookah was smooth and perfectly prepared, which made the whole experience even better. The server was friendly, attentive, and made us feel very welcome. Great vibes, great service, and amazing food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIpx-1IJ4kv1lyNCJkXG4I&fid=0x0:0x51b6b721ba2bc248"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Derya Uzsüt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1sm6JoY92sNrNCvk4-akgHEtFc2x626yvv45CyLKrdAbDO8wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here for Turkish breakfast and it was absolutely amazing! The presentation was beautiful everything came fresh, colorful, and delicious. The scrambled eggs with sucuk were perfect, and the variety of cheeses, veggies, pastries, sauces, and spreads made it feel like a real Turkish breakfast.
Huseyin was so kind, attentive, and welcoming. You can really feel the hospitality. The whole experience was relaxing and enjoyable.
Definitely one of the best Turkish breakfast spots I’ve tried. Highly recommend! 🇹🇷✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAT6Qk58VBKtUhVCJGd9BiL&fid=0x0:0x51b6b721ba2bc248"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Keith Lindsey Jr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpnZfKXidxdvgrQCu-aQ6gK8fE8wlwyQGCaSHrNBUmMf8bXqod=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First time customer here.  Was referred to Turkish Cafe right after visiting Another Place (lamp store) not too far away from here.  We were excited to see a small-ish front dining room open up to a large back dining room with tables with access to outside.  The Turkish lamps from Another Time were definitely present in the decor which was cool.  Sadly, I think the positives end there…

We were able to get a table right away and be seated.  A man took our order of drinks but then a young woman introduced herself as our waitress shortly after.  We repeated our drinks and eventually got around to ordering food.  As we ordered she fiddled with some electronic device to input our orders but it just seemed like she just didn’t retain what we were telling her.  I had to repeat “lamb chops” multiple times and pointed to the menu to show her what I was trying to order.  I was never asked what temperature I would like the lamb chops cooked.  After a good amount of time the waitress came out with a wrong drink order and asked “you didn’t order lamb chops did you?”  It took me a second to realize she was serious.  The food came out presented nicely. The lamb chops needed salt but they were only ok, especially since they were pricey.  We ordered two Turkish coffees and the waitress had to repeat it a few times to us before she left.  She then came back later asking if we had the Turkish coffees.  When they eventually came out they were not very hot and didn’t come with sugar.

My wife’s Turkish salad was good, very fresh and she liked the olive oil that was used to make it.  The beef hummus was also good.  The place wasn’t busy but it seemed like a lot of workers were just congregating and talking instead of being attentive to us.  I had to walk over and approach our waitress that we were ready for the check.  It was disappointing service for sure, we were so excited from the recommendation but sadly it didn’t live up to it.  Also, it was only my wife and I but the service fee was already automatically added to the bill.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcOGpEDB2kdJjSgIhZ4BLo&fid=0x0:0x51b6b721ba2bc248"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Ivonne U.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlURHs5TnyHKJxK989H-nPM3uRtUJ49Ijt3wJlVuEJtWwHcUJIXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the atmosphere and the food. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Heba Meqbel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbUCB_WNGAa_2i-4eJPpT773wdzbTKYuT32vbcTaxihWbVhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience at this restaurant. The shawarma and falafel were fresh, flavorful, and perfectly made. The food tasted authentic and exceeded my expectations.

The staff were incredibly welcoming and made me feel comfortable from the moment I walked in. Their great hospitality is worth mentioning.

The place is also very clean and well-organized, which adds a lot to the overall experience.

Highly recommended — I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApzp8V_zwN5Q-MYfjqGoa4&fid=0x0:0xa0cd0aa4a4911e2"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Omar Rachid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG3BG6XRMA0OlAFHJJ48PQRgS8pOKMKw_n2C5YwjrRaFGNkDTe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The four of us went to Board Bites looking for authentic Lebanese street food, and we were absolutely delighted with what we found.

Our orders included a Falafel Plate with veggies and bread, Fattoush with chicken, Plain Fattoush, Lentil Soup, Hummus, and Baba Ghanouge. Every single dish was truly delicious, bursting with authentic Lebanese flavors.

I especially enjoyed the falafel—it was freshly fried, perfectly seasoned, and tasted genuinely authentic. You could tell it was made with care and tradition.

The hospitality of the owner was exceptional—warm, gracious, and truly made us feel welcome. The atmosphere is casual and comfortable, the kind of place you can relax and enjoy a great meal with friends.

It was an enjoyable dinner from start to finish, and I highly recommend Board Bites to anyone craving authentic Lebanese cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpGdxEJYq7CNx22L3EZ4y3&fid=0x0:0xa0cd0aa4a4911e2"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Sarah Balute","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoTCFjcmiCqJLUcOB7iVM35jYq0-KVHcW1TwSOqK6HQN52bV0tVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down one of the best and tastiest Lebanese restaurants I’ve ever been to. Every dish was packed with authentic flavor — the delicious kibbeh, falafel, and the meats were tender and perfectly seasoned. Their sandwiches were especially delicious, loaded with flavor and made to perfection. You can truly taste the freshness and quality in every bite.

Beyond the food, the hospitality was exceptional and the atmosphere was warm, inviting, and effortlessly elegant. It’s the kind of place that makes you want to linger a little longer and immediately plan your next visit. If you love Lebanese cuisine, this spot is an absolute must-try.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"design 1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJj6yzulX_1H8nPaoMG_JQiLelXtdVM3lkdbptdQZETWD4qA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’ve been craving shawarma and want to enjoy both great food and a welcoming atmosphere, you’ve come to the right place. The shawarma here is absolutely delicious, chicken is my favorite, and the chicken with rice is incredibly tasty. The fattoush is fresh and amazing, and the falafel is perfectly soft on the inside and crispy on the outside.

You’ll truly enjoy your experience, and Board Bites will quickly become your new favorite shawarma spot. Highly recommended 😋.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SandAndSports","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8-8-dsrPCq-rxDka9P6QySLHG8R-_khdStpyBmxmgV5l2O7Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Board Bites is a masterclass in how to do modern Lebanese cuisine without losing the traditional soul of the food.

The Food: Every dish felt like it was made with care. The flavors are bold, authentic, and beautifully presented. Everything and I mean all are amazingly delicious with every bite you take.

The Atmosphere: They’ve created a space that feels both cozy and elevated. It’s a great environment for sharing plates with friends. Most importantly it’s very clean.

The Service: Fast, professional, and genuinely kind. They really go the extra mile to ensure you’re enjoying your meal.

This isn’t just another wrap shop; it’s an experience. Easily one of the best spots in town for anyone craving real Middle Eastern hospitality."  I highly recommend stopping by and getting a bite, you won’t be disappointed!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L & I","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWukCQhiaeX2Bj1vFHpiPeupfYWAUeM8tT-x7GUjRBJD5VLbtbvKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Board Bites on K Avenue in Plano is a hidden gem that delivers big on flavor and hospitality. I stopped by and ordered the chicken shawarma wrap, and I’m still thinking about it. The wrap itself was perfectly toasted—crispy on the outside but still soft enough to let all the juicy, flavorful chicken shine through. The spices were spot on, not overpowering but rich and balanced, giving it that authentic Lebanese taste.

What really stood out beyond the food was the warmth of the staff. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with genuine smiles and friendly energy that made the whole experience feel personal and welcoming. It felt like they cared just as much about how I was doing as they did about making sure the food was on point—and both were excellent.

The textures in the shawarma were amazing, too—crispy edges, tender meat, and fresh veggies, all wrapped up just right. It’s a simple dish, but done to perfection.

If you’re in the Plano area and craving something delicious, fresh, and made with care, Board Bites is definitely worth a visit. I’ll be back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIsZ7hJQ&fid=0x0:0xa0cd0aa4a4911e2"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Saif Kaleem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjOUquvOjy7xB1aY2JOdBgk8Pqvqrp-PT9jEBiT0NUt-aWdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Board Bites has quickly become my go-to spot. The chicken shawarma wraps are amazing, kafta plate was delicious, and the chicken shawarma rice bowl was off the chain. The food is always fresh, the service is super fast, and the employees are very friendly. I ordered twice in the past week and the taste and consistency were perfect both times. I’ll definitely keep coming back, highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charles Boltas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV89mJiXDdzKxTURDvU1ansarvqfhWrxFcU4AM1qCYQh8EOGnIMdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As others have said ... This restaurant serves FRESH food.

I ordered the falafel boxed lunch. The falafels were perfectly fried. They were moist and fluffy with a good flavor. Highly recommended if you like falafels. The hummus tasted freshly made. The side salad was fresh.

I have no issues with any of my food. I will be ordering here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCoxpLNOw&fid=0x0:0xa0cd0aa4a4911e2"],"When":"2025-4-16"}]
